# Run a sustainable business | Seller Center

Running a sustainable business
==============================

Discover how you can become a more sustainable seller by reducing your environmental footprint.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/03/sc_newsustainability_hero_mobile_1536x832.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/03/sc_newsustainability_hero_desktop_fullbleed_2880x992.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Create a sustainable future
---------------------------

Climate change is a concern that impacts everyone and poses significant challenges to our environment. Our activities release emissions into the atmosphere, which in turn warm our planet and drive climate change.

You can stand out from your competition by acting responsibly towards the environment and embracing circular economy principles. The circular economy is an economic system aimed at minimizing waste and making the most of resources by reusing, repairing, refurbishing, and recycling existing materials and products. 

By selling with this in mind, you can reduce the impact your business has on the planet. This can lead to a lower carbon footprint, create economic added value such as cost savings through energy efficiency, allow you to tap into new environmentally conscious target groups, and strengthen your brand image.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/03/sc_newsustainability_sustainablefuture.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

What buyers think
-----------------

### Consumer demand for sustainable products and practices is on the rise. Today’s buyers are passionate about sustainability and want to buy from businesses that share their values.

63% of global consumers surveyed say sustainability is important to them when making purchasing day-to-day decisions. 

  
  
68% of eBay buyers say sustainability is becoming more important to them every year.

  
  
Over 70% of consumers surveyed globally planned to spend on recommerce/pre-loved goods in 2024.

Source: [2024 Recommerce Report](https://www.ebayinc.com/recommerce-report/)

eBay is a pioneer in the circular economy
-----------------------------------------

eBay makes it easy to create and run an environmentally sustainable business, no matter what you’re selling—after all, supporting the circular economy through reselling and repurposing is how we got started. The first sale on our marketplace was a pre-owned laser pointer, purchased by someone who wanted to fix and give it a second life. Since then, **79% of global sellers** surveyed said they got their start on eBay by selling pre-loved goods.

  
Through recommerce, we extend the lifespan of products, diverting them from landfills, and empowering customers to make sustainable choices. We’re also continually investing in fueling the circular economy, for example through our [eBay Pre-Loved Partner Program](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/selling/pre-loved-partner-program)
, which helps reduce the need for environmentally costly new manufacturing of clothing. Alongside other initiatives, we work with community organizations and nonprofits that support and uplift local communities around the globe. 

  
By leveraging our platform and incorporating sustainability into your business, you can play an essential role in the transition to a circular economy.

Source: [2024 Recommerce Report](https://www.ebayinc.com/recommerce-report/)
, [Pre-Loved Partner Program](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/selling/pre-loved-partner-program)
  

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/03/sc_newsustainability_circulareconomy.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Terms you should know
---------------------

Carbon emissions

Carbon footprint

Recommerce

The release of carbon, particularly as carbon dioxide, into the atmosphere through various activities. Lowering emissions is a key step in minimizing environmental impact.

Where to start
--------------

You can tackle climate change by taking 3 essential steps: calculating, setting goals, and reducing emissions. 

The first thing to do is check your business’s carbon footprint to see the emissions your business is producing. Organizations like Carbon Trust make it easy for you to do this through their [Carbon Footprint Calculator](https://www.carbontrust.com/resources/sme-carbon-footprint-calculator)
. 

Next, you can start considering ways to minimize your impact and build upon the things your business is already doing to be sustainable. For example, you can go paperless by using electronic invoices, or if you’re a Shop subscriber, you can create a newsletter to streamline your communication to buyers. These are easy ways to help reduce your carbon footprint.  
  
It’s also important to take regulations into consideration, particularly if you sell internationally. For example, when selling to buyers in Germany, businesses have to comply with the [2019 Packaging Act](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/going-global/german-packaging-act)
. We’ll keep you informed about new regulations that may affect your business.  

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/03/sc_newsustainability_wherestart.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Ways to make your business more sustainable
-------------------------------------------

*   ![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/03/sc_newsustainability_resell_updated--1-.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)
    
    ### Resell
    
    \- Resell and restore second-hand items to ensure that products, and their materials and components re-enter the economy.   
      
    \- Promote pre-loved products and encourage others to embrace the circular economy.  
    
*   ![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/03/sc_newsustainability_repair.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)
    
    ### Refurbish
    
    \- Consider refurbishing items to extend the lives of products, which also allows buyers to reduce their environmental impact.   
      
    \- Offer repair kits and services, as well as cleaning, care, and maintenance tips to extend the product life.   
      
    \- Partner with experts to help buyers fix items.   
    
*   ![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/03/sc_newsustainability_recycle.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)
    
    ### Recycle
    
    \- Encourage buy-back programmes for old items.   
      
    \- Let buyers know the best options for waste sorting as well as how they can recycle their packages and items.   
      
    \- Participate in verified carbon offset projects to balance emissions.   
    
*   ![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/03/sc_newsustainability_reduce.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)
    
    ### Reduce
    
    \- Cut down on energy-use with efficient appliances.  
      
    \- Consider renewable energy options like solar power to lower your carbon footprint.   
      
    \- Reduce waste by choosing sustainable packaging, offering combined postage, and using environmentally-friendly delivery methods.    
    

Continue your sustainability journey
------------------------------------

Learn more about how eBay embraces sustainable practices to support a thriving environment.

[Find out more](https://www.ebayinc.com/impact/sustainable-commerce/)

Learn how to create great listings so you can start showcasing your pre-owned inventory.

[Get started](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings)

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=3587ab6a-f304-44e8-9eaa-2a48c5b1c13d&ctx_pageTitle=Run+a+sustainable+business+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

---

# Fitment Plus | Seller Center

Fitment Plus
============

List your parts and accessories items more easily with automatic fitment coverage and help get noticed by more buyers.

[Create a myFitment account](https://app.myfitment.com/users/new/simple)

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/08/fitmentplus_1440x992px.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

On this page

*   [What is Fitment Plus?](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/ebay-fitment-plus#what-is-fitment-plus-)
    
*   [How Fitment Plus benefits sellers](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/ebay-fitment-plus#how-fitment-plus-benefits-sellers)
    
*   [Get started with Fitment Plus](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/ebay-fitment-plus#get-started-with-fitment-plus)
    
*   [FAQs](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/ebay-fitment-plus#f-a-qs)
    

What is Fitment Plus?
---------------------

**Fitment Plus** is a tool designed to enhance your parts and accessories listings with complete, accurate, and updated compatibility data. With Fitment Plus you can add fitment to listings that had no previous compatibility data and additional fitment to listings that already have some compatibility data.

With complete, accurate, and updated fitment on your listings, buyers easily find the parts and accessories that fit their vehicle.

Fitment Plus now has a powerful feature, **Automatic Fitment Coverage**, that can automatically keep your listings with fitment up-to-date. You’ll have to **opt in** to turn on this feature. Try it today!

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/02/EB-18418_P_ASellerCenterPage_ImageResizes_RW5_ImageResize_Image01_1200x1200_FINAL.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

How Fitment Plus benefits sellers
---------------------------------

### Build Trust

Add an extra layer of trust and protection for buyers by qualifying your products for eBay Guaranteed Fit, which can help reduce returns.

### Improve Efficiency

Save time and brainpower researching fitment. As long as your listings have the brand and part number, Fitment Plus can match the right vehicles automatically.

### Increase Exposure

Enhance and amplify your product listings so they appear in more searches—ultimately boosting sales.

Get started with Fitment Plus
-----------------------------

The program may help you generate more sales, enhance your buyer experience, and even help you see lower returns. When you add compatibility information to your listings using eBay Fitment Plus, your listings will be eligible for [eBay Guaranteed Fit](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/protections/ebay-guaranteed-fit)
. The benefits of the entire Fitment Plus catalog is right at your fingertips, for free. Here’s how to join:

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/02/EB-18418_P_ASellerCenterPage_ImageResizes_RW5_ImageResize_Image02_1200x720_FINAL.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

1

**Create a myFitment account**

Go to [myfitment.com](https://myfitment.com/)
 from your desktop browser to sign up for a free account.

2

**Connect your eBay seller account**

Link your eBay account with your myFitment account. Once you enter the requested information your Seller ID will be authenticated.

3

**Turn on Automatic Fitment Coverage**

Keeping up with updates to your listings can be time consuming, so we’ve got a solution for you. Choose to opt into Automatic Fitment Coverage. This free service is designed to automatically keep your listings up-to-date with the latest fitment. Automatic updates are applied based on your fitment coverage preferences.

You’re all set with Fitment Plus! If you’d like to manage your own fitment, you can learn more about how to use the Fitment Plus toolkit by visiting our [Help page](https://intercom.help/myfitment/en/articles/8638990-getting-started-with-fitmentplus)
.

[Create a myFitment account](https://app.myfitment.com/users/new/simple)

FAQs
----

### What is fitment, and is it the same as compatibility?

The terms fitment and compatibility are often used interchangeably as they have similar meanings. “Fitment” is a term common in the automotive industry to refer to vehicles that a part is made to fit, while “compatibility” has a wider meaning across other categories outside of parts and accessories.

### I already have compatibility information on my listings; how can Fitment Plus benefit me?

Fitment Plus is a tool that can help you find and add complete, accurate, and updated compatibility information (also known as fitment) to your listings. If your listings already have some fitment, there may be more information available that you can add through Fitment Plus to help make your listings seen more by buyers. Even if you’ve used the tool before, our catalog may have grown and has the ability to add additional compatibility information.

### When I go to create an account the link takes me to myfitment.com. Is this site one eBay recommends?

Yes. eBay acquired myFitment in 2022 and is offering free fitment services, as Fitment Plus, to eBay sellers.

### What is Automatic Fitment Coverage?

This free service is designed to automatically keep your listings up-to-date with the latest fitment. Automatic updates are applied based on your fitment coverage preferences. This service is only available for eBay Fitment Plus subscribers.

### What is the benefit of using Automatic Fitment Coverage?

With Automatic Fitment Coverage, your listings continue to benefit from accurate fitment data without the need for manual updates. Fitment information is automatically updated according to your specified coverage preferences, saving you time and effort.

### I have multiple eBay stores. Can I still get automatic fitment updates?

Yes, the sign-up process is quick and simple:

1\. Log in to your Fitment Plus account 

2\. Click "Get automatic fitment coverage for this store" on your home view

3\. Confirm the store that will receive automatic fitment updates

4\. Define desired fitment coverage preferences for your selected store

### How can I set up rules to automate updates for my listings?

You can manage the automatic publishing settings on myFitment.com under Profile / Automatic Fitment Coverage Preferences. The same setting options for publishing fitment manually are available when setting up automatic updates for your listings.

### Can I opt out of the automatic update service?

Yes, you can opt out at any time to stop automatic fitment updates. All previous fitment updates will still apply to the listings, so nothing will be lost if you choose to pause or stop the automatic updates. There may be a delay of up to 2 business days between the request to opt out and the end of the service.

### Does participation or cancellation of Automatic Fitment Coverage impact my Fitment Plus subscription?

No. This is a free add-on service to Fitment Plus, and it’s designed to make it easy to maximize your fitment coverage. If you decide to manually update your listings, you will still have access to the value that Fitment Plus provides.

### Who is responsible for the fitment that is added to my listings as part of Automated Fitment Coverage?

Sellers are always responsible for the fitment associated with their listings and we encourage you to regularly review fitment to ensure it’s to your satisfaction. We suggest using myFitment’s tools to research and publish fitment manually to build confidence and familiarity, before signing up for automatic updates. You can adjust or cancel your level of participation at any point.

### How long does it take for new compatibility to appear on my listings?

You should see your new compatibility information on your listings within the same day of publishing. If you use a third party tool to manage your listings, you may need to take action within the third party tool before your listings are updated. For more information review our [Help page](https://intercom.help/myfitment/en/articles/7792620-myfitment-connection-guide)
.

### Are there limitations on which listings Fitment Plus can update?

Fitment Plus can update any listings in the parts and accessories categories that allow fitment, as long as there is no temporary restriction on the listing (such as a current offer). For listings in categories that don’t allow fitment, Fitment Plus can suggest a new category if there is fitment available. Additionally, listings in an ‘offer’ status as well as listings whose fitment was added through the eBay parts catalog (i.e. they have an eBay Product identifier (ePID)) can’t be updated.

### How often should I check for compatibility updates?

We suggest checking for updates monthly or every time you add new listings. Alternatively, you can set your preferences for Automatic Fitment Coverage and we’ll make sure your listings have updated fitment.

### Can I use Fitment Plus to only add new compatibility, or will it replace all of my current data?

You can select whether you want to add  new compatibility to new listings or replace all existing compatibility in all listings.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=aaca5e73-e18e-955d-c006-42a3c824c17e&ctx_pageTitle=Fitment+Plus+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

Flip your sneakers
==================

Everything you need to know for fast, hassle-free selling.

![Three pairs of sneakers against a dark blue background](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/05/selling_sneakers_1440x992.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Master your selling skills
--------------------------

### Low fees

Lowest fees in the game for authenticated sneakers.

[Learn more](https://pages.ebay.com/sneakersfeechart/)

### Sell with confidence

Authenticity Guarantee ensures physical authentication and verified returns at no cost to you.

[Learn more](https://pages.ebay.com/authenticity-guarantee-sneakers/)

### We have the buyers

A sneaker is sold on eBay every 5 seconds. We have the buyers for you.

Create a winning listing
------------------------

### Learn to list like a pro

#### Nail the basics

  

Learn how to write click-worthy titles, take stand-out photos, and price your items right. 

  

[Listing best practices](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/listing-best-practices)

, setting up discounts, and sending offers.

  

[Make the sale](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/promotion-strategies)

### Optimize your sneakers listing with these photo angles

*   Use up to 12 of your best photos
*   Only show items buyer will receive
*   Show all defects and flaws

![A person uses their cell phone to take a picture of a pair of sneakers](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/02/get-the-right-shot_sneakers.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Free shipping for Authenticity Guarantee-eligible sneakers with FedEx®
----------------------------------------------------------------------

We’re partnering with FedEx® to make shipping Authenticity Guarantee-eligible sneakers easy for you. Beginning in October, upon sale, we’ll provide you with a FedEx shipping label at no cost to ship your [Authenticity Guarantee](https://pages.ebay.com/authenticity-guarantee-sneakers/)
\-eligible sneakers to an authentication center.

You can access these free labels via [eBay Labels](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/shipping-on-ebay/ebay-labels)
 for both new and revised listings once your item sells, print the labels and apply to your package to ship to authentication center. FedEx offers thousands of convenient drop off locations to hand over the shipments.  Additionally, we’ll also protect you against loss and damages if anything goes wrong during the first leg of shipping to the authenticator.

Don’t have access to a printer? You can request a QR code right from eBay Labels on the desktop or app, and eBay will automatically email a QR code to you. You can bring this QR code to participating [FedEx drop off location](https://local.fedex.com/en/ebayqrlabels)
 which support QR codes, to have the staff at the location  scan the code and print the shipping label for you. Note: make sure you ship from a FedEx location that can print your QR code. You can also print your FedEx label from home, desktop, or from the eBay app.

To take advantage of the new FedEx service for Authenticity Guarantee-eligible sneakers, you’ll need to meet our new handling time requirement of 3 business days or less.

eBay and FedEx® partnership FAQs
--------------------------------

### How does eBay’s partnership with FedEx® benefit me?

Beginning in October, upon sale, we’ll provide you with a FedEx shipping label via [eBay Labels](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/shipping-on-ebay/ebay-labels)
 at no cost to ship your [Authenticity Guarantee](https://pages.ebay.com/authenticity-guarantee-sneakers/)
\-eligible sneakers to an authentication center. We’ll also protect you against loss and damages if anything goes wrong during the first leg of shipping to the authenticator.

### Are buyers protected if something goes wrong during shipping from the authenticator?

Yes. Buyers are still protected by [eBay Money Back Guarantee](https://pages.ebay.com/ebay-money-back-guarantee/)
. In the unlikely event that a buyer does not receive their sneakers from the authentication center, we’ll refund the item’s purchase price plus original shipping on eligible purchases.

### Why does eBay require 3-day handling time for shipping to the authentication center?

We introduced the 3-day handling requirement to remove the guesswork from shipping so that buyers will know exactly when they’ll receive their sneakers. In addition, the 3-day handling time requirement now aligns with handling times for all Authenticity Guarantee-eligible sneakers, which means sneakers will arrive at our authenticators faster, and buyers will receive their orders faster, too.

### I am ready to ship with my free label, what’s next?

If using a QR code, ensure you find a location which can [print your QR code here](https://local.fedex.com/en/ebayqrlabels)
. FedEx offers over 2,000 convenient [drop off locations](https://local.fedex.com/en-us)
 across the country. If you have an existing FedEx account, you can also [schedule a pickup](https://www.fedex.com/en-us/shipping/schedule-manage-pickups/how-to.html)
.

Shipping and packaging
----------------------

### Make it an easy process

When shipping Authenticity Guarantee-eligible sneakers, receive a free eBay shipping label via FedEx by using eBay Labels to ship your items to our authentication facility. Proper shipping ensures a smooth authentication process.

*   Pack the shoebox and the packing slip in a larger box and line the sides with bubble wrap to avoid shifting in transit.
*   Ensure that all relevant information is on your shipping label. If you use eBay Labels, everything—including the unique code that allows the authenticator to process orders smoothly—is included. If you create your own shipping labels, be sure to include the code on the third line as shown in the example.
*   Only include items in the original listing as sold, no extra merchandise.

![Sample label for sneakers](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/11/sneakers-label-1200x1200.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

### How the authentication facility ships and packs

1.  The authentication team receives the sneakers and any collateral materials, including but not limited to box and papers, and confirms that the item is consistent with the listing title, description, and images.
2.  The authentication team performs a multi-point physical authentication inspection.
3.  A security tag is attached to the left sneaker and is then carefully packaged with eBay branded boxes, and a unique NFC-enabled authentication card filled with detailed information about the item.
4.  The sneaker is shipped to the buyer via a secure and tracked service within 3 days or less.

Give and get support
--------------------

### eBay supports you even when the transaction is complete

  

|     |     |     |
| --- | --- | --- |
| ✔  [Seller help](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/selling-tools/seller-help?id=4996)<br>  ➔ | ⟳  [Returns](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/managing-returns-refunds/manage-returns-missing-items-refunds-sellers?id=4079)<br>  ➔ | ☏  [Customer service tips](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/selling/customer-service-tips)<br>  ➔ |

### Authenticity Guarantee returns and protections

*   In the case of a return, we confirm you get back what you sent out.
*   Items are inspected before they get back to you.
*   If something happens that is out of your control, we stand behind you.
*   Money Back Guarantee is also offered on final sales that are not Authenticity Guarantee orders.

[Learn more](https://pages.ebay.com/authenticity-guarantee-sneakers-seller/)

Sell with total confidence
--------------------------

With Authenticity Guarantee, eBay has your back every step of the way.

[Learn more](https://pages.ebay.com/authenticity-guarantee-sneakers-seller/)

![A person with gloved hands measures the back of a pair of sneakers](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/02/sell_confidence_sneakers.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=771bf63d-ee98-49d5-a0c3-6c5eb543d068&ctx_pageTitle=Selling+sneakers+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Team access | Seller Center

Team Access
===========

Run your business more efficiently by giving team members permission to handle all day-to-day tasks in your account.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/11/hero_container_mobile_image_750x832.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/11/hero_container_desktop_right_image_module1_1488x1000.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

On this page

*   [What is Team Access?](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/team-access#what-is-team-access-)
    
*   [Benefits](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/team-access#benefits)
    
*   [How does Team Access work?](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/team-access#how-does-team-access-work-)
    
*   [How can I start using Team Access?](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/team-access#how-can-i-start-using-team-access-)
    
*   [Control your team’s access](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/team-access#control-your-team-s-access)
    
*   [Managing your team's invitations and permissions](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/team-access#managing-your-team-s-invitations-and-permissions)
    
*   [FAQs](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/team-access#f-a-qs)
    

What is Team Access?
--------------------

Benefits
--------

Team Access helps you work more efficiently by allowing you to give team members access to your eBay account and carry out tasks on your behalf in Seller Hub. 

Your login credentials and other private information remain secure and won’t be shared with any team members you invite through Team Access.

*   Get more done by letting others take on specific tasks for you
*   Share key tasks while keeping your password and critical business information secure
*   Depending on their permissions, authorized users can also reach out to customer support on your behalf to resolve any issues  
    

Learn more about this feature in the [Team Access FAQ](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/team-access#faqs)
.

How does Team Access work?
--------------------------

Team Access lets account owners invite others to perform specific tasks in Seller Hub using their own eBay accounts. Each invite includes defined permissions, which determine what actions team members can take once they accept the invitation.

Owners and team members can manage permissions and invitations anytime from the Team Access dashboard in My eBay Account Settings.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/11/text_and_media_card_left_image_module4_1200x720.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

How can I start using Team Access?
----------------------------------

With Team Access, you can grant permissions, send invites and manage team members from the Team Access dashboard. 

To find your dashboard, account owners must [opt in to Seller Hub](https://www.ebay.com/sh)
 to allow another team member access to their account. Then, you can grant permission for them to act on your behalf. 

Go to **My eBay** \> **Summary** \> **Account** and click **Team Access** under **Account Preferences** to invite individuals and give them the access they need.

1.  Enter their name and email address. You can also send this person an optional message that’ll be included with their invitation. 
2.  After you select the access and permissions you want to grant, click “Send invite.” 
3.  The person can then accept the invite and have access to perform the tasks you’ve chosen for them in your Seller Hub.

If the person you wish to grant access to doesn’t have an eBay account, they’ll need to [create an account](https://www.ebay.com/help/account/signing-ebay-account/signing-ebay-account?id=4191)
 first using the same email address you’ve sent the invitation to.

Once signed in, the team member will have access to the account owner’s Seller Hub to perform the functions granted to them. They won’t have access to any other parts of the account owner’s Seller Hub or account.

Control your team’s access
--------------------------

When inviting a team member, you can hand-pick the permissions they’ll have, allowing them to carry out tasks you’ve chosen while restricting certain parts of the account. 

Team members can only see the specific sections of Seller Hub you’ve assigned them access to via permissions. They’ll never have access to personal, business or bank information, or to account administration or advanced settings.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/11/text_and_media_card_right_image_module6_1200x720-2.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

You can grant any of the following permissions: 

**Listings**

*   Post and manage listings
*   Create draft listings

**Orders**

*   Manage refunds, requests and disputes
*   Download order reports
*   Print shipping labels
*   Add shipping tracking
*   View orders

**Messaging**

*   Manage messages

**Marketing and advertising**

*   Create and manage discounts
*   Create and manage ad campaigns

**Research**

*   Research items, including pricing and sales trends

Rest assured, your password and other personal details on your account are secure and won’t be shared with the accounts you invite through Team Access.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/11/text_and_media_card_left_image_module7_1200x1200.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Managing your team's invitations and permissions
------------------------------------------------

You can manage your Team Access [account invitations and permissions](http://ebay.com/actexp/acctaccess?to=splash)
 from the **Account Preferences** page in My eBay.

From this dashboard you can do the following:

*   View a list of all active and inactive team members, as well as accounts you’ve sent invitations to
*   Manage invitations and team members
*   Easily change or remove access and permissions for individual team members

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/12/text_and_media_card_right_image_module8_1200x720-1.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

FAQs
----

### Who can give access to other users to carry out tasks in their account?

Sellers who have opted into Seller Hub can use Team Access, as account owners, to give access to other users to perform functions on their behalf.

### Who can be a team member?

Anyone with an eBay account that has enabled two-factor authentication can be a team member.

### How many team members can an account owner invite?

There’s no limit to the number of team members that can act on behalf of an account. We recommend adding no more than 10 authorized users to your account to ensure a manageable process.

### How many teams can I be on?

There’s no limit to the number of teams that you can join as a member. 

### As an account owner, what if the person I want to invite to act on my behalf does not have an eBay account?

People who are invited to join a team need to have an eBay account. If someone you’re inviting to your team needs to create an eBay account, make sure they create it using the same email address you send the invitation to.

### What parts of the eBay site work with Team Access?

Your team members can only act on your behalf in your Seller Hub. Which parts of the Hub they can access depends on what permissions you’ve granted them. 

### How do I switch accounts as a team member?

If you need to switch to another account as a team member, you can do so from the Team Access dashboard. Just find the account you want to access and select Access account. Once you’ve accessed the team account, you can also select Switch account in the blue banner across the top of the page in Seller Hub. Learn more about switching accounts with Team Access.

### As an authorized user, can I contact eBay customer support?

Yes. If you call customer support, please let the representative know that you are using the Team Access feature and which account you are acting on behalf of.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=081af668-2528-4e88-8761-c2f5366de698&ctx_pageTitle=Team+access+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

---

# eBay Refurbished Program | Seller Center

eBay Refurbished Program
========================

How to qualify for the eBay Refurbished Program

On this page

*   [What is eBay Refurbished inventory?](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/ebay-refurbished-program#what-is-e-bay-refurbished-inventory-)
    
*   [Program benefits](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/ebay-refurbished-program#program-benefits)
    
*   [How it works](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/ebay-refurbished-program#how-it-works)
    
*   [Want to check if your items are eligible?](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/ebay-refurbished-program#want-to-check-if-your-items-are-eligible-)
    
*   [Apply now](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/ebay-refurbished-program#apply-now)
    
*   [eBay Refurbished program FAQs](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/ebay-refurbished-program#e-bay-refurbished-program-f-a-qs)
    

What is eBay Refurbished inventory?
-----------------------------------

eBay is the go-to destination for buying and selling refurbished inventory. Buyers can shop with confidence on eBay knowing they can find fully functional refurbished products in Certified, Excellent, Very Good, and Good conditions at great prices. Matching inventory with the accurate condition descriptions helps give customers the confidence they need in the quality of the items they are buying, with the goal of decreasing returns and improving sales.  

In order to sell refurbished items on eBay, sellers must qualify and meet a list of condition requirements and have a minimum 30-day return window plus free shipping.

Program benefits
----------------

1

### Minimize “item not as described” returns

2

### Improve the visibility of eligible items

3

### Warranty included with every product.

eBay has partnered with SquareTrade, an Allstate company, to include a one or two-year warranty with every eBay Refurbished product. Buyers should file claims directly with Allstate.

[Learn more](https://pages.ebay.com/refurbishedprogramwarranty/)

How it works
------------

![Thumbnail of eBay Refurbished Program video](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/04/ebay-refurbished-program-2400x992.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

eBay Refurbished (Certified, Excellent, Very Good, Good) condition eligibility
------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Pre-defined grading criteria ensures consistency across the inventory available to buyers and gives them confidence and simplicity in understanding the breadth of our refurbished products.

In order to sell under the eBay Refurbished program conditions (Certified, Excellent, Very Good, Good), your account must meet specific standards including but not limited to:

**Account status:** eBay Top Rated Seller

**Positive feedback:** At least 98%

**Item not as described rate:** Less than 4%

**Items not received rate:** Less than 1%

Additionally, you must be in [good standing](https://www.ebay.com/help/policies/selling-policies/seller-performance-policy?id=4347)
 with eBay. For the Certified Refurbished condition you will need to submit a purchase order or letter of authorization from your manufacturer partners.

**Quality:** Items must be fully functional, tested and refurbished to a high standard. Once accepted in the program, items will be graded according to criteria by eBay.

Want to check if your items are eligible?
-----------------------------------------

[Download the full list of categories](https://ir.ebaystatic.com/cr/v/c01/US%20All%20Refurbished%20Categories.xlsx)
[Learn more about refurbished grading criteria](https://ir.ebaystatic.com/cr/v/c01/Refurb_Grading_Criteria_Q2-2025_05.23.24_US.pdf)

Apply now
---------

If you are a current eBay seller with a Business account and believe your inventory qualifies, you can submit a streamlined [Program Application](https://www.ebay.com/slronb/pages/apply)
 to be vetted.

If you are a new eBay seller with a Business account and believe your inventory qualifies, you can [submit a Program Application](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellerrefurbish.us)
 for review and a team member will respond within 30 days.

eBay Refurbished program FAQs
-----------------------------

### Can I still call my items “refurbished” if they aren’t “eBay Refurbished”?

If you are not eligible to list your items as Certified Refurbished, Excellent Refurbished, Very Good Refurbished, or Good Refurbished, you will need to list them as “Used.” To check eligibility and see full list of launched categories apply [here](https://www.ebay.com/slronb/pages/apply)
.

### I’m an eBay Top Rated seller. Why do I need to be both in good standing and have average or better service level metrics to meet eBay Refurbished program requirements?

In order to ensure that an item sold as “eBay Refurbished” meets a consistent standard of buyer expectations, we’re using both the seller standing and average or better service level metrics for all sellers in this program.

### Is there an exemption from VeRO warnings for certified refurbished listings?

At this time, we don't have an automatic exemption or review of VeRO permissions. It is possible that authorized sellers may be mistakenly contacted by a brand to cease and desist listing until they demonstrate evidence of reseller status.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/verified-rights-owner-program)

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=db87e93d-a697-770a-a17f-7607aaf534cd&ctx_pageTitle=eBay+Refurbished+Program+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Selling clothes | Seller Center

Cash in on your closet
======================

It’s ridiculously easy to sell your clothes on eBay. From tips on how to create the perfect listing to what to do after you've made the sale, it’s all here. You’ll be turning your threads into cash in no time.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/07/hero_q3_us_fashion-seller-center_selling-page_1440x992.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

What makes the perfect listing?
-------------------------------

  
**✓** A descriptive title  
  
**✓** Thorough item specifics and an accurate description  
  
**✓** Multiple high-quality, helpful photos  
  
**✓** The right price  
  

Read on to find out how to master all of these.  

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/09/perfectlisting_q3_us_fashion-seller-center_selling-page_1200x720_v2.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

List like a pro
---------------

1\. Write a click-worthy title

2\. Use recommended item specifics

3\. Describe the item well

*   Use relevant keywords to say what the item is, including details like the brand, product type, and other attributes such as color, size, and material.
*   Arrange this information in a readable, logical order. 
*   Avoid: acronyms that buyers may not understand, writing in all caps, and characters like asterisks (unless they’re part of your product’s name).   
    

  
Here’s an example of a perfect listing title:

‘_Lululemon Mens Cashmere V-Neck Sweater Medium Blue Long Sleeve Size M_.’

Take your best shot
-------------------

Photos can make or break a sale. Here’s how to get it right:  
  
**✓**   **Place your item on a solid-colored background.** Use a white or light-colored background for darker clothes, and a black or dark background for lighter clothes. 

  
**✓**   **Lighting is your best friend.** Ensure your photos are well-lit, and use natural lighting where possible. 

  
**✓**   **Show every angle of your clothing.** Think about what a customer might examine closely when looking at clothes in a store, and include pictures of it. For example, a listing for a shirt should include a photo of the front, back, labels and any close-ups or unique features such as embroidery. 

  
[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/photo-tips)
 about how to take great photos.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/09/bestshot_q3_us_fashion-seller-center_selling-page_1200x1200_v2.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/07/item01_q3_us_fashion-seller-center_selling-page_1200x900.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

#### Front

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/07/item02_q3_us_fashion-seller-center_selling-page_1200x900.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

#### Back

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/07/item03_q3_us_fashion-seller-center_selling-page_1200x900.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

#### Sleeve

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/07/item05_q3_us_fashion-seller-center_selling-page_1200x900.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

#### Collar

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/07/item04_q3_us_fashion-seller-center_selling-page_1200x900.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

#### Front buttons

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/08/item06_q3_us_fashion-seller-center_selling-page_1200x900_r2.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

#### Back buttons

Price it right
--------------

Not sure where to start?   

*   Search eBay for clothes that match or are similar to yours. This will give you a sense of the current prices and how popular they are on eBay, and help you set reasonable expectations of how much you might get.  
    
*   Use our [research tools](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-research-tools)
     to see what similar items sold for 7 days ago up to the last 3 years.  
    
*   Use our [shipping calculator](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/preparing-your-shipment)
     to offer competitive prices, and [learn about the advantages](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/shipping-items/shipping-rates-sellers?id=4087)
     of different shipping types for your buyers.

Raise the bar with marketing tools
----------------------------------

Once you’ve listed your items, try these out to help increase your visibility:  

*   [eBay Advertising](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-advertising)
    
*   [Seller Hub Discounts](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/seller-hub-discounts)
    
*   [Offers to Buyers](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/seller-hub-discounts/offers-to-buyers-best-offer)
    
*   [Store features](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2022-fall/listing)
      
    

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/08/ready_q3_us_fashion-seller-center_selling-page_1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Follow this post-sale checklist
-------------------------------

### Congratulations, your item has sold! Here’s what to do now:

1.  **Leave feedback for the buyer.** When the payment has cleared, be sure to leave positive feedback for the buyer, which is an important part of good customer service.
    
2.  **Package your item.** The majority of clothes can be shipped in a lightweight, waterproof envelope. If you have any items with fragile components such as large buttons, wrap them in one or two layers of bubble wrap and then use a box or padded envelope that’s slightly larger than the item you sold. 
    
3.  **Select your postage label.** The best way to do this is to use eBay Labels which can help save time and money. It’s also a great option if you don’t have a printer, since you can generate a QR code which is emailed to you. You can then use the self-service station when dropping off your package with a participating carrier, to scan the code and print the label, or ask an associate to do it.
4.  **Send out your item.** Take the package to your post office or chosen mail carrier as soon as you can. Shipping things out on time helps to keep buyers satisfied and your seller rating high. Once you’ve done this, upload your tracking number so the buyer is notified that you’ve shipped the item.
    

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/07/postsale_q3_us_fashion-seller-center_selling-page_1200x1200.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Ready to go?
------------

Now you've learned how to create the perfect listing, it's time to start making money on eBay.  
  

[Start selling](https://www.ebay.com/sl/sell)

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=f7c1d37e-4ec7-4baf-8ed9-261761e50f01&ctx_pageTitle=Selling+clothes+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# eBay price guarantee | Seller Center

eBay price guarantee
====================

Get guaranteed pricing on eligible items.

On this page

*   [What is eBay’s price guarantee?](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/ebay-price-guarantee#what-is-e-bay-s-price-guarantee-)
    
*   [What qualifies for eBay’s price guarantee?](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/ebay-price-guarantee#what-qualifies-for-e-bay-s-price-guarantee-)
    

What is eBay’s price guarantee?
-------------------------------

eBay’s price guarantee helps you get top dollar for your items while keeping your price competitive. If you choose the guaranteed pricing option and your item sells for less than the listing price, eBay will send you a coupon for the difference.

Here’s how it works:

1.  Start a listing for your item and eBay will automatically determine if it qualifies for the eBay price guarantee. You’ll see its market range based on similar items sold on eBay within the last 90 days.  
    
2.  If it qualifies, follow our pricing guidance and list your item for sale. There will be a guaranteed pricing option when creating a new listing.  
    
3.  If it sells for less, you’ll receive an eBay coupon for the difference.

![Screenshot of listing options with "Guaranteed pricing" option present and selected](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/01/ebay_price_guarantee_1_1200x900.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

**If your item qualifies**, you’ll see a guaranteed pricing option like this

![Screenshot of listings options without "Guaranteed pricing" options. "Best chance of selling" is selected.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/01/ebay_price_guarantee_2_1200x900.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

**If your item doesn’t qualify** after you enter your item’s details, you’ll simply see the usual listing options, like this

What qualifies for eBay’s price guarantee?
------------------------------------------

eBay offers a price guarantee on guitars and many tech items, including smartphones, tablets, Apple laptops, smart watches, and video game consoles.\* Products that qualify for the guarantee change over time, and our listing price recommendation is based on the performance of similar items recently sold on eBay. This is the minimum amount you can expect, though your item could sell for more.  

\*Categories are subject to change at any time.

### Ready to list a guaranteed item?

[Get started](http://www.ebay.com/sl/sell)

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=37a226b2-faef-d990-adb8-f38a4ea623fc&ctx_pageTitle=eBay+price+guarantee+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

The eBay Stores Shopping Experience
===================================

Showcase your products and build your brand.

Do more with your Store
-----------------------

You have more Store features than ever to help boost your business and tell your story.

From connecting with buyers to driving more traffic to your listings, see how setting up your Store can help you save time and grow your business.

What’s on your storefront?
--------------------------

With a responsive design that looks great on any device—including the eBay app—there’s even more ways for you to show buyers what you have to offer.

Tell your story with your billboard image, logo, and About tab; and show what you offer with visual categories, featured items, and customizable marketing banners.

  

![](https://ir.ebaystatic.com/cr/v/c01/set-up-your-store-edit.jpg)

1.  Your billboard image could be your brand’s hero image or a seasonal banner.
2.  Add your company logo.
3.  Tell your story to buyers in the new About tab.
4.  Choose either eBay’s categories or create your own.
5.  Buyers can use the search bar to search your inventory.
6.  Select your featured listings for the front page.

[Set up your storefront now](https://www.ebay.com/sh/str/edit)

Share to social

Make it yours

Showcase top items

​Build your customer base

# Seller uploaded videos | Seller Center

Upload videos to your listings
==============================

Inspire, educate, and help make the sale with videos on your listings.

On this page

*   [Bring your listings to life with videos](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/seller-uploaded-videos#bring-your-listings-to-life-with-videos)
    
*   [Benefits of adding videos to your listings](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/seller-uploaded-videos#benefits-of-adding-videos-to-your-listings)
    
*   [Get the most out of your videos](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/seller-uploaded-videos#get-the-most-out-of-your-videos)
    

Bring your listings to life with videos
---------------------------------------

When you’ve got a lot to say about your products, text and images don’t always cut it. With videos on your listings, you can bring your products to life and capture what images can’t.

Buyers can see your videos on the View Item page of the eBay app. Videos appear right after the first image in your gallery, and give you a new way to captivate, inspire, and help close the sale.

  

![A seller-uploaded video visible at the top of a listing on a mobile device. ](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/02/seller-video-mobile.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Benefits of adding videos to your listings
------------------------------------------

Videos can act as your 24/7 salesperson, engaging with potential buyers, answering their most common questions, and showcasing your products. 

*   Stand out from the competition with compelling video content
    
*   Deliver a more engaging shopping experience to current and new buyers
    
*   Help prevent common buyer issues and returns
    
*   Give buyers confidence in the condition and quality of your products
    

Get the most out of your videos
-------------------------------

You can only add one video to a listing, so it’s important to choose the right content to make your video count.

There’s no one-size-fits-all approach. The right kind of video depends on what you’re listing and what resonates with your buyers. Consider common questions, pain points, or reasons your buyers might hesitate, and use videos to: 

### Let your products speak for themselves

Use videos to capture features, unique characteristics, or different functions. You can show in detail what your product can do, capture full 360 degree views, and demonstrate different versions, colors, or sizes. 

### Answer buyers’ most common questions

Videos are the perfect format to provide instructions and installation guides, demonstrate fit and sizing, or explain any defects or damages. When you show what to expect up front you’re more likely to have happy customers and fewer returns.

### Share the vision behind your products

Your listings are more than just products. They’re solutions to common problems, inspiration for creative pursuits, or tools to finish that DIY project. Use videos to inspire by showing how your items become part of—and improve—peoples’ lives and projects. 

### Build trust in your products and brand

Videos let you show what goes on behind the scenes to create or source top quality products. Demonstrate your refurbishment process, showcase your products’ authenticity, or highlight the quality of the materials you use. 

### Tell the story behind your product

Sometimes it’s the story behind a product that makes the sale. Use videos to tell the story, and help potential buyers connect with you and your products.

  

Ready to make your listings stand out with videos?

[Learn how](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/listings/creating-managing-listings/add-video-to-listing?id=5272)

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=d313aee7-512b-f29e-c17c-c5cc4ab1f2d5&ctx_pageTitle=Seller+uploaded+videos+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Product identifiers | Seller Center

Product identifiers
===================

Increase the chances of a buyer finding your item with product identifiers.

On this page

*   [What are product identifiers?](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/product-identifiers#what-are-product-identifiers-)
    
*   [When to use product identifiers](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/product-identifiers#when-to-use-product-identifiers)
    
*   [Benefits of product identifiers](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/product-identifiers#benefits-of-product-identifiers)
    
*   [If you already have live listings without product identifiers](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/product-identifiers#if-you-already-have-live-listings-without-product-identifiers)
    

What are product identifiers?
-----------------------------

Product identifiers are unique codes created by the product manufacturer that can be used to identify a specific product. They work like barcodes and may include Universal Product Codes (UPCs), Stock Keeping Units (SKUs), International Standard Book Numbers (ISBNs), and Manufacturer Part Number (MPN). The type of product identifier you use can vary depending on the category you’re selling in.

Using a product identifier can save you time when creating listings. When you enter the product identifier, eBay will suggest a match if your product already exists in the eBay catalog. If there’s a match, many of the fields such as photo and title will be pre-populated.

![Quick Tips for Sellers by eBay: Product Identifiers video thumbnail](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/04/Quick_Tips_for_Sellers_by_eBay_Product_Identifiers.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

When to use product identifiers
-------------------------------

Product identifiers are required when you’re listing in most categories on eBay. Only use product identifiers that exactly match the product you’re selling. If you select a product that’s slightly different, such as a model from a different year or with different specifications, you risk misleading buyers. When you use the correct catalogue entry, it could help reduce the number of return requests because people can be sure what they’re buying.

If there aren’t any matches in the catalog, you can select a category and create your listing manually.

Not every product has a product identifier. If you are listing a product that has no identifier (such as antiques) or you aren’t sure what it is, then you can simply select “Does not apply”. Find the entire list of qualifying and required categories [here](https://pages.ebay.com/sell/item_specifics/product_identifiers.html)
.

Benefits of product identifiers
-------------------------------

The biggest benefit of adding product identifiers to your listings is that it increases the chances of a buyer finding your item. Product identifiers give buyers a way to easily find and compare what's available while knowing your product is exactly what they’re looking for.

If you already have live listings without product identifiers
-------------------------------------------------------------

If you selected “Does not apply” or didn’t have the product identifier handy when you created your listing, it’s well worth spending the time to go back and fill in any product identifiers. This is the best way to future proof your eBay listings.  

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=4d403823-a140-13d4-ba16-b75517a7273a&ctx_pageTitle=Product+identifiers+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

---

# eBay bulk listing tools | Seller Center

eBay bulk listing tools
=======================

Upload inventory and manage your listings more efficiently with eBay’s bulk listing tools. The right listing and editing tools depend on the size of your business, as well as the number and format of listings you have.

On this page

*   [Upload your listings](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/ebay-bulk-listing-tools#upload-your-listings)
    
*   [Manage your listings](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/ebay-bulk-listing-tools#manage-your-listings)
    
*   [Tips for bulk editing your listings](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/ebay-bulk-listing-tools#tips-for-bulk-editing-your-listings)
    
*   [Third-party editing tools](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/ebay-bulk-listing-tools#third-party-editing-tools)
    
*   [FAQs](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/ebay-bulk-listing-tools#f-a-qs)
    

Upload your listings
--------------------

#### Seller Hub Reports

Seller Hub Reports, formerly known as eBay File Exchange, lets you upload and manage your inventory easily and efficiently in CSV or XLS files. This can be accessed on the eBay platform, via Seller Hub. Learn more about how to use [Seller Hub Reports](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/selling-tools/file-exchange?id=4096)
.  

  

**Inventory volume:** High

**Technical difficulty:** Intermediate

  

[Try Seller Hub Reports now](https://www.ebay.com/sh/reports)

#### Merchant Integration Platform

Merchant Integration Platform is a feed-based platform that lets you upload your inventory in bulk, then quickly and efficiently create listings and manage orders.  If you are familiar with feed files used with other marketplaces, such as Amazon or Google Shopping, you can start selling on eBay right away with MIP’s standard CSV and XML feed formats. The max feed file size supported is 25 MB. If it’s larger than that then it’s advised to split into multiple files.  

  

**Inventory volume:** High

**Technical difficulty:** Advanced

  

[Get details on Merchant Integration Platform](https://go.developer.ebay.com/merchant-integration-platform)

#### Inventory API

eBay Inventory API is a RESTful API that offers a retail standard solution for eBay sellers to manage their inventory and create listings using SKUs. The API enables sellers to create and manage inventory item records, track inventory levels, and convert these inventory items into listings on eBay.  

  

With the Inventory API, sellers can streamline their inventory management workflows and optimize their listings to improve their sales performance on eBay. The API provides a range of resources, such as the Inventory Location Entity, Offer Entity, and Metadata Entity, to support various aspects of inventory management and product listing creation.  

  

**Inventory volume:** High

**Technical difficulty:** Advanced

  

[Get details on Inventory API](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/sell/inventory/static/overview.html)

#### Sell Feed API

The eBay Sell Feed API enables the bulk listing of products that are processed asynchronously by eBay. The user creates an upload task for each feed type, then uploads the bulk listing file to eBay, and once eBay processes the file, the user can download the result file to see if the feed file was processed successfully. There are feed types to add, revise, relist, and end listings.  

  

The Sell Feed API also has the capability of downloading an Active Inventory Report that gives a seller price, quantity, and other details about all active listings.  

  

**Inventory volume:** High

**Technical difficulty:** Advanced

  

[Get details on Sell Feed API](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/sell/feed/overview.html)

#### The Trading API

eBay’s Trading API enables large sellers and 3rd party platforms  to integrate seamlessly with the eBay marketplace. Among other capabilities, the Trading API allows users to add, revise, relist, or end eBay listings.  

  

**Inventory volume:** High

**Technical difficulty:** Advanced

  

[Get details on Trading API](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/XML/docs/Reference/eBay/StandardListingIndex.html)

Manage your listings
--------------------

#### Bulk Listing Tool

If you list many items on eBay, you can save time and effort by using our bulk listing tool. You can perform multiple updates at once to save time refreshing your listings. Use the bulk listing tool to create, relist or revise multiple listings at once. This can be accessed on the eBay platform, via Seller Hub.

**Inventory volume:** Medium  
**Technical difficulty:** Easy  

  

[Try the Bulk Listing Tool now](https://www.ebay.com/bulksell?actionType=CREATE_MULTIPLE_LISTING&ru=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.ebay.com%2Fsellercenter%2Flistings%2Febay-bulk-listing-tools)

Tips for bulk editing your listings
-----------------------------------

Having trouble when you try to bulk edit your listings? Try these tips:

1.  **Start simple.** Read the error or alert message to see which listings aren’t working. Submit the listings that are working, then go back to correct the error on the remaining ones.
    
2.  **Double check.** Are you trying to edit a field such as listing format, which can’t be changed? Trying to edit an auction listing within 12 hours of auction end? Have outstanding Best Offers on a listing? These are some of the most common errors in bulk editing. Learn more about [what you can and can’t edit (and when)](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/listings/revising-listing?id=4356)
    .
    
3.  **Compliance with eBay changes.** If you’re editing an older Good 'Til Cancelled listing, that listing may not be fully in compliance with more recent changes to eBay policies. A common problem is listings that mention check or money order as payment methods, though these are no longer accepted. Edit the listing to bring it into compliance with new requirements. Read more about the latest changes in the Seller Center.
    
4.  **Narrow it down.** Try cutting down the number of fields or listings you are trying to edit at once, which will help you find what’s causing the problem.
    
5.  **Ask for help.** Have you checked out [eBay discussion boards](https://community.ebay.com/)
    ? There are boards for most eBay-owned tools, where you can search for answers to questions from people who’ve faced the same dilemmas as you or ask your own question. Third-party tools often host their own boards as well. You can also [contact eBay](https://contact.ebay.com/ws/eBayISAPI.dll?ContactUsNextGen)
     for assistance with eBay-owned tools. For assistance with third-party tools, please contact the third-party developer directly.

Third-party editing tools
-------------------------

Need to manage and edit more than 500 listings? You have access to third-party editing tools that can handle thousands of listings at a time. See what’s available on our [Apps Center](https://applications.ebay.com/selling?EAppsByCategory&sType=2&cId=7)
. Please note there may be costs associated with these solutions.

FAQs
----

### What is the Seller Hub Reports tool and what does it allow you to do?

Seller Hub Reports allows you to upload and download data from eBay in CSV and XLS format to manage listings, download orders, and provide fulfillment information. You can access the new Reports tab in Seller Hub.

It can also be accessed programmatically with the same file feeds, through the [Feeds API](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/buy/feed/static/overview.html)
, using [eBay OAuth](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/static/oauth-tokens.html)
.  

### What can I do with a Report?

A report allows you to import data about sales to a bookkeeping program or manual audits to see the status and performance of your business. These are not meant to be uploaded. These reports do not contain data about returns or refunds.

### How far back can Seller Hub Reports download data?

Seller Hub Reports can download data for the last 90 days. To obtain data beyond this timeframe, Sellers would need to request their eBay data by clicking [here](https://www.sarweb.ebay.com/sar)
.  

### What is a template and how can I use it to create a listing?

A template is a file with predefined column headers that is meant to be reuploaded for listing or fulfillment related business activities.

### How do I add formatting into my listing descriptions?

All file formatting needs to be specified via HTML. A free online HTML editor, or an eBay draft listing, can be used to generate the code. For those unfamiliar with HTML, it is recommended to keep things simple to avoid compatibility issues (paragraphs, bullet points, etc.) All HTML editors also have to be free of hard/carriage returns.

### What is the word “Variation” used for in a template?

Also called multi-SKU, it identifies multiple variants of the same single product (such as colors or sizes). [Variation](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/listings/creating-managing-listings/creating-listings-variations?id=4150)
 helps to define products in addition to item specifics.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=4b001c40-c12d-ab03-ae5e-a7f42435a894&ctx_pageTitle=eBay+bulk+listing+tools+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Take great photos | Seller Center

Take great photos
=================

Maximize your chances of getting the sale with these essential photo tips

On this page

*   [Your photos make a big difference](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/photo-tips#your-photos-make-a-big-difference)
    
*   [Photo basics](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/photo-tips#photo-basics)
    
*   [Get your best shot](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/photo-tips#get-your-best-shot)
    
*   [Choose the right background](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/photo-tips#choose-the-right-background)
    

Your photos make a big difference
---------------------------------

### Get found

High quality photos are key to showing up in searches on eBay and external sites like Google Shopping.

### Boost sales

Give buyers confidence to make a purchase by showing them exactly what they’re getting.

### Reduce returns

When your photos show all the details, buyers are more likely to be happy with their purchase.

Photo basics
------------

By following a few simple guidelines, your photos can help you enhance the visibility of your items on and off eBay:

1.  **More is more when it comes to photos.** Add up to 24 to each listing.
2.  **Your first photo appears in search results.** Make it your best shot, with your item centered and fully visible.
3.  **Your items are unique—your photos should be too.** Photograph each item you’re selling individually to capture its unique details.  

![A woman using a mobile device to photograph a pair of tea cups.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/11/photo-basics-photo-tips-page.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Get your best shot
------------------

Make sure your photos don’t appear blurry or pixelated. Images need a minimum resolution of 500 x 500 pixels, but we recommend 1600 x 1600.

*   ![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/12/high_quality_images_final.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)
    
    ### Use high-quality images
    
    Make sure your photos don’t appear blurry or pixelated. Images need a minimum resolution of 500 x 500 pixels, but we recommend at least 1600 x 1600.
    
*   ![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/12/clean_bkg_final.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)
    
    ### Keep your background uncluttered
    
    Photograph your items in an uncluttered space, against a white/neutral background to make them stand out.
    
*   ![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/12/natural_lighting_final.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)
    
    ### Use natural lighting
    
    Take your photos in an area with bright overhead lighting. Avoid using flash or adding filters.
    
*   ![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/12/make_item_focal_point_final02.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)
    
    ### Make your item the focal point
    
    Center your item and fill up the frame as much as possible. For items with multiple variants, only show the variant that’s being sold.
    
*   ![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/12/make_item_focal_point_02_final.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)
    
    ### Avoid graphics or watermarks
    
    Don’t add text, artwork, logos, or watermarks to your photos. It can prevent your images from showing up in third-party search results.
    
*   ![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/12/several_angles_final.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)
    
    ### Capture several angles, including all wear and tear
    
    Show off all sides of the item, including full-view and closeups of textures, tags, labels and other key details. Include closeups of blemishes, damage, or wear.
    

Choose the right background
---------------------------

### No studio backdrop? No problem. Our in-app photo tools give you multiple options to replace your photos’ backgrounds to help your items stand out.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/11/white_bkg_02.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

#### White background

A plain white background is always a safe choice. It lets your item take center stage without any distractions.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/11/studio.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

#### Studio background

Choose from a range of solid colored studio-inspired backgrounds. This might be the best option if your item is a light color that won’t stand out against a white background, or if you want to help your item’s colors pop.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/11/ai_gen_bkg.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

#### AI-generated background image

Choose from a variety of AI-generated scenes. This can help you showcase the environment your item might be used in. Try to only use this option for a few photos, and make sure the background doesn’t distract from your item.

How it works
------------

1.  From the Selling tab in the eBay mobile app, select List an item (or edit an existing one). Then, upload your product photo.
2.  Use the background removal tool to delete the original backdrop, isolating your item.
3.  Browse and select from a variety of colors or AI-generated backgrounds.
4.  Apply your chosen background to create a professional-looking image that highlights your item.
5.  Review your photo and then proceed with the rest of your listing as usual.

  

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=321c86f8-7e08-90fc-9890-b06635f14cb6&ctx_pageTitle=Take+great+photos+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

---

# Perfect smartwatch listing | Seller Center

Create the perfect smartwatch listing
=====================================

Learn how to elevate your search results, build trust, and drive conversion with these listing best practices.

On this page

*   [Create the perfect smartwatch listing](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/perfect-smartwatch-listing#create-the-perfect-smartwatch-listing)
    
*   [Listing best practices](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/perfect-smartwatch-listing#listing-best-practices)
    

Create the perfect smartwatch listing
-------------------------------------

Whether you’re selling New, Used, or Refurbished smartwatches, here are some helpful tips on how to create the perfect listing. These four keys power your smartwatch listings to show up in both eBay and external search results.

1

### Titles

Include relevant details and terms buyers are searching for.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/perfect-smartwatch-listing#titles)

2

### Structured data and item descriptions

Optimize your listings with item specifics, product identifiers and item descriptions.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/perfect-smartwatch-listing#structured-data)

3

### Quality photos

Top 10 tips for creating perfect photos for your listings.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/perfect-smartwatch-listing#quality-photos)

4

### Price

Price your items competitively to drive conversion.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/perfect-smartwatch-listing#price)

**Pro Tip:** Learn how to optimize your search results for [Best Match](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/listings/listing-tips/optimising-listings-best-match?id=4166)
.

Listing best practices
----------------------

### 1\. Titles

The title of your smartwatch listing should reflect relevant details about your device and terms buyers will use to search for it. The ideal title should include the brand, model, case size, network/connectivity and color. Please note that item condition (New, Used, Refurbished) should be included in your item specifics, not the title.

Subtitles, although not required, are an advanced listing feature and a great way to showcase your seller value proposition and increase your click-through rates.

Maintaining your customer base and identifying new opportunities is key to managing and growing your eBay business. Get ahead of the competition by finding out what they’re doing and how they’re doing it.

**Examples of a perfect listing title and subtitle**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| **Title:** | Apple Watch Series 5, 44 mm GPS + Cellular, Space Gray with Black Sport Band |
| **Subtitle:** | Free shipping, Free 30-day returns, Accessories included |

### 2\. Structured data & item descriptions

Optimize your listings with complete and accurate [item specifics](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/item-specifics)
 and [product identifiers](https://pages.ebay.com/sell/item_specifics/product_identifiers.html)
. Item specifics enable us to monitor which elements are most important to buyers and provide guidance when you list (e.g., keywords buyers use in search or how they filter in the left-hand navigation). Product identifiers make it easy for shoppers to find your items on eBay and through external search engines.

*   **Product identifiers.** Most new and manufacturer-refurbished branded items have product identifiers such as brand and codes on their original packaging. These identifiers are the Global Trade Item Number (GTIN), Universal Purchase Code (UPC), and Manufacturer Part Number (MPN).
*   **Item specifics.** Item specifics include brand, internal workings, and physical details about the item you are selling. They appear at the top of your listing description and make it easy for buyers to find relevant information. Following are some of the most relevant item specifics for cell phones and smartphones:

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| **Required item specifics** | **Recommended item specifics**  <br>(Based on buyers’ keywords and search filters) |
| Condition, brand, model, storage capacity, and color | Network, operating system, lock status, connectivity, case material, band material and features |

  

**Pro Tip:** Perfect titles AND item specifics help searchability of your listings.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/product-identifiers)
 about listing with structured data.

#### How to write a winning item description

A great product description will help build trust and drive conversion when buyers visit your page.

Make sure to include detailed product descriptions with brand names, styles, and model numbers. Also include unique qualities, such as modifications that have been made to the device, battery life, and potential flaws.

In addition, your item descriptions can showcase who you are as a seller and foster buyer trust and confidence. Let buyers know you stand behind your listings by showing how long you’ve been in business, any diagnostic tests you’ve run, and customer service you may offer.

#### Listing with variations

When you have many similar items that have different variations, such as bundle offers or regional compatibility, you can create a single fixed price listing that includes all the variations you offer.

Starting February 9, 2022 we will remove all condition and grade-related variants (e.g., “very good,” “good,” “Grade A”, “Grade B”) as custom multi-SKU variant options in the listing flow for Smart Watches.

**Pro Tip:** As a best practice, limit your use of variants to keywords that are not available in item specifics.

### 3\. Quality photos

High-quality pictures build your customers’ confidence. Here are our Top 9 tips on creating the perfect photo for your smartwatch listing:

1.  Use white backgrounds to increase your listings visibility.
2.  Turn off the flash and use soft, diffused lighting.
3.  Keep things steady. Use a tripod.
4.  Take high-resolution photos so your item will look attractive on screens big and small.
5.  Fill the frame with your item.
6.  Photograph your item from all angles, and capture its details and blemishes.
7.  Capture the natural colors of your item. No filters necessary.
8.  Include some detailed close-up shots. This will help set buyer expectations of the cosmetic appearance of your device.
9.  Avoid using props or watermarks. This includes accessories or items that won’t be included with your product.

Check out our [Tips for taking photos that sell](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/photo-tips)
 and read about our [Picture policy](https://www.ebay.com/help/policies/listing-policies/picture-policy?id=4370)
.

### 4\. Price

Competitive pricing is critical to the overall buyer experience and one of the most important factors of driving consideration and conversion for your mobile device. Not sure where to start on pricing? Our pricing guidance, powered by Product Research, is based on similar items sold during the previous 90 days.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-research-tools)
 about pricing guidance with Product Research.

  

These are just four tips on creating the perfect desktop and laptop listings. [Click here](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/listing-best-practices)
 for even more best practices!

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=d29882a5-f9e7-4c03-85a5-fb15170faaa1&ctx_pageTitle=Perfect+smartwatch+listing+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)
