# eBay for Business | Seller Center

eBay for Business
=================

All the inspiration and education you need to launch, grow, and maintain your business.

![Kevin Newsum holding Steamm Espresso box and product.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/10/ebay-for-business-hero-1440x992.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Seller Hub
----------

Seller Hub offers everything you need to build and grow your business on eBay. With it, you have access to a variety of tools that will help you manage your orders, downloaded detailed reports, and more.  

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/seller-hub)

![Woman looking at her phone and laptop at a cafe](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2021/07/get-your-business-started-1200x1200.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Great Price badge
-----------------

A Great Price badge helps eBay shoppers quickly and easily discover high quality inventory at highly competitive prices. When a Great Price badge appears with your qualified listing, your item will get buyers’ attention because they know they’ve found a great product at a great price.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/great-price-badge)

![Young man with glasses and an apron holding a tablet and smiling](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2021/07/15__Using_Promotions_Boost_Your_Sales_1200x1200.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Verified Rights Owner Program
-----------------------------

The Verified Rights Owner (VeRO) Program allows owners of intellectual property (IP) rights and their authorized representatives to report eBay listings that may infringe on those rights. VeRO embodies our commitment to provide a safe place to buy and sell, which respects property owners’ rights.

[See how you’re protected](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/verified-rights-owner-program)

![Woman looking at laptop with one hand on a package and other packages and a rack of clothes behind her](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2021/07/8_GetInLineRetailStandards_1200x1200.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Third party providers
---------------------

Third Party Providers on eBay offer services like inventory management and eCommerce platforms to help you run your eBay business more efficiently. Their services complement the existing functionality on eBay and can be used to unlock more potential for your business.

[Access more resources](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/third-party-providers)

![Woman looking at cellphone with a man beside her looking at an open box](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2021/07/third-party-providers-1200x1200.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

# Promoted Stores | Seller Center

Promote your store
==================

Drive traffic to your store with high visibility ads.

On this page

*   [What is Promoted Stores?](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-advertising/promoted-stores#what-is-promoted-stores-)
    
*   [Key benefits](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-advertising/promoted-stores#key-benefits)
    
*   [Getting started](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-advertising/promoted-stores#getting-started)
    
*   [Best practices](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-advertising/promoted-stores#best-practices)
    

What is Promoted Stores?
------------------------

Promoted Stores is an advertising solution that allows you to easily launch ads in high visibility placements and attract interested buyers to your eBay store. These ads will highlight a coupon or category of items in your store, along with your store's name, logo, and several of your top performing listings. Promoted Stores can help drive traffic to your store and increase the awareness of your brand on eBay.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/06/promoted_stores_1.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Key benefits
------------

1

### Effective targeting

Catch the attention of interested buyers shopping for items like yours with ads in high visibility placements, including above search results.

2

### Build your brand

Reach more buyers with access to unique ad placements.

3

### Simple setup

With a simple flow for campaign creation, you can launch your campaign in just a few clicks.

Getting started
---------------

You can create a Promoted Stores campaign in the Seller Hub from your **Advertising dashboard**. Here's how:

1.  Select **Create new campaign**.
    
2.  Select **Promote your store** from the ad type options.
    
3.  Follow the prompts to set up your campaign. You can choose to highlight a category or a coupon.
    
4.  After reviewing your campaign details, you can then **Launch** your campaign.
    

Best practices
--------------

*   **Customize your store's branding.** Enhance your storefront with a store name, logo, and billboard to establish your brand identity and help build trust with buyers.
*   **Optimize your store.** Create custom or automated inventory strips to feature your top-selling items and most popular categories to capture buyer attention and to help drive sales.
*   **Bid effectively.** Use the suggested bids as a guide when bidding on subcategories and keywords to create competitive campaigns.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/06/promoted_store_2.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Learn more
----------

Visit the eBay Help page to learn more about promoting your store.

[Visit now](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/ebay-advertising/promoted-stores?id=5472)

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=8d90bb14-8d2b-4f96-8894-5dd365e40448&ctx_pageTitle=Promoted+Stores+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Perfect cell phone or smartphone listing | Seller Center

Create the perfect cell phone or smartphone listing
===================================================

Learn how to elevate your search results, build trust, and drive conversion with these listing best practices.

On this page

*   [Create the perfect cell phone and smartphone listing](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/perfect-cell-phone-listing#create-the-perfect-cell-phone-and-smartphone-listing)
    
*   [Listing best practices](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/perfect-cell-phone-listing#listing-best-practices)
    
*   [Diagnostic software to test cell phones](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/perfect-cell-phone-listing#diagnostic-software-to-test-cell-phones)
    

Create the perfect cell phone and smartphone listing
----------------------------------------------------

Whether you’re selling New, Used, or Refurbished cell phones or smartphones, here are some helpful tips on how to create the perfect listing. These four keys power how your cell phone or smartphone listing shows up in both eBay and external search results.

1

### Titles

Include relevant details and terms buyers are searching for.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/perfect-cell-phone-listing#titles)

2

### Structured data and item descriptions

Optimize your listings with item specifics, product identifiers and item descriptions.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/perfect-cell-phone-listing#structured-data)

3

### Quality photos

Top 10 tips for creating perfect photos for your listings.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/perfect-cell-phone-listing#quality-photos)

4

### Price

Price your items competitively to drive conversion.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/perfect-cell-phone-listing#price)

Pro Tip: Learn how to optimize your search results for [Best Match](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/listings/listing-tips/optimising-listings-best-match?id=4166)
.

Listing best practices
----------------------

### 1\. Titles

The title of your cell phone or smartphone listing should reflect relevant details about your device and terms buyers will use to search for it. The ideal title should include the brand, model, memory, color, carrier and grade (if applicable). Please note that item condition (New, Used, Refurbished) should be included in your item specifics, not the title.

Subtitles, although not required, are an advanced listing feature and a great way to showcase your seller value proposition and increase your click-through rates.

Maintaining your customer base and identifying new opportunities is key to managing and growing your eBay business. Get ahead of the competition by finding out what they’re doing and how they’re doing it.

**Examples of a perfect listing title and subtitle**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| **Title:** | Apple iPhone 11 Pro 256GB Midnight Green Carrier Unlocked Grade A |
| **Subtitle:** | Free shipping, Free 30-day returns, Accessories included |

### 2\. Structured data & item descriptions

Optimize your listings with complete and accurate [item specifics](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/item-specifics)
 and [product identifiers](https://pages.ebay.com/sell/item_specifics/product_identifiers.html)
. Item specifics enable us to monitor which elements are most important to buyers and provide guidance when you list (e.g., keywords buyers use in search or how they filter in the left-hand navigation). Product identifiers make it easy for shoppers to find your items on eBay and through external search engines.

*   **Product identifiers.** Most new and manufacturer-refurbished branded items have product identifiers such as brand and codes on their original packaging. These identifiers are the Global Trade Item Number (GTIN), Universal Purchase Code (UPC), and Manufacturer Part Number (MPN).
*   **Item specifics.** Item specifics include brand, internal workings, and physical details about the item you are selling. They appear at the top of your listing description and make it easy for buyers to find relevant information. Following are some of the most relevant item specifics for cell phones and smartphones:

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| **Required item specifics** | **Recommended item specifics**  <br>(Based on buyers’ keywords and search filters |
| Condition, brand, model, storage capacity, and color | Network, camera resolution, screen size, operating system, lock status, processor, connectivity, RAM, SIM card slot, contract, and features |

  

**Pro Tip:** Perfect titles AND item specifics help searchability of your listings.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/product-identifiers)
 about listing with structured data.

#### How to write a winning item description

A great product description will help build trust and drive conversion when buyers visit your page.

Make sure to include detailed product descriptions with brand names, styles, and model numbers. Also include unique qualities, such as modifications that have been made to the device, battery life, and potential flaws.

In addition, your item descriptions can showcase who you are as a seller and foster buyer trust and confidence. Let buyers know you stand behind your listings by showing how long you’ve been in business, any diagnostic tests you’ve run, and customer service you may offer.

#### Listing with variations

When you have many similar items that have different variations, such as bundle offers or regional compatibility, you can create a single fixed price listing that includes all the variations you offer.

Starting August 27, 2021, we will remove all condition and grade-related variants (e.g., “very good,” “good,” “Grade A”, “Grade B”) as custom multi-SKU variant options in the listing flow for Cell Phones and Smartphones. 

**Pro Tip:** As a best practice, limit your use of variants to keywords that are not available in item specifics.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/listings/creating-managing-listings/creating-listings-variations?id=4150)
 about listing with variations.

  

### 3\. Quality photos

High-quality pictures build your customers’ confidence. Here are our Top 10 tips on creating the perfect photo for your cell phone or smartphone listing:

1.  Use white backgrounds to increase your listings visibility.
2.  Turn off the flash and use soft, diffused lighting.
3.  Keep things steady. Use a tripod.
4.  Take high-resolution photos so your item will look attractive on screens big and small.
5.  Fill the frame with your item.
6.  Photograph your item from all angles, and capture its details and blemishes.
7.  Illustrate the size of your mobile phone by showing the scale of your item. This will help buyers differentiate between an iPhone 12 Pro, iPhone 12, or iPhone 12 mini.
8.  Capture the natural colors of your item. No filters necessary.
9.  Include some detailed close-up shots. This will help set buyer expectations of the cosmetic appearance of your device.
10.  Avoid using props or watermarks. This includes accessories or items that won’t be included with your product.

Check out our [Tips for taking photos that sell](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/photo-tips)
 and read about our [Picture policy](https://www.ebay.com/help/policies/listing-policies/picture-policy?id=4370)
.

  

### 4\. Price

Competitive pricing is critical to the overall buyer experience and one of the most important factors of driving consideration and conversion for your mobile device. Not sure where to start on pricing? Our pricing guidance, powered by Product Research, is based on similar items sold during the previous 90 days.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-research-tools)
 about pricing guidance with Product Research.

  

[Learn more about listing best practices](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/listing-best-practices)

Diagnostic software to test cell phones
---------------------------------------

When selling cellphones on eBay, investing in a 3rd part mobile diagnostic software is a great way to ensure your devices are compliant with the eBay Refurbished grading rubrics, allowing buyers know what they are getting and reduce return requests.

With used phones, using diagnostic software gives you and your buyers a good picture of the phone condition. And it helps you have the best pricing for your item.

  

### Preferred diagnostic partners

![](https://ir.ebaystatic.com/cr/v/c01/help/blancco_1200x720_2.jpg)  

Blancco provides the most globally trusted data erasure and diagnostics for the widest range of devices—and the most comprehensive Apple support in the market. 

eBay sellers can list smartphones, smartwatches, desktops, laptops, tablets, servers, HDDs, SSDs, NVMes, and removable media confidently and at scale. 

Contact Blancco to get cost-effective solutions, accurate descriptions mapped to eBay’s grading scale, and special incentives for eBay sellers who sign up as new customers: 3 months free service, 3 months free carrier checks, 1-day professional services, free Xcelerate box (where applicable) [www.blancco.com/ebay/](https://www.blancco.com/ebay/)

![Phonecheck logo](https://ir.ebaystatic.com/cr/v/c01/phonecheck-471x90.png)

Phonecheck can help bring trust and transparency to buyers and sellers of used smartphones (iOS and Android), iPads, smartwatches, computers, and airpods. 

Phonecheck helps eBay sellers certify the condition of used phones with professional diagnostics—making it easier to meet grading standards. eBay sellers get 30% off their first month with free ESN checks included.

For more on Phonecheck device certification, visit [https://www.phonecheck.com/demo-ebay](https://www.phonecheck.com/demo-ebay)
.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=1ae9cb58-cc68-6cb7-4d95-3176d8d43d30&ctx_pageTitle=Perfect+cell+phone+or+smartphone+listing+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Perfect desktop or laptop listing | Seller Center

Create the perfect desktop or laptop listing
============================================

Learn how to elevate your search results, build trust, and drive conversion with these listing best practices.

On this page

*   [Create the perfect desktop or laptop listing](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/perfect-desktop-or-laptop-listing#create-the-perfect-desktop-or-laptop-listing)
    
*   [Listing best practices](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/perfect-desktop-or-laptop-listing#listing-best-practices)
    

Create the perfect desktop or laptop listing
--------------------------------------------

Whether you’re selling New, Used, or Refurbished desktops and laptops, here are some helpful tips on how to create the perfect listing. These four keys power how your desktop or laptop listing shows up in both eBay and external search results.

1

### Titles

Include relevant details and terms buyers are searching for.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/perfect-desktop-or-laptop-listing#titles)

2

### Structured data and item descriptions

Optimize your listings with item specifics, product identifiers and item descriptions.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/perfect-desktop-or-laptop-listing#structured-data)

3

### Quality photos

Top 10 tips for creating perfect photos for your listings.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/perfect-desktop-or-laptop-listing#quality-photos)

4

### Price

Price your items competitively to drive conversion.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/perfect-desktop-or-laptop-listing#price)

**Pro Tip:** Learn how to optimize your search results for [Best Match](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/listings/listing-tips/optimising-listings-best-match?id=4166)
.

Listing best practices
----------------------

### 1\. Titles

The title of your desktop or laptop listing should reflect relevant details about your device and terms buyers will use to search for it. The ideal title should include the brand, model, memory, color, carrier, and grade (if applicable). Please note that item condition (New, Used, Refurbished) should be included in your item specifics, not the title.

Subtitles, although not required, are an advanced listing feature and a great way to showcase your seller value proposition and increase your click-through rates.

Maintaining your customer base and identifying new opportunities is key to managing and growing your eBay business. Get ahead of the competition by finding out what they’re doing and how they’re doing it.

**Examples of a perfect listing title and subtitle:**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| **Title:** | Dell Desktop Computer 16GB RAM 512GB SSD Graphics Card if available Intel i5 3.4GHz QuadCore Grade A |
| **Subtitle:** | Free shipping, Free 30-day returns, Accessories included if any |

### 2\. Structured data & item descriptions

Optimize your listings with complete and accurate [item specifics](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/item-specifics)
 and [product identifiers](https://pages.ebay.com/sell/item_specifics/product_identifiers.html)
. Item specifics enable eBay to monitor which elements are most important to buyers and provide guidance when you list (e.g., keywords buyers use in search or how they filter in the left-hand navigation). Product identifiers make it easy for shoppers to find your items on eBay and through external search engines.

*   **Product identifiers.** Most new and manufacturer-refurbished branded items have product identifiers such as brand and codes on their original packaging. These identifiers are the Global Trade Item Number (GTIN), Universal Purchase Code (UPC), and Manufacturer Part Number (MPN).
*   **Item specifics.** Item specifics include brand, internal workings, and physical details about the item you are selling. They appear at the top of your listing description and make it easy for buyers to find relevant information. Following are some of the most relevant item specifics for desktops and laptops:

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| **Required item specifics** | **Recommended item specifics**  <br>(Based on buyers’ keywords and search filters) |
| Condition, brand, model, storage capacity, and color | Model, Graphics Processing Type, Connectivity, Computer Type, Features, RAM Size, Most Suitable For, Processor, OS, Certification (if any), Form Factor, Processor Speed, Computer Series (if any), Hard Drive Capacity, Storage Type, Computer Brand, and Monitor Size (if available) |

  

**Pro Tip:** Perfect titles AND item specifics help searchability of your listings.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/product-identifiers)
 about listing with structured data.

#### How to write a winning item description

A great product description will help build trust and drive conversion when buyers visit your page.

Make sure to include detailed product descriptions with brand names, styles, and model numbers. Also include unique qualities, such as modifications that have been made to the device, parts, and potential flaws.

In addition, your item descriptions can showcase who you are as a seller and help foster further buyer trust and confidence. Let buyers know you stand behind your listings by showing how long you’ve been in business, any diagnostic tests you’ve run, and customer service you may offer.

#### Listing with variations

When you have many similar items that have different variations, such as bundle offers or regional compatibility, you can create a single fixed price listing that includes all the variations you offer.

Starting August 27, 2021, we will remove all condition and grade-related variants (e.g., “very good,” “good,” “Grade A”, “Grade B”) as custom multi-SKU variant options in the listing flow for desktops and laptops.

**Pro Tip:** As a best practice, limit your use of variants to keywords that are not available in item specifics.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/listings/creating-managing-listings/creating-listings-variations?id=4150)
 about listing with variations.

### 3\. Quality photos

High-quality pictures build your customers’ confidence. Here are our Top 10 Tips on creating the perfect photo for your desktop or laptop listing:

1.  Use white backgrounds to increase your listings visibility.
2.  Turn off the flash and use soft, diffused lighting.
3.  Keep things steady. Use a tripod.
4.  Take high-resolution photos so your item will look attractive on screens big and small.
5.  Fill the frame with your item.
6.  Photograph your item from all angles, and capture its details and blemishes.
7.  Describe in detail the types and sizes of certain components of the build, including storage size, color, form factor to differentiate between different computer models.
8.  Capture the natural colors of your item. No filters necessary.
9.  Include some detailed close-up shots. This will help set buyer expectations of the cosmetic appearance of your device.
10.  Avoid using props or watermarks. This includes accessories or items that won’t be included with your product.

Check out our [Tips for taking photos that sell](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/photo-tips)
 and read about our [Picture policy](https://www.ebay.com/help/policies/listing-policies/picture-policy?id=4370)
.

### 4\. Price

Competitive pricing is critical to the overall buyer experience and one of the most important factors of driving consideration and conversion for your products. Not sure where to start on pricing? Our pricing guidance, powered by Product Research, is based on similar items sold during the previous 90 days.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-research-tools)
 about pricing guidance with Product Research.

  

These are just four tips on creating the perfect desktop and laptop listings. [Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/listing-best-practices)
 best practices!

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=d1a7cacc-979d-4b20-ae5f-74282f16abfb&ctx_pageTitle=Perfect+desktop+or+laptop+listing+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Share to social | Seller Center

Engage with buyers by sharing to social media
=============================================

Drive more traffic and generate new interest toward your business and brand with the Seller Hub social page.

List it. Share it. Sell it.
---------------------------

Creating engaging and inspirational content on social media is a powerful way to attract new customers and keep your existing customers coming back to your eBay business. Now, it’s easier than ever. From the Seller Hub social page, you can link your social media accounts to your eBay account, and share posts to multiple social platforms right from eBay.  

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/09/image1-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Enjoy the benefits Seller Hub social page provides
--------------------------------------------------

### Easily link accounts 

In just a few clicks, you can link your Facebook, Instagram, Pinterest, YouTube, and TikTok accounts to your eBay account.

### Create custom posts

Add text, hashtags, images, and videos to showcase your inventory in the most fun and engaging way possible.

### Schedule posts for later

Pick the best date and time to go live with your posts for maximum engagement.

### Post to multiple platforms at once

Save time and increase efficiency by managing all your posts directly from one page.

### Set up automatic posting

Set it and forget it—you can automatically post your new listings to your social channels. 

### Get key insights

Receive detailed data on the number of buyers visiting your listings, Store, and category pages from social media.  

Link your social media accounts
-------------------------------

To get started, just link your Facebook, Instagram, Pinterest, YouTube, and TikTok accounts to your eBay account:
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1\. Within the Seller Hub social page, go to your social accounts section

2\. Select the social platforms of your choice and add your login details

3\. Authorize eBay to generate posts on the social platforms you’ve chosen

You can also check out our [step-by-step guide](https://pages.ebay.com/stores-social-page-help/#facebook)
 on how to link your Facebook, Instagram, Pinterest, YouTube, and TikTok accounts.

[Link your account](https://www.ebay.com/sh/social)

Create social posts and share
-----------------------------

Once you’ve linked your eBay account to your social accounts, just follow these steps to create posts and promote your eBay business:

*   Click the **Create Post** button on the social page and select which social channel you’d like to post to
    
*   Add the URL for the Store, listing, or category you want your customers to visit when they see your post 
    
*   Select up to four of your listings to feature their images in your post
    
*   Edit your post’s draft images or video, add a caption, and any relevant hashtags
    
*   Once you’re ready, just click **Post** to go live instantly, or **Schedule** to post it later
    

[Create a post](https://www.ebay.com/sh/social)

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/09/image2-1200x992.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Set it and forget it with automatic posting
-------------------------------------------

Want to post more of your inventory while spending less time on social media? Your social page’s auto-posting feature will share the first few listings you create every day to the social channels you choose, using your listing details to create an engaging post for each listing. You control what listings are posted by choosing the item categories you want to be eligible.

Just look for the new Auto-posting section on the Social page, and select the “Set up now” button. From there, you can set your preferences, view example posts, and select the Save button to start auto-posting.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=01f73315-f98f-4be6-ada1-db2f1602f5c5&ctx_pageTitle=Share+to+social+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

---

### Titles

.

Listing best practices
----------------------

#### 1\. Titles

The title of your tablet listing should reflect relevant details about your device and terms buyers will use to search for it. The ideal title should include the brand, model, storage capacity, network and color. Please note that item condition (New, Used, Refurbished) should be included in your item specifics, not the title.

Subtitles, although not required, are an advanced listing feature and a great way to showcase your seller value proposition and increase your click-through rates.

Maintaining your customer base and identifying new opportunities is key to managing and growing your eBay business. Get ahead of the competition by finding out what they’re doing and how they’re doing it.

**Examples of a perfect listing title and subtitle**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| **Title:** | Apple iPad 6 (2018 Model), 32GB WiFi + Cellular, Space Gray |
| **Subtitle:** | Free shipping, Free 30-day returns, Accessories included |

#### 2\. Structured data & item descriptions

Optimize your listings with complete and accurate [item specifics](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/item-specifics)
 and [product identifiers](https://pages.ebay.com/sell/item_specifics/product_identifiers.html)
. Item specifics enable us to monitor which elements are most important to buyers and provide guidance when you list (e.g., keywords buyers use in search or how they filter in the left-hand navigation). Product identifiers make it easy for shoppers to find your items on eBay and through external search engines.

*   **Product identifiers.** Most new and manufacturer-refurbished branded items have product identifiers such as brand and codes on their original packaging. These identifiers are the Global Trade Item Number (GTIN), Universal Purchase Code (UPC), and Manufacturer Part Number (MPN).
*   **Item specifics.** Item specifics include brand, internal workings, and physical details about the item you are selling. They appear at the top of your listing description and make it easy for buyers to find relevant information. Following are some of the most relevant item specifics for tablets:

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| **Required item specifics** | **Recommended item specifics**  <br>(Based on buyers’ keywords and search filters) |
| Condition, brand, model, storage capacity, and color | Network, operating system, lock status (if applicable), connectivity, processor, RAM, Screen Resolution, case material, battery run time and features |

  

**Pro Tip:** Perfect titles AND item specifics help searchability of your listings.

#### How to write a winning item description

A great product description will help build trust and drive conversion when buyers visit your page.

Make sure to include detailed product descriptions with brand names, styles, and model numbers. Also include unique qualities, such as modifications that have been made to the device, battery life, and potential flaws.

In addition, your item descriptions can showcase who you are as a seller and foster buyer trust and confidence. Let buyers know you stand behind your listings by showing how long you’ve been in business, any diagnostic tests you’ve run, and customer service you may offer.

#### Listing with variations

When you have many similar items that have different variations, such as bundle offers or regional compatibility, you can create a single fixed price listing that includes all the variations you offer.

Starting February 9, 2022 we will remove all condition and grade-related variants (e.g., “very good,” “good,” “Grade A”, “Grade B”) as custom multi-SKU variant options in the listing flow for Tablets.

**Pro Tip:** As a best practice, limit your use of variants to keywords that are not available in item specifics.

#### 3\. Quality photos

High-quality pictures build your customers’ confidence. Here are our Top 9 tips on creating the perfect photo for your tablet listing:

1.  Use white backgrounds to increase your listings visibility.
2.  Turn off the flash and use soft, diffused lighting.
3.  Keep things steady. Use a tripod.
4.  Take high-resolution photos so your item will look attractive on screens big and small.
5.  Fill the frame with your item.
6.  Photograph your item from all angles, and capture its details and blemishes.
7.  Capture the natural colors of your item. No filters necessary.
8.  Include some detailed close-up shots. This will help set buyer expectations of the cosmetic appearance of your device.
9.  Avoid using props or watermarks. This includes accessories or items that won’t be included with your product.

Check out our [Tips for taking photos that sell](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/photo-tips)
 and read about our [Picture policy](https://www.ebay.com/help/policies/listing-policies/picture-policy?id=4370)
.

#### 4\. Price

Competitive pricing is critical to the overall buyer experience and one of the most important factors of driving consideration and conversion for your mobile device. Not sure where to start on pricing? Our pricing guidance, powered by Product Research, is based on similar items sold during the previous 90 days.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-research-tools)
 about pricing guidance with Product Research.

 for even more best practices!

# eBay research tools | Seller Center

eBay research tools
===================

Analyze and grow your business with eBay research tools.

On this page

*   [What are eBay research tools?](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-research-tools#what-are-e-bay-research-tools-)
    
*   [Product Research](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-research-tools#product-research)
    
*   [Sourcing Insights](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-research-tools#sourcing-insights)
    

What are eBay research tools?
-----------------------------

Exclusive to eBay, Product Research and Sourcing Insights let you research what your competitors are doing, how they’re doing it, and how you can improve your own listings on eBay. Optimize your business performance using data from millions of eBay transactions to scope out your competition and make informed decisions about your listings and merchandising.

Product Research
----------------

Product Research helps you determine what to sell, when to sell it, and at what price. Research recent marketplace price trends and real-world sales data for millions of items to optimize your listings. Analyze markets, competition, hot trends, and products to find the best-selling items on eBay. You can also:

*   See how products are performing across all eBay marketplaces
    
*   View clear, easy-to-understand statistics, graphs, and charts
    
*   Get an overview of which products are popular, successful strategies for attracting buyers, and potential areas to improve
    
*   Search by keyword or product and use the filters to get the information you want
    

The best part: it’s free to all sellers. Find it under the **Research** tab in Seller Hub.

[Start researching](https://www.ebay.com/sh/research)

Product Research highlights
---------------------------

### Get ahead of the competition by using these features to your advantage.

Optimize your listings

Match the competition

Product research

Refresh underperforming listings

By researching top-performing listings and comparing listing details—such as photos, price, and item specifics—you can get hints on how to better optimize your listings. You can also identify data-driven keywords that could attract customers to your listings.

Sourcing Insights
-----------------

With Sourcing Insights, you can see top-performing categories, identify what’s selling well in those categories, and make informed decisions about what to sell next. You can also:

*   Identify categories with high demand and low supply
    
*   See trends over time, and stay ahead of seasonal demand
    
*   Use sales data to refresh your inventory based on what buyers are looking for
    

Sourcing Insights is available to sellers with a Basic or above [Store subscription](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/payments-and-fees/subscriptions-and-fees)
 and can be found in the Research tab in Seller Hub.

[Expand your selling](https://www.ebay.com/sh/research/sourcing-insights)

Sourcing Insights highlights
----------------------------

### Use these features to get the insights you need to grow your business.

Identify categories with high demand and low supply

See seasonal trends

Find top item specifics

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/06/us_sourcing_insights.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Find high-potential categories—marked as “Great Opportunity”—that have high search volume and not enough active listings to meet the demand.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=7dd00c24-1443-4308-df52-9ae05faf95d4&ctx_pageTitle=eBay+research+tools+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Growth | Seller Center

Grow your sales
===============

Whether you’re a new business or an experienced seller, we’ve got tools and services to help you move to the next level.

![lady wearing denim jacket and holding a yellow pen on her left hand and blue pen on her right hand](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/10/growth.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Using discounts to boost your sales
-----------------------------------

Use Seller Hub Discounts—a set of easy-to-use tools available in your Seller Hub Marketing tab—to create special offers that encourage buyers to shop more of your items, spend more on each order, and keep coming back to your business.

[Learn about discounts](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/seller-hub-discounts)

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2021/08/boosting_sales_1200x1200.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Offer competitive prices

Improve your listing visibility
-------------------------------

Promote your listings to help them stand out on eBay and drive more sales.

Going global
------------

The eBay Partner Network
------------------------

  

By signing up with eBay’s affiliate marketing program and sharing your listings outside of eBay, you can increase your earnings, diversify your revenue streams, and even get a credit for your final value fees when you share your item and it sells.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-partner-network)

# eBay Advertising | Seller Center

eBay Advertising
================

Connect to buyers with simple to use, high-performing solutions that match your sales goals and campaign budget.

Explore our campaign types to see which ones are best for you and your business.

|     |     |     |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [Promote your listings](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-advertising/promoted-listings) | [Promote your store](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-advertising/promoted-stores) | [Promote offsite](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-advertising/promoted-offsite) |

Promote your listings
---------------------

### Promote your listings to increase your visibility and help them stand out from the crowd so you can drive more sales.

*   Access to ad placements that can attract more buyers and help drive sales
*   Flexible options and controls to match your business goals
*   A simple-to-use platform to create and manage your campaigns  
    

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-advertising/promoted-listings)

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2021/09/40_Product_identifiers_1200x1200.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Promote your Store
------------------

### Attract interested buyers to your eBay Store with targeted ads that are easy to launch.

*   Drive valuable traffic to your eBay Store with eye-catching ads that promote your top inventory or coupons
*   Increase awareness of your brand on eBay with ads that highlight your eBay Store’s name and logo
*   Launch your campaign in just a few clicks with a simple flow for campaign creation  
    

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-advertising/promoted-stores)

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/06/sc_refresh_promote_1200x1200.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Promote offsite
---------------

### Attract new buyers off eBay by showcasing your eligible listings on popular channels, like Google.

*   Capture a wider audience of interested buyers and drive more traffic to your listings
*   Get in front of buyers who are already searching for the types of items you’re selling
*   Save time with easy-to-launch campaigns that promote all of your eligible listings in just a few clicks  
    

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-advertising/promoted-offsite)

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/08/offsite-ads-1200x1200.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

# Promoted Listings | Seller Center

Promote your listings
=====================

Grow your business, drive more sales, and increase your visibility across eBay.

On this page

*   [What is Promoted Listings?](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-advertising/promoted-listings#what-is-promoted-listings-)
    
*   [Strategy types](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-advertising/promoted-listings#strategy-types)
    
*   [Best practices](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-advertising/promoted-listings#best-practices)
    
*   [Getting started](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-advertising/promoted-listings#getting-started)
    
*   [Performance and reporting](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-advertising/promoted-listings#performance-and-reporting)
    

What is Promoted Listings?
--------------------------

Promoting your listings can help you drive sales by putting your listings in front of relevant buyers. With Promoted Listings, you have:

*   Access to ad placements that can attract more buyers and help drive sales
*   Flexible options and controls to match your business goals
*   A simple-to-use platform to create and manage your campaigns

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/06/promoted_listings_1.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Strategy types
--------------

When you promote your listings, there are two campaign strategies to choose from to fit your unique business needs:

*   The **general strategy** can increase the visibility and awareness of your listings with general access to ad placements so you can reach more buyers. You’ll only pay when your item sells after a click on your ad. 
*   The **priority strategy** helps your listings reach highly motivated buyers with priority access ad placements and advanced targeting controls. You’ll only pay when someone clicks on your ads.

Promoting your listings with a general strategy
-----------------------------------------------

Promoting your listings with a priority strategy
------------------------------------------------

This cost-per-sale campaign strategy provides general access to ad placements with standard controls to help you reach more buyers.

*   **Boost visibility.** Reach more buyers with access to ad placements.
*   **Only pay when you sell.** You’re only charged when your promoted item sells after a click on your ad.
*   **Easy-to-use.** Simple setup with recommendations to kickstart and streamline your campaign management.

This cost-per-click campaign strategy helps you reach highly-motivated buyers with priority access to ad placements and advanced controls to help you drive sales.

*   **Access advanced controls.** Unlock advanced targeting options to help convert clicks into sales.
*   **Only pay for clicks.** You’ll only pay for clicks on your promoted listings.
*   **Grow your business.** Reach motivated buyers with access to effective ad placements.

Best practices
--------------

*   **Continuously track ad performance** to identify top-performing campaigns and adjust your campaign strategies accordingly
*   **Regularly update your campaigns** to reflect the current market and consumer trends
*   **Experiment with different campaign strategies** to help identify the right advertising strategy for your listings that can increase your exposure and sales potential
*   **Set a clear budget for your ad campaigns** and regularly monitor your spending to identify opportunities to optimize your ad spend

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/06/promoted_listings_2.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Getting started
---------------

You can promote your listings from the Seller Hub on your **Advertising dashboard**. Here's how:

1.  Select **Create new campaign**
2.  Select **Promote your listings** from the ad type options.
3.  Follow the prompts to set up your campaign and choose which campaign strategy you want to use:  
    

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| When choosing a **general strategy**: | When choosing a **priority strategy**: |
| *   **Add listings** to promote<br>*   Choose an **ad rate strategy**<br>*   **Name** your campaign<br>*   Set the campaign **duration** | *   **Add listings** to promote<br>*   Determine your **targeting** and **bidding strategy**<br>*   Set a **daily budget**<br>*   **Name** your campaign<br>*   Set the campaign **duration** |

After reviewing your campaign details, you can then **Launch** your campaign.

Performance and reporting
-------------------------

You can easily access comprehensive reporting from all of your advertising campaigns on eBay. Our easy-to-use, centralized dashboard enables you to make data-driven decisions with real-time access to performance data, allowing you to quickly identify trends and apply optimizations to grow your business.

Learn more
----------

Visit the eBay Help page to learn more about promoting your listings.

[Visit now](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/ebay-advertising/promoted-listings-overview?id=5295)

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=7e2be1a3-213f-4c9c-bf03-932acd9b2f0d&ctx_pageTitle=Promoted+Listings+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Selling trading cards | Seller Center

Turn your trading cards into cash
=================================

Raise your game to list and sell cards like a pro.

[Start listing](https://www.ebay.com/sl/sell)

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/04/trading-cards-hero-1440x992.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

### 134 million active buyers

Only eBay connects you to a global marketplace at this scale.

### Know your buyers

When shopping for trading cards, buyers are looking for condition, value, and trust.

### Sell with confidence

Authenticity Guarantee ensures careful inspection and verified returns at no cost to you.

Create a winning listing
========================

How to capture the buyer’s attention

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/05/create-a-winning-listing-2880x992.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Revamp your listings with new conditions
----------------------------------------

Enhance the quality of your new listings and establish trust with your buyers. Here are some improvements that can help you best represent your trading cards in new listings.

1.  **A revamped grading system** for single trading cards. We’ve moved from Used, to Graded, and Ungraded.  
      
    ●  **Graded**: Add the relevant grader, numerical grade, and the certification number (recommended).  
    ●  **Ungraded**: Select the appropriate card condition that best fits the state of the card. Use the tables below for guidance.  
      
    This change will affect all single trading cards in the following categories:  
      
    ●  Sports Memorabilia, Cards & Fan Shop > Sports Trading Cards > Trading Card Singles  
    ●  Collectibles > Non-Sport Trading Cards > Trading Card Singles  
    ●  Toys & Hobbies > Collectible Card Games > CCG Individual Cards
2.  Starting October 23, 2023, you’ll be required to use one of our new conditions and their respective condition descriptors when revising your existing listings for single trading cards. In addition, sellers who use the Bulk Listing and Editing tool will also be required to use one of the new conditions and their respective condition descriptors when creating listings via the Relist and Sell Similar flows.  
      
    [Update now](https://www.ebay.com/mys/active)
    
3.  For sellers using APIs to list, new listings will require the new grading system starting October 23, 2023 and existing listings from January 22, 2024.

Tips on taking great photos
---------------------------

*   Use white backdrops to increase visibility.
*   Turn off the flash. Use soft, diffused lighting.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/photo-tips)

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/04/taking-trading-card-photos-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Title the cards correctly
-------------------------

Sports trading cards

Collectible card games

Non-sports trading cards

**Use relevant keywords in a logical, readable order, including:**

*   Year
*   Brand and edition
*   Player name(s)
*   Special features (rookie, autograph, etc.)
*   Grading details (grading company and grade)

**Here’s an example:** 1952 Topps #311 Mickey Mantle Rookie PSA 6.5

Know your card’s condition
--------------------------

Sports and non-sports trading cards

Collectible card games

|     |     |     |     |     |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|     | **Near Mint or Better** | **Excellen**t | **Very Good** | **Poor** |
| **Corners** | Minor chipping | Moderate corner wear with multiple dinged corners | Rounding on all four corners | Major rounding with one or more corners missing |
| **Edges** | Minor chipping | Slightly rough edges with moderate chipping and/or light indentations | Moderate-to-heavy chipping and/or indentations | Major chipping and indentation with paper loss |
| **Discoloration** | None | Minor (e.g. wax stains on the reverse) | Moderate to major | Major discoloration over a large area |
| **Surface Indentations** | None | Moderate | Moderate to major | Major |
| **Creases** | None | Minor surface wrinkles | Moderate with multiple creases allowed | Multiple major creases |
| **Scratches/Scuffing** | Minor | Moderate | Moderate to major, some slight paper loss | Major scratches/scuffing with paper loss, tears, and pinholes |
| **Staining** | None | Minor | Moderate to major | Major |

Are you using the shipping service designed for card sellers?
-------------------------------------------------------------

eBay standard envelope is the most cost-effective way to track your lower-value card shipments. It’s better than a simple stamp. eBay standard envelope packages automatically get protections for single cards valued up to $20 and multiple cards up to $50, in case of loss or damage.

**eBay standard envelope rates:**

|     |     |     |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **1 oz** | **2 oz** | **3 oz** |
| $0.63 | $0.87 | $1.11 |

  

###   **![](https://ir.ebaystatic.com/pictures/sc/selling/tag-icon.png)  PRO SHIP TIP**

If you need to use a thicker or more rigid envelope to better protect your card, check with your local postmaster to verify what is accepted as there are regional variances.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/08/ese_smart-ship-tip-1200x1440.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Authenticity Guarantee 101
--------------------------

### Make it an easy process

Sell with confidence knowing our team of authenticators verifies every card sold at no cost to you. Raw and graded cards over $250 automatically go through Authenticity Guarantee (AG). Here are a few things you can keep in mind to ensure a seamless AG process:

1.  Don’t pad your handling time. We account for the time the cards spend at our AG facility in the estimated delivery date we give to buyers.
2.  Use eBay Labels (or manually enter tracking information) to prevent delays at the AG facility.
3.  Purchase signature confirmation for cards valued over $750.
4.  Package every card according to the best practices outlined above. We’ll open it up, verify authenticity, and re-package it to safely send on to your buyer.

[Learn more](https://pages.ebay.com/authenticity-guarantee-tradingcards/)

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/04/authencity-guarantee-trading-cards-1200x1200.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

The eBay vault
--------------

Welcome to next-level collecting. Your cards have never been safer, buying and selling has never been easier, AND you’re saving money. What’s not to love?

[Enroll now](https://www.ebay.com/vault)

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/04/ebay-vault-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Frequently asked questions
--------------------------

### General

### What is eBay market value?

eBay market value is an eBay proprietary calculation that estimates a card’s value at that particular moment in time.

### How is the eBay market value calculated?

We pull from eBay’s rich transaction history, track the card’s velocity and normalize the time window to give you the most accurate, trustworthy and actionable single data point.

### How often is eBay market value updated?

The eBay market value for any given card is updated every few minutes.

### Where can I provide feedback?

Look out for the “Help improve this page” link within the experience or email [betafeedback@ebay.com](mailto:betafeedback@ebay.com)
.

### eBay Collection

### How do I access my Collection?

Under the My eBay dropdown menu, navigate to the “Collection” section.

### What items are eligible to be added to my Collection?

At the moment, Collection only supports the following trading card categories:

Sports Trading Cards:

*   Baseball
*   Basketball
*   Football
*   Golf
*   Ice Hockey
*   Soccer

Collectible Card Games:

*   Magic: the Gathering
*   Pokémon TCG
*   Yu-Gi-Oh! TCG

### My Collection already has items in it but I didn’t add them.

We pre-populated your Collection with your eBay purchases from supported categories within the last year (rolling 12 months).

### How can I add cards to my Collection?

In the app, tap on the “+” icon in your Collection to add more items. You can select from past purchases or manually add a card.

On desktop, tap on the “Add to Collection” button in your Collection to add more items. You’ll also see an option to upload a csv file for uploading your portfolio in one step.

### How many items can I add to my Collection?

At the moment, the maximum number of items you can add to your collection is 1,000.

I want to upload my collection in one step on desktop. What format does my file need to be in?

Follow the downloadable templates (CSV template) for either sports trading cards or collectible card games.

### How do I edit an item in my Collection?

In the app, go to the item view of the item you would like to edit. Tap on the pencil icon to edit the item.

### How do I delete an item in my Collection?

In the app, go to the item view of the item you would like to edit. Tap on the pencil icon to edit and then delete the item. You can also swipe left on the item on the category page to delete it. Individual item deletion is not currently available on desktop.

### How do I delete multiple items in my Collection at once?

At the moment, you can only delete one item at a time.

### How do I search within my Collection?

We only support search within a category in the app. In other words, you will not be able to search your entire Collection for a specific card. Searching is not currently available on desktop.

### Who can see my Collection?

Only you can see your collection. We do not currently support collection sharing.

### How long will an item stay in my Collection?

Your item will stay in your Collection forever unless you manually remove it.

### How do I sell a card in my Collection?

Go to the eBay app and in Collection, navigate to the item view and tap the “Create listing” button. This action will create a draft listing that is populated with the information you have entered for your item.

### Where can I see the draft listings I create in my Collection?

Draft listings you create in your Collection are accessible under “Drafts” within the Listing section.

### When I sell an item in my Collection, will it be removed automatically from view?

No. If you would like to remove it from your Collection, please delete the item manually.

### eBay Price Guide

### How do I access the price guide?

In the eBay app, simply search for the card you want and a banner at the top of the search results page will appear. Click on it to enter the price guide experience.

### What items are eligible for the price guide?

Price Guide beta supports sports and non-sports trading cards as well as collectible card games.

### I can’t find what I’m searching for in the price guide.

Try adding more specifics to your search to generate more accurate results. Here are some recommendations on what to include:

*   Grader
*   Grade
*   Set
*   Year
*   Variant

For some rare and infrequently-sold cards, we may not return any results. In that scenario, try removing some criteria to broaden your search.

### eBay Image Scan

### How do I access image scan?

To use image scan, go to the Selling screen in the eBay app. Tap “List an item”, start typing in your game name (e.g., “magic the gathering” or “pokemon”) and a blue box will appear. Tap on that box to launch the image scanning experience.

### What types of cards can I scan with the image scan tool?

This feature is available only for Magic: The Gathering, Pokémon, and Yu-Gi-Oh!. Support for more collectible card games and sports trading cards to follow. Please make sure to scan physical cards only. Foil cards can be scanned but the tool may not recognize that it is a foil card. Please make sure to select the foil version match (if available) or add that detail to your listing’s item specifics.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=055e5d7f-6d3f-49a5-8473-eb39b1da36ef&ctx_pageTitle=Selling+trading+cards+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Promoted Offsite | Seller Center

Promote offsite
===============

Reach new and interested buyers who start their shopping journey off of eBay.

On this page

*   [What is Promoted Offsite?](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-advertising/promoted-offsite#what-is-promoted-offsite-)
    
*   [Key benefits](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-advertising/promoted-offsite#key-benefits)
    
*   [Getting started](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-advertising/promoted-offsite#getting-started)
    
*   [Best practices](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-advertising/promoted-offsite#best-practices)
    

What is Promoted Offsite?
-------------------------

Promoted Offsite is an advertising tool that gives you the ability to further promote your listings on leading external channels, like Google, so you can:

*   Capture a wider audience of interested buyers and drive more traffic to your listings
*   Get in front of buyers who are already searching for the types of items you’re selling
*   Save time with easy-to-launch campaigns that promote all of your eligible listings in just a few clicks

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/06/promoted_offsite_1.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Key benefits
------------

*   **Expand your reach:** Attract interested buyers to your eBay listings with ads on popular external channels.
*   **High performing:** Position your listings directly before high-intent, engaged buyers actively seeking what you're selling.
*   **Quick setup:** Save time with easy-to-launch campaigns that promote all of your eligible listings in just a few clicks.

Success stories
---------------

"Promoted Offsite on eBay has continued to outperform our expected performance metrics, and the ROAS and conversion rates we are seeing as a result of utilizing this program are amazing. We love the efficiency of this marketing campaign and how user friendly eBay makes it upon setup and execution." - BISSELL Homecare Inc.

Getting started
---------------

You can create a Promoted Offsite campaign in the Seller Hub from your Advertising dashboard. Here's how:

1.  Select **Create new campaign**
2.  Select **Promote offsite** from the ad type options
3.  Follow the prompts to set up your campaign where you can choose your average daily budget
4.  After reviewing your campaign details, you can then **Launch** your campaign

Best practices
--------------

*   **Patience during the learning period.** When launching a campaign, it can take time for machine-learning to optimize ad performance, as the algorithm gathers data.
*   **Review your budget.** Utilize the suggested budget guidance and click estimation to further extend your reach.
*   **Use high-quality visuals that showcase the product.** Your images should showcase your product, be clear, and well-lit (ideally with a white background to make it easy for customers to see). This can help drive engagement.
*   **Keep your listings up to date.** Accurate data, like price and availability, are key to ensure your ads showcase the information your buyers are looking for.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/06/promoted_offiste_2.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Learn more
----------

Visit the eBay Help page to learn more about promoting your listings offsite.

[Visit now](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/ebay-advertising/promoted-offsite?id=5471)

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=03753fd1-b41d-445f-9815-f627705cd1a0&ctx_pageTitle=Promoted+Offsite+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Going global | Seller Center

Sell internationally
====================

Expand your sales to millions of buyers in over 200 countries.

On this page

*   [How to sell internationally on eBay](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/going-global#how-to-sell-internationally-on-e-bay)
    
*   [Perks of eBay International Shipping](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/going-global#perks-of-e-bay-international-shipping)
    
*   [Selling internationally eligibility](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/going-global#selling-internationally-eligibility)
    
*   [Selling to a non-English speaking country](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/going-global#selling-to-a-non-english-speaking-country)
    

How to sell internationally on eBay
-----------------------------------

Selling your items to international buyers is one of the best ways to quickly expand your business. When you list on eBay and choose to ship globally, your item will automatically appear in search results on eBay in over 200 countries, free of charge.  

Perks of eBay International Shipping
------------------------------------

We’ve made international shipping easy. With the new program, you’ll enjoy benefits like:

*   **Hassle-free international shipments.** We’ll  handle all international shipping details–including customs paperwork–at no additional cost. Just ship your items to our domestic shipping hub and we’ll take care of the rest.
*   **Free returns.** We’ll  manage and pay for returns at no cost to you. You keep the sale.
*   **Added protection.** Once your item is at our shipping hub, you’re protected against common claims from the buyer, including “Item Not Received,” chargebacks, and negative or neutral feedback.

[Learn more about the eBay International Shipping (eIS)](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/ebay-international-shipping)

Do I have to use eBay International Shipping to sell internationally?
---------------------------------------------------------------------

No, you don’t have to use eBay International Shipping if you want to sell internationally. You can choose to list your item globally without being enrolled in the program, but cost and calculation of international shipping fees, currency exchange rates, import charges, and varied country customs forms are the Sellers’ responsibility.

If you aren’t very familiar with international shipping requirements, then it may be best for you and for your buyer to let eBay take care of it.

The link below provides additional information on eligible countries covered by eBay International Shipping (eIS), as well as access to information on restricted categories, prohibited items, and item eligibility including weight and dimensional shipping factors.  

[Find out about eBay International Shipping eligibility](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/ebay-labels-services/ebay-international-shipping-services/ebay-global-shipping-program#gsp-eligibility)

Selling to a non-English speaking country
-----------------------------------------

Follow these best practices when listing your items for international sales:

*   Use international sizing for fashion apparel
*   Ensure your electronic items are compatible overseas
*   Provide plenty of photos—accurate and detailed photos speak an international language across all eBay sites
*   Avoid using confusing localized acronyms
*   State the country of origin wherever possible
*   Clearly state the item condition
*   Accurately provide weights and dimensions of the item, including the packaging

And lastly, make sure you double-check your details and confirm your listing.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=e1d4a6f2-031a-abcb-36c6-22cf815bd5e1&ctx_pageTitle=Going+global+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Seller Hub Discounts | Seller Center

Seller Hub Discounts
====================

Create special offers with Seller Hub Discounts to attract more buyers and help boost your sales.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/06/sc_hero_refresh_1440x992.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

On this page

*   [Engage buyer interest with Seller Hub Discounts](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/seller-hub-discounts#engage-buyer-interest-with-seller-hub-discounts)
    
*   [Benefits](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/seller-hub-discounts#benefits)
    
*   [Give buyers a memorable shopping experience](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/seller-hub-discounts#give-buyers-a-memorable-shopping-experience)
    
*   [Marketing tools at a glance](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/seller-hub-discounts#marketing-tools-at-a-glance)
    
*   [Offer buyers shipping discounts](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/seller-hub-discounts#offer-buyers-shipping-discounts)
    
*   [Best practices for sending discounts](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/seller-hub-discounts#best-practices-for-sending-discounts)
    

Engage buyer interest with Seller Hub Discounts
-----------------------------------------------

Market your merchandise like a pro with Seller Hub Discounts. Discover the tools available under the **Marketing** tab in **Seller Hub**. The easy-to-use tools allow you to create special offers that may encourage buyers to shop more of your items, spend more on each order, and keep coming back to view your listings.

Benefits
--------

Free for Store subscribers, Seller Hub Discounts give you the chance to build your brand, attract potential buyers, and encourage sales.

### Easy-to-use tools

Highlight your items in search results to showcase more of your inventory and help increase clicks on your listings.

### Drive larger orders

Group related items together to make it simple for buyers to discover more of your items and add more items before checkout.

### Build buyer trust

Feature seasonal or in-demand items that can help drive brand loyalty and encourage repeat customers.

Give buyers a memorable shopping experience
-------------------------------------------

Use Seller Hub Discounts to create an engaging buyer experience. Promote your offers across key on-site placements and make it easy for your buyers to discover and use relevant discounts. Throughout the buying journey, clear messaging shows buyers how to qualify for discounts and unlock additional savings.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/06/sc_refresh_shopping_experience_1200x720.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Marketing tools at a glance
---------------------------

With a variety of discounts available on Seller Hub, you have the opportunity to convert browsers into buyers. Here are the discounts you can use.

*   ### Volume pricing
    
    Encourage customers to buy more in your Store by offering discounts on  multiples of the same item.
    
      
    
    **Save 5% when you buy 2**
    
    **Save 10% when you buy 3**  
    
    [Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/seller-hub-discounts/volume-pricing)
    
*   ### Sale Event
    
    Set up a sale event to offer reduced prices on select inventory, ideal for high-demand items or seasonal events like Black Friday.
    
      
    
    **Save up to 30% on all laptops**
    
    **Save up to 50% on last season’s winter gear**
    
      
    
    [Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/seller-hub-discounts/sale-events)
    
*   ### Coupons
    
    Create a discount code for your buyers. You can share the code privately or publicly on social media to pique buyers’ interest.
    
      
    
    **Buy 1, get 1 at 20% off coupon** 
    
    **Use code “REPEAT5” for $5 off your next order**
    
      
    
    [Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/seller-hub-discounts/coded-coupons)
    
*   ### Automated offer
    
    Turn watchers into buyers by sending them a custom offer or let them suggest their own Best Offer.
    
      
    
    **10% off item**
    
    **20% off for first time buyers**
    
      
    
    [Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/seller-hub-discounts/offers-to-buyers-best-offer)
    
*   ### Order Discount
    
    Encourage buyers to increase their order size with reduced prices for higher quantities or orders over a certain threshold.
    
      
    
    **Buy 1 & get 1 50% off board games**
    
    **Save $25 when you spend $125 or more**
    
    [Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/seller-hub-discounts/order-size-discounts)
    

Offer buyers shipping discounts
-------------------------------

Encourage buyers to add more of your items to their cart by offering them a shipping discount when they meet a given threshold. Once you opt in, you can easily set up rules that automatically apply to the shipping cost when someone buys multiple items. It’s a win-win: your buyer saves at checkout, and you save time as you won't need to revise invoices later.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/seller-hub-discounts/shipping-discounts)

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/06/sc_refresh_offer_discounts_1200x720.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Best practices for sending discounts
------------------------------------

Creating a discount is just the beginning. To get the most out of your offers, make sure they’re relevant and appealing to your customers. Here are some key do’s and don’ts to help you run effective discounts and boost your sales.

Do’s
----

Don’ts
------

*   **Hand pick promotions.** Group similar items together, or items that are complementary, like chairs with a table to make discounts relevant to buyers. 
*   **Time your promotions.** Run discounts during peak season, such as spring for garden furniture, or retail moments like the holiday season and Black Friday.
*   **Monitor and test.** Use the Discounts dashboard and reports to see how well your discounts are working, adjust if needed.
*   **Know your costs.** This will allow you to provide a worthwhile discount while maintaining a profit.
*   **Know your stock.** Focus your discounts on items where you have plenty of inventory in stock.

*   **Don’t discount at random.** Always consider your costs and your profit margin before setting up discounts so it works for your business.
*   **Don’t discount rare items.** Unique or in-demand products often sell well without a discount. Save offers for where they matter most.
*   **Don’t put everything on sale.** Avoid discounting your entire inventory at once, unless items are complementary. This can lower the overall impact of your promotions.
*   **Don’t discount low-stock bestsellers.** Keep an eye on inventory levels—discounting popular items with limited stock could leave you with nothing to sell.

Continue to grow your business with eBay
----------------------------------------

Wondering where to go next? We’ve got you covered.

### Reach more buyers

Connect to buyers when you use eBay Advertising. You can set up campaigns easily to promote your items.

### Keep shoppers coming back

Engage your eBay Store subscribers with targeted newsletters that drive repeat purchases.

# German packaging act | Seller Center

What the German Packaging Act means for you
===========================================

On this page

*   [About the 2019 Packaging Act (VerpackG)](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/going-global/german-packaging-act#about-the-2019-packaging-act-verpack-g-)
    
*   [What you need to do](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/going-global/german-packaging-act#what-you-need-to-do)
    
*   [FAQ](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/going-global/german-packaging-act#f-a-q)
    

About the 2019 Packaging Act (VerpackG)
---------------------------------------

The 2019 Packaging Act (VerpackG) requires business sellers to license the packaging for their products and register with the [LUCID database](https://www.verpackungsregister.org/en/information-orientation/knowledge-base/mail-order-companies-and-online-retailers)
 when they sell items to customers in Germany. From July 1, 2022, we are legally obliged to make sure that our sellers are complying with these regulations. 

This law forms a part of sellers’ Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR), which is a series of measures aimed at protecting the environment by improving waste management, limiting the use of landfills, and stimulating innovation in recycling. The 2019 Packaging Act applies to all businesses selling goods in the German marketplace, both domestic and international. To be compliant, you’ll need to license and register your packaging when you sell products in or into Germany, including product packaging, shipping packaging, and any filler materials used.

To help make the adjustment as smooth as possible, we’ve partnered with Lizenzero, an experienced solutions provider. For full details of the process and a comprehensive range of support services, we recommend that you contact their team.

[Visit Lizenzero](https://www.lizenzero.de/en/ebay)

![Illustration of shipping materials which much be licensed: filling material, bubble wrap, wrapping tissue, air cushion, filling material, polystyrene, shipping carton, plastic tapes, and packing tape](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/06/packaging_illustration.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

What you need to do
-------------------

In order to be compliant with these regulations, you’ll need to complete these steps:

1.  [License your packaging](https://www.lizenzero.de/en/ebay)
    . We’ve partnered with Lizenzero who offers a straightforward way to license your packaging (a licensing fee will be required).
    
2.  [Register with the LUCID database](https://www.verpackungsregister.org/en/information-orientation/knowledge-base/mail-order-companies-and-online-retailers)
    .
    
3.  [Add your LUCID ID number](https://accountsettings.ebay.com/profile)
     to your eBay seller account and you’re good to go.

FAQ
---

### Does all my packaging have to be licensed?

Yes, the Packaging Act applies to all packaging placed on the German market. All companies, including SMEs, are now legally required to license their packaging.

### Why do I have to pay my dual system a licensing fee?

Your licensing fee pays for the disposal and recycling of your packaging from the point of sale to the time it is disposed of as waste.

### What is the Central Agency Packaging Register?

The Central Agency Packaging Register (ZSVR) oversees compliance with the Packaging Act by maintaining the LUCID database. As LUCID is a public-access register, compliance can also be checked by third parties. Dual systems provide regular updates of customers’ licensed packaging quantities to the ZSVR. If irregularities or deviations should occur, the ZSVR can issue official warnings, impose fines, or ban sales.

### Do I need to include any licensing logos on my packaging?

No, this is no longer required.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=85a2c237-3f1a-94d4-c31d-ce827fa6b787&ctx_pageTitle=German+packaging+act+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)
