# Handling time | Seller Center

Handling time
=============

On this page

*   [What is handling time?](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/preparing-your-shipment/handling-time#what-is-handling-time-)
    
*   [How to set my listing’s handling time](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/preparing-your-shipment/handling-time#how-to-set-my-listing-s-handling-time)
    

What is handling time?
----------------------

Handling time is the number of days between when you receive payment for an item and when your package is scanned by your shipping carrier. This can include business days only, or you have the option to include Saturdays and/or Sundays if you ship on those days.

**Here’s an example**: If you choose 1-day handling, your sold item should be prepped, packaged, and scanned by the following day at 11:59:59 p.m. in your local time zone. If it’s not, your item could be delivered late, making your buyer dissatisfied, and your seller rating could be impacted.

![Graphic treatment of a  smartphone displaying the eBay website showing handling time options with an eBay package in the background.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/10/handling-time-n-business-days-1200x720.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

#### Choosing a handling time

Our advice is to choose the quickest handling time you can consistently meet. This will make your items more attractive to buyers; they expect fast and reliable delivery.

  

**Smart ship tip**: Offering and delivering same-day handling or 1-day handling, along with at least a 30-day money-back return policy, can help you qualify for a [Top Rated Plus](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/protections/top-rated-program)
 discount and seal.

#### How handling time impacts estimated delivery dates

Handling time is included in the shipping schedule that’s communicated to your buyer. It’s important to operate based on the handling time you’ve selected, regardless of what it is. Buyers want to receive their item on the estimated delivery date they saw at checkout—no later.

How to set my listing’s handling time
-------------------------------------

1.  In the [Seller Hub](https://www.ebay.com/sh/lst/active)
    , click on Listings in the top navigation, then select the listing you want to update.
2.  Click on **Edit fields** and select **Handling time** from the dropdown menu.
3.  When the **Edit handling time** pop-up window appears, go to the **Handling time** dropdown menu and select **Change to**, then choose your preferred time from the second dropdown menu. Once you have made your selection, click **Save** and **Close**.

![Graphic treatment of a computer monitor displaying an eBay account with shipping details displaying handling time options.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/06/set-handling-time-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Looking for more answers?
=========================

[See FAQs](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/faqs)

![A stack of eBay branded paper mailjackets with an eBay shipping Label applied on a green backdrop.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/06/ebay-envelopes-1440x992.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=7f3c68c1-114a-46ff-af79-080c909fb6b1&ctx_pageTitle=Handling+time+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Volume pricing | Seller Center

Volume pricing
==============

Incentivize buyers to buy more with volume pricing. It’s perfect for items that people buy regularly or want to stock up on.

On this page

*   [What is volume pricing?](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/seller-hub-discounts/volume-pricing#what-is-volume-pricing-)
    
*   [Benefits of volume pricing](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/seller-hub-discounts/volume-pricing#benefits-of-volume-pricing)
    
*   [Tips for creating successful volume discounts](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/seller-hub-discounts/volume-pricing#tips-for-creating-successful-volume-discounts)
    
*   [How do buyers know when there is a volume discount?](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/seller-hub-discounts/volume-pricing#how-do-buyers-know-when-there-is-a-volume-discount-)
    
*   [How to create a volume pricing discount](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/seller-hub-discounts/volume-pricing#how-to-create-a-volume-pricing-discount)
    
*   [Dashboard and reporting](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/seller-hub-discounts/volume-pricing#dashboard-and-reporting)
    

What is volume pricing?
-----------------------

How many items do you usually sell at a time? One? Sometimes two? With volume pricing, you could increase your average order size to three, four, or more. Whether they’re buying multiple units to give as gifts or they just want to have a spare, your buyers will appreciate the value of volume pricing.

When you set up volume pricing on your listings, your buyer can select multiple units with one click and the reduced price is automatically applied.

**Examples of volume discounts include:**

*   Save 5% when you buy 2
    
*   Save 10% when you buy 3
    
*   Save 20% when you buy 4+
    

eBay Store subscribers can find volume pricing on the marketing tab within Seller Hub.

[Try volume pricing](https://www.ebay.com/sh/mkt)

Benefits of volume pricing
--------------------------

Volume pricing can increase average order size and improve profit margins. Offering free delivery when shipping multiple units together in one package can be more profitable than paying for individual shipping costs. At the same time, buyers will come away knowing they got a great deal.

Tips for creating successful volume discounts
---------------------------------------------

*   **Time your sale.** Consider which items peak in which months and align your discounts with sports events, Christmas, Black Friday, etc.
*   **Consider your stock quantities and item costs.** Make sure you have enough stock before putting items on sale; and pick items where you can retain a useful profit margin.
    

How do buyers know when there is a volume discount?
---------------------------------------------------

Your discounts are prominently displayed in a variety of places on eBay. After searching or browsing, the buyer can see available discounts appear in red font in the list view. This makes it easier for buyers to scan for deals while swiping or scrolling. Discounts are also displayed on the View item page, Shopping cart and Checkout page, your store’s Discount page, and your store’s All Offers page.

![Volume discount mock-up](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2021/06/EB-7896_SSM-Seller-Hub-US-mock-ups_volume-pricing_multi-buy_01.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

How to create a volume pricing discount
---------------------------------------

eBay Store subscribers can set up an order discount by going to the Marketing tab on Seller Hub. Select “Discounts” to create a discount. Then choose “Order Size Discount” from the drop-down menu.

Next, you’ll need to specify which listings you want to include in your volume discount. You can apply volume discounts to multiple units of the same item or include different items that are discounted when bought together.

![Volume Pricing Set tier pricing screenshot](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2021/09/EB-7896_SSM-Seller-Hub-US-mock-ups_volume-pricing_03.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Dashboard and reporting
-----------------------

eBay’s Seller Hub Discounts dashboard helps you understand your overall discount performance. Here you can see your base sales (sales without a discount activated), discounted sales (sales with a discount activated), and sales lift (discounted sales divided by total sales).

If you have many discounts, you can filter by offer type and status or use the search box to quickly find offers and see the performance of each discount. You can even download reports from eBay’s Seller Hub Discounts dashboard to share with others.  

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/06/dash-and-reporting-2.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=cacab27b-0f5a-f60a-a508-b2702de784a7&ctx_pageTitle=Volume+pricing+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

---

# Packaging and measuring | Seller Center

Packaging and measuring
=======================

On this page

*   [The importance of packaging](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/preparing-your-shipment/packaging-and-measuring#the-importance-of-packaging)
    
*   [Tips to package like a pro](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/preparing-your-shipment/packaging-and-measuring#tips-to-package-like-a-pro)
    
*   [Measurements you’ll need](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/preparing-your-shipment/packaging-and-measuring#measurements-you-ll-need)
    
*   [Other measurements](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/preparing-your-shipment/packaging-and-measuring#other-measurements)
    
*   [Preventing shipping label price adjustments](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/preparing-your-shipment/packaging-and-measuring#preventing-shipping-label-price-adjustments)
    

Declare irregular packaging on eBay Labels
------------------------------------------

Carriers charge additional fees for shipments using nonstandard or irregular packaging. To ensure accurate shipping costs when using USPS®, UPS®, or FedEx®, you’ll need to identify your irregular packages when you list your item and purchase labels.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/preparing-your-shipment/packaging-and-measuring#irregular)

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/07/sc_packaging_irregular_1200x720.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

The importance of packaging
---------------------------

Getting a package is an exciting moment for buyers. Make it even more special with secure, professional packaging. It can help boost your seller ratings and drive repeat sales by making your business appear extra polished.

![Two eBay sellers sitting at a table preparing boxes for delivery and managing orders on their laptop.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/06/packaging-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Tips to package like a pro
--------------------------

#### Package your item with care

Prevent your items from getting damaged in transit. Be sure to carefully wrap your items, especially fragile ones, and securely seal every box or envelope.

#### Be picky when reusing packaging

Your packaging is a reflection of your business. Only reuse boxes that are in excellent condition and make sure all previous markings and labels have been removed or covered. Any visible markings from a previous label may result in delivery delays or returns.

#### Don’t mix and match carriers

Using one carrier’s branded packaging when you’re shipping with another carrier could cause returned shipments. Use generic or eBay-branded packaging or packaging provided by the carrier you’re shipping with only.

#### Use eBay shipping supplies

We offer a range of competitively priced, high-quality shipping supplies. Shop eBay-branded boxes, envelopes, bubble mailers, tape, and more.

[Order supplies](https://www.ebay.com/str/ebayshippingsupplies)

Expert tips for packaging your item
-----------------------------------

Discover the impact of packaging with insights from experienced sellers.

![Sellers Talk Shipping! Expert tips for Packaging your item](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/11/ST-Ep5-Sonny-Does-Packaging-Matter-SC-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Measurements you’ll need
------------------------

When estimating shipping costs, the size and shape of a package, or the dimensions, are just as important as weight. There are a few key package measurements you’ll need, then we’ll calculate shipping costs for you. Measuring these correctly will prevent additional charges and returned packages.

**Smart ship tip**: No matter what you’re measuring, always round up to the nearest whole number.

**Length**  
Length is the longest side of the package, rounded up to the nearest inch.

**Width**  
Width is the shortest side of the package, rounded up to the nearest inch.

**Height**  
Height is from the base to the top of package, rounded up to the nearest inch.

**Weight**  
The package’s weight on a scale.

![eBay branded box with graphic dashes showing dimensions for the height weight and length.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/06/dimensions-1200x1440.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

### To learn more about specific carrier measuring standards, visit:

[USPS](https://faq.usps.com/s/article/Parcel-Size-Weight-Fee-Standards)
              [FedEx](https://www.fedex.com/content/dam/fedex/us-united-states/services/Service_Guide_2026.pdf#page=129)
              [UPS](https://assets.ups.com/adobe/assets/urn:aaid:aem:356d938a-4f0a-4c71-b50e-bdd890f50b47/original/as/daily-rates-us-en.pdf#page=21)

Other measurements
------------------

### Curious what else is involved in calculating shipping costs? eBay also uses girth and DIM weight:

#### Girth

Girth is the distance around or circumference of a package, rounded up to the nearest inch. Keep in mind that most carriers have maximum girth limits. Get details by visiting [USPS](https://faq.usps.com/s/article/Parcel-Size-Weight-Fee-Standards#oversized_price)
®, [FedEx](https://www.fedex.com/content/dam/fedex/us-united-states/services/Service_Guide_2023.pdf)
® and [UPS](https://www.ups.com/assets/resources/webcontent/en_US/retail_rates.pdf)
®.

  

Girth for rectangular packages = (2 x width) + (2 x height).

  

Girth for cylindrical packages = circumference of the cylinder.

  

#### DIM weight

DIM weight is your package’s height x length x width, divided by applicable carrier DIM divisor. It’s not the package’s weight on a scale.

  

Billable shipping is based on whichever cost is greater — the dimensional calculation or the actual scale weight of the package.

[Watch DIM weight video](https://www.youtube.com/embed/bPnEQA2G2oo)
[See DIM weight guide](https://ir.ebaystatic.com/cr/v/c01/shipping/DIM_Weight_Guide_08182025.pdf)

Preventing shipping label price adjustments
-------------------------------------------

A shipping label price adjustment happens when you purchase a shipping label and the carrier determines that you’ve provided inaccurate information that results in an incorrect shipping label price. The difference is typically charged or credited to the original payment method used to purchase the shipping label.

Here’s how to avoid the most common ones we see:

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/06/inaccurate-dimensions-1200x900.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

#### Inaccurate package dimensions or weight

You’ll be charged if a carrier audits your package, and the dimensions or weight are different from the inputs provided when the label was generated. Or when the weight or dimensions of the package exceed the carrier’s weight or size restrictions.

  

**Smart ship tip**: Always round up when you’re doing your own calculations. You can double-check your numbers before generating your shipping label using our [shipping calculator](https://www.ebay.com/shp/Calculator)
.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/06/irrregular-package-1200x900.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

#### Irregular packages

There are additional charges for shipping using nonstandard packaging. This includes items that are not fully encased in a corrugated box or outer shipping container, and cylindrical items such as mailing tubes, buckets, or pails.

**Smart ship tip:** Get familiar with your carrier’s requirements and fees for irregular packages by visiting [USPS](https://pe.usps.com/text/DMM300/201.htm#7.6.1)
®, [FedEx](https://www.fedex.com/content/dam/fedex/us-united-states/services/Service_Guide_2025.pdf#page=128)
®, and [UPS](https://www.ups.com/assets/resources/webcontent/en_US/daily_rates.pdf#page=181)
®.  

![A blue and grey graphic picture of a delivery truck on a grey backdrop](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/06/services-added-after-calculating-shipping-200x900.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

#### Services added after calculating shipping

You could be charged for services added after calculating shipping like Saturday delivery, address correction (rerouting package), future day pick-up, or on-call pick-up (if the sender does not have an account with UPS or FedEx).

  

**Smart ship tip**: Be aware of services that cost extra and double check address details.

Looking for more answers?
=========================

[See FAQs](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/faqs)

![A stack of eBay branded paper mailjackets with an eBay shipping Label applied on a green backdrop.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/06/ebay-envelopes-1440x992.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=04f388a4-1ec0-4c07-b772-9f24e4decfd0&ctx_pageTitle=Packaging+and+measuring+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Create great listings | Seller Center

Create great listings
=====================

Get the attention of potential buyers actively searching for items you’re selling with these listing tips.

On this page

*   [Listing is where it all begins](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/create-listings#listing-is-where-it-all-begins)
    
*   [Create a listing in 5 steps](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/create-listings#create-a-listing-in-5-steps)
    
*   [Two ways to set up your listings](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/create-listings#two-ways-to-set-up-your-listings)
    
*   [Write a listing title that stands out](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/create-listings#write-a-listing-title-that-stands-out)
    
*   [Build trust with buyers by adding the item’s condition](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/create-listings#build-trust-with-buyers-by-adding-the-item-s-condition)
    
*   [Photos and videos can make the sale](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/create-listings#photos-and-videos-can-make-the-sale)
    
*   [Details make the listing](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/create-listings#details-make-the-listing)
    
*   [Price your items competitively](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/create-listings#price-your-items-competitively)
    

Listing is where it all begins
------------------------------

Think of your listing as a digital window display—every detail matters. From the title to the photos can influence your buyer's decision to view and purchase what you’re selling. Step into your buyer’s shoes and ask yourself what would attract you to an item.

Create a listing in 5 steps
---------------------------

1.  Write a title that pops
2.  Use eye-catching photos and video
3.  Add item specifics that inform your buyer
4.  Use a detailed description that excites potential buyers
5.  Price the item competitively  
    

**Tip:** Listing in bulk? Create a listing template available on **Seller Hub** to simplify your listing and have templates ready to use for what you sell.

[Create a new template](https://www.ebay.com/lstng/template?mode=AddItem)

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/05/sc_listings_title_1200x1200.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Two ways to set up your listings
--------------------------------

### Auctions

Buyers can compete for your item by bidding. You can use this for rare, limited edition, or high-profile, high-demand items.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/listings/selling-auctions?id=4110)

### Buy It Now

Set a fixed price so buyers can buy your item immediately. This is ideal for multiple items or when offering variations like size.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/listings/selling-buy-now?id=4109)

Write a listing title that stands out
-------------------------------------

When a buyer searches for an item, eBay’s system finds the listing titles that closely match.

You’ve got 80 characters to use, so use as many as you can in your title. Include the brand, model or type, color, style, and even the model number. Avoid using special characters or irrelevant words. Here are some great examples.

*   Ann Taylor Women’s Sweater 100% Cotton Black Yellow Sleeves Size 6
*   Nike Boys Blue Lace-Up Sneakers Size 3 AB0011-234

**Tip:** Save time with our AI tool to help you write your listing descriptions. The AI-powered tool suggests an attention-grabbing item description at the touch of a button. You can use the suggested description or customize it to add more detail, adjust for accuracy, or fit your business’ unique voice.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/05/sc_listings_standouttitle_1200x1200.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Build trust with buyers by adding the item’s condition
------------------------------------------------------

Buyers like to know what they're getting, so be accurate and transparent about your item’s condition. By describing your item accurately, you can help customers understand what they're buying, which can reduce the chance of a return. 

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/help/listings/creating-managing-listings/creating-managing-listings?id=4105#section2)

Photos and videos can make the sale
-----------------------------------

The more photos you add of your item, highlighting all angles and any imperfections, the more confident buyers will feel about what they’re getting. 

*   ![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/05/sc_listings_photos_664x360.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)
    
    ### Photos get attention
    
    Discover how photos can spark buyers’ interest when they’re viewing your items. These tips can help you create eye-catching listings.
    
    [Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/photo-tips)
    
*   ![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/05/sc_listings_videos_664x360.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)
    
    ### Upload videos of your item
    
    When you add a video of your item, it really brings it to life. Your buyer can see how it works and make an informed choice.
    
    [Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/seller-uploaded-videos)
    

**Tip**: Make your photos stand out with automatic background removal or create studio quality images using AI-generated background images feature available on the eBay mobile app.

Details make the listing
------------------------

The more information you include, the more likely your item will show up in relevant searches—and appeal to buyers. Accurate, thorough details can help increase your chances of making the sale.

### Search filters set up right

Add item specifics to help increase the chances of appearing in a buyer’s search results. To make it easier for you, we’ve set-up prefilled item specifics to help you create your listings.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/item-specifics)

### A great product description can be a game changer

Write a description of your item that can help buyers decide to make a purchase. Include information about the item's brand name, style, and model numbers, along with any unique qualities.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/help/listings/creating-managing-listings/creating-listing?id=4105#section1)

Price your items competitively
------------------------------

Set a price that’s fair for you and attracts a buyer’s attention. Here’s some tips you can use to price your items.

Research the right price
------------------------

Buyers love free shipping
-------------------------

Conducting research on price strategy and setting a competitive price is a key factor in attracting buyers. Here are some things to try:

*   Use our Product Research tool in Seller Hub or in the eBay app to see how similar items are priced.
*   Try the camera icon in the eBay app to capture your item and instantly find matching listings with current prices.
*   Run a web search to see how your item is priced on other sites.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-research-tools)

It’s true that buyers prefer free shipping but this may not be possible for certain items, so choose what's right for your business. 

*   Consider which listings are less impacted if you were to offer free shipping.
*   Use Seller Hub Discounts, such as Volume Pricing or Order Size Discounts, to send more than one item in the same shipment.

Continue your eBay journey
--------------------------

Now that you’re set up to make your listings even better, dive into elevating them to the next level.

*   ![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/05/sc_listings_manage_listings_664x360.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)
    
    ### Manage your listings
    
    Using the right tools for your business can save you time. We’ve got some great tools developed with you in mind.
    
    [Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/listing-tools)
    
*   ![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/05/sc_listings_showcase_listings_664x360.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)
    
    ### Showcase your listings
    
    A great marketing plan is to use social media to attract more buyers. You can easily share listings in a few clicks.
    
    [Learn how](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/share-to-social)
    

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=ee01f3b1-fc75-47eb-9308-19293a513a0a&ctx_pageTitle=Create+great+listings+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Preparing your shipment | Seller Center

Preparing your shipment
=======================

Set yourself up for shipping success.

![eBay seller's hands holding up a box with eBay branded tape with a green backdrop](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/06/ebay-package-1440x992.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

On this page

*   [Calculate your item’s shipping costs](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/preparing-your-shipment#calculate-your-item-s-shipping-costs)
    
*   [Choose your shipping settings](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/preparing-your-shipment#choose-your-shipping-settings)
    
*   [Give your buyers choices](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/preparing-your-shipment#give-your-buyers-choices)
    
*   [Combined shipping](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/preparing-your-shipment#combined-shipping)
    
*   [Explore more in preparing your shipment](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/preparing-your-shipment#explore-more-in-preparing-your-shipment)
    

Calculate your item’s shipping costs
------------------------------------

Having accurate and competitive shipping costs in your listings can generate more bids and future purchases. You can use our shipping calculator to easily estimate how much it would cost to ship a certain item.

[Run the numbers](https://www.ebay.com/shp/Calculator)

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/06/shipping-calculator-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Choose your shipping settings
-----------------------------

### The shipping type you choose appears in your listing and determines the shipping fees your buyer will pay. Each of the three options has its own advantages—pick the one that fits your needs best.

#### Free shipping

**Boost conversion rates with seller-paid shipping**

  

Buyers often expect free shipping. In fact, they’re more likely to choose an item with free shipping over an item with a shipping fee, even if the total cost is the same. Give your buyers what they want and offer free shipping by adding the shipping cost into your item’s price.

[How to set it up](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/posting-items/estimated-delivery-dates?id=4086#section3)

#### Calculated shipping

**Buyer pays low shipping rates with eBay Labels**

  

With this shipping option, we automatically update the shipping charge a buyer sees based on their location, the details you provide on your package, and delivery service. 

[How to set it up](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/posting-items/postage-rates/shipping-calculator?id=4178)

#### Flat rate shipping

**Keep it simple by setting a consistent shipping cost for buyers**

  

If you sell similar items, like t-shirts, you can set the same shipping cost for them all. Then, you don’t have to worry about changing the fee with every item you list.

[How to set it up](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/shipping-items/shipping-rates/shipping-discounts?id=4168#section2)

Give your buyers choices
------------------------

Did you know that buyers are often willing to pay more for expedited shipping services, especially when they’re shopping at the last minute? By offering a variety of shipping options, including expedited services, you not only meet your buyers' needs but also boost your chances of capturing more sales.

Setting this up is simple. After selecting your primary shipping method, just click 'Additional domestic service' and choose the best options for your business. We recommend including at least one buyer-paid expedited choice for those in a hurry.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/11/sc_shipping_give_buyers_choices_1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Full time resellers de-mystify shipping options
-----------------------------------------------

Hear from experienced sellers about how selecting the right shipping options can make your items more attractive to buyers.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/11/ST-Ep4-Brian-Whats-Deal-Shipping-Options-SC-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Combined shipping
-----------------

Reduce shipping costs for buyers who purchase more than one item by letting them activate a shipping discount. You can charge a higher shipping cost for the first item and add a lower cost for each additional item. Then combine items into one shipment.

### When to use it

Combined shipping is a great option if you sell items that can be easily combined into one box or envelope, such as:

*   Collectibles (toys, action figures, Hot Wheels, Beanie Babies, Funko Pops, etc.)
*   Printed literature (including books, comic books, magazines & other paper ephemera)
*   Recorded media (vinyl records, CDs, DVDs, cassettes, etc.)
*   Clothing
*   Jewelry
*   Many other small and/or light items

[Get started](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/shipping-items/shipping-rates/offering-combined-shipping?id=4169)

![Graphic grid with images of small items that can be sold on eBay including collectible figurines, trading cards, watches, AirPods, books, and posters.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/06/mosaic-1200x1200.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Explore more in preparing your shipment
---------------------------------------

![A woman using a measuring tape for an eBay shipping box on top of a weight scale.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/06/measure-box-1200x900.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

#### Packaging and measuring

How to pack and measure your item for a smooth, secure delivery.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/preparing-your-shipment/packaging-and-measuring)

![An eBay seller in a storage room taping boxes stacked on top of each other to be shipped with eBay Labels.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/08/taping-box-1200x900.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

#### Handling time

Learn what handing time is and how it impacts delivery schedule.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/preparing-your-shipment/handling-time)

![A woman’s hands holding on to a package with an eBay label and a hazmat label with a green backdrop.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/08/hazardous-material-label-1200x900.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

#### Shipping hazardous materials

Know how to identify and ship hazardous items.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/preparing-your-shipment/know-what-qualifies-as-hazmat)

Looking for more answers?
=========================

[See FAQs](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/faqs)

![A stack of eBay branded paper mailjackets with an eBay shipping Label applied on a green backdrop.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/06/ebay-envelopes-1440x992.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=db95ef89-f820-4f1e-8a5b-33561e4f7cf4&ctx_pageTitle=Preparing+your+shipment+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Freight | Seller Center

Freight
=======

On this page

*   [What is freight?](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/choosing-a-carrier-and-service/freight#what-is-freight-)
    
*   [Flat-rate freight vs freight rate tables](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/choosing-a-carrier-and-service/freight#flat-rate-freight-vs-freight-rate-tables)
    
*   [Track freight with these carriers](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/choosing-a-carrier-and-service/freight#track-freight-with-these-carriers)
    

What is freight?
----------------

Most small package carriers including USPS®, FedEx®, and UPS® only support items up to certain weights and dimensions. If you’re selling oversized items, consider listing and shipping with freight carriers. It’s the most economical option for delivering large, heavy items like appliances, furniture, large car parts, or gym equipment.

![woman in warehouse holding scanner](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/02/freight_shipping_600x373.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Flat-rate freight vs freight rate tables
----------------------------------------

You can offer freight shipping options in one of two ways: flat-rate freight or freight rate tables. Both give the buyers information up front that helps to minimize back-and-forth communication with buyers while also allowing them to check out immediately.

Flat-rate freight
-----------------

Freight rate tables
-------------------

Using flat-rate freight is a simple and efficient process. It lets you offer a single flat shipping cost or free freight to all U.S. buyers regardless of distance or location.

If your freight shipping costs vary by region, you can pass those costs along to your buyers using a freight rate table. This gives you complete control over what you’ll charge, based on up to 100 buyer regions within the U.S. After you build your table using our tools, you can apply it within your listing flow or business policy and save for future use.

Track freight with these carriers
---------------------------------

We’ve expanded the list of freight carriers eBay can track to help buyers follow their purchase along its journey. When you upload tracking numbers, make sure to tag the correct freight carrier and then tracking will be available for buyers. This will reduce inquiries about the status of that purchase while also minimizing “Item Not Received” claims.

[See carriers we track](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/shipping-items/setting-shipping-options?id=4089#freight)

![tracking package screenshot](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/02/track_freight_600x373.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Looking for more answers?
=========================

[See FAQs](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/faqs)

![A stack of eBay branded paper mailjackets with an eBay shipping Label applied on a green backdrop.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/06/ebay-envelopes-1440x992.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=1d85b302-4d44-4c24-adba-eb9417cafdf5&ctx_pageTitle=Freight+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Seller Clinics | Seller Center

Get one-on-one support with free Seller Clinics
===============================================

Grow your business with advice from an expert Marketplace Advisor.

![A woman wearing a headset works at her office desk.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/09/mobile-hero.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)![A woman wearing a headset works at her office desk.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/08/eb-22268_q3_us_b2cselling_seller-clinics-landing-page_aug-11_module-1_hero_desktop_2880x992_final.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Fast, flexible support with Seller Clinics
------------------------------------------

Eligible sellers who are [registered as a business](https://www.ebay.com/sl/tof/business-selling)
 can now take advantage of free Seller Clinics to give you easy access to growth support when you need it. Simply book a phone call appointment and you’ll be paired with a Marketplace Advisor who can offer you personalized advice on how to grow your business.  

[Book an appointment](https://calendly.com/d/cwq5-4s2-fdh)

![A man wearing headphones works at desk in his living room.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/08/eb-22268_q3_us_b2cselling_seller-clinics-landing-page_aug-11_module-2_desktop_1200x1200_final.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

How can Seller Clinics support your business?
---------------------------------------------

If you’re looking for new ways to scale and grow, a free Seller Clinic appointment can help you with expert advice—tailored to the unique needs of your business. Whether you’re looking for advice on eBay’s extensive range of services and tools or pursuing new opportunities for expansion, speaking to an eBay expert during your 45-minute session can help you achieve new heights for your business.

You can get support with:

*   eBay foundations, such as listing and setting up your Store
*   Taking your Store to the next level with eBay tools and services
*   Accelerating growth with eBay Advertising
*   Seller standards and shipping  
    

To get the most out of your Seller Clinic session, choose a topic you’d like support with. This will help your Marketplace Advisor prepare ahead of time to optimize your session.  

[**See Terms**](https://pages.ebay.com/growth/seller-clinic-terms)

Book an appointment
-------------------

On Calendly, select a date and time that works for you, and one of our expert Marketplace Advisors will give you a call at your scheduled time. Even though appointment times can be edited within Calendly, we ask that you try to keep to your original time. That way, you can be paired with the advisor that has prepared for your unique topic.

[Get started](https://calendly.com/d/cwq5-4s2-fdh)

![A woman stands and smiles holding an iPad in the hallway of a store.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/08/eb-22268_q3_us_b2cselling_seller-clinics-landing-page_aug-11_module-4_desktop_1200x1200_final.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

FAQs
----

**Who is eligible?**  
Seller Clinics are available to business sellers who meet all of the following criteria: 

*   Are [registered as a business](https://www.ebay.com/sl/tof/business-selling)
     on the [eBay.com](http://ebay.com/)
     site;
*   Are physically based in the United States; and
*   Have delivered a Gross Merchandise Value (GMV) of less than $100,000 on eBay within the 12-month period before their first appointment

**How do I check if I am registered as a business?**  
You can check your registration type under Account settings > Personal information > Account type. Under account type, you can confirm if you’re a business account. If you are registered as an “Individual,” you have the option to upgrade to a business account. 

**Is there a charge associated with booking a session?**  
No, the session is free of charge.

**Can I book a follow-up session with the same Marketplace Advisor?**  
You’ll be assigned a different Marketplace Advisor for each session, so you won’t be able to book one with the same advisor. However, every advisor is equipped to deal with a broad range of topics and will be able to offer a fresh perspective.  
   

**Do I need to provide anything ahead of the appointment?**  
No, getting started is easy. Just book an appointment via the provided Calendly link and select the topic you’d like to discuss.

  
**What can I expect to get from the session?**  
You can expect to speak with a Marketplace Advisor who will provide personalized advice for your eBay business, based on the topic you’ve pre-selected to discuss during the session. 

  
**How many of these sessions can I make use of?**  
You can take advantage of three Seller Clinic sessions per calendar year.  

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=6188cafe-f1cb-93b3-0fd0-b9735563c0d9&ctx_pageTitle=Seller+Clinics+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Great Price badge | Seller Center

Great Price badge
=================

Make your listings stand out with a Great Price badge.

On this page

*   [What is a Great Price badge?](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/great-price-badge#what-is-a-great-price-badge-)
    
*   [How Great Price works](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/great-price-badge#how-great-price-works)
    
*   [FAQs](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/great-price-badge#f-a-qs)
    

What is a Great Price badge?
----------------------------

A Great Price badge helps eBay shoppers quickly and easily discover high quality inventory at highly competitive prices. When a Great Price badge appears with your qualified listing, your item will get buyers’ attention because they know they’ve found a great product at a great price.

### Great Price badge benefits

*   Allows buyers to easily identify exceptional values in their search results, narrow down their choices, and make the best purchase decisions
*   Great Price badges may automatically appear with your eligible listings at no cost and you don’t need to take any action
*   Spotlights products that are in high demand, based on sales history, search impressions, and buyer interest

### A Great Price badge may appear with eligible listings in buyers’ search results.

![Mock-up of a listing displaying headphones with a great price badge](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/07/great-price-badge-headphones-2400x992.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

How Great Price works
---------------------

eBay may automatically pin a Great Price badge on eligible listings that are competitively priced and in high demand on eBay, determined by factors such as sales history, search impressions, and engagement. The Great Price badge is not a paid feature and you don’t need to opt in to qualify.

### Great Price badge eligibility

Eligibility for a Great Price badge is determined by a combination of factors, such as:

*   **Seller performance.** Sellers must be in good standing with [Above Standard](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/seller-levels-performance-standards/seller-levels-performance-standards?id=4080)
     or [Top Rated](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/protections/top-rated-program)
     status. If you’re new to eBay, you can begin working toward eBay Above Standard and Top Rated status the first time you [list an item](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/listing-best-practices)
    .
*   **Competitive pricing.** Use [Product Research](https://www.ebay.com/sh/research)
    , our exclusive eBay insights tool in the Seller Hub Research tab, to get competitive insights and price your items accordingly. Our pricing guidance within the selling flow may also be helpful.
*   **Item specifics and product identifiers.** Help buyers find your items fast by providing complete [item specifics and product identifiers](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/product-identifiers)
     when you list.
*   **New or certified refurbished items that match products in our [catalog](https://www.ebay.com/help/listings/creating-managing-listings/listing-item-product-details-catalog?id=4653)
    .** Items must be in [new](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/listings/creating-managing-listings/item-conditions-category?id=4765)
     or [certified refurbished](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/ebay-refurbished-program)
     condition and associated with similar products in our catalog and include the corresponding [product identifiers](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/product-identifiers)
    .
*   **Other eligibility factors.** Additional eligibility criteria may include an item’s combined price and shipping cost, listing format, sales history, relevance to a buyer’s search terms, and the eBay site they’re browsing. Placement of listings in buyers’ search results is subject to [Best Match](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/listings/listing-tips/optimising-listings-best-match?id=4166)
     factors. Best Match is designed to show the most relevant listings, taking into account the things users find most important when they’re deciding what to buy.

Review your listings regularly to make sure they’re optimized for Best Price, including pricing reviews and [adding promotions](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/seller-hub-promotions)
 for your buyers. Learn more about listing optimization: [Watch a video](https://youtu.be/hfnFuJCsyx8)
.

### Further enhance your listings visibility with Promoted Listings Standard

[Promoted Listings Standard](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/promoted-listings/promoted-listings-standard)
, also available to Above Standard and Top Rated Sellers, can further boost your listings visibility among millions of listings on eBay and increase the likelihood your item will be discovered by active buyers who are searching for items like yours. Plus, you only pay for Promoted Listings Standard when your item sells.

FAQs
----

### What is a “Great Price badge?”

A Great Price badge is a blue icon that appears on qualified listings in buyers’ search results to help them easily identify competitively priced items listed by trusted sellers. Great Price is not a paid feature and the placement of listings in search results is subject to [Best Match](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/listings/listing-tips/optimising-listings-best-match?id=4166)
 factors. [Promoted Listings](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/promoted-listings/promoted-listings-standard)
 remains a separate program.

[![Great price badge on a karaoke machine listing](http://ir.ebaystatic.com/cr/v/c1/great_price_badge_karaoke_machine.png)](http://ir.ebaystatic.com/cr/v/c1/great_price_badge_karaoke_machine.png)
  

### Do I have to pay for a Great Price badge?

No. A Great Price may automatically appear on eligible listings at no cost to the seller.

### How does the Great Price badge work with Promoted Listings?

If a listing is eligible for both a Promoted Listing badge and a Great Price badge, the listing will show both badges.

### Can I opt out of displaying the Great Price badge?

A Great Price badge opt-out option is not currently available. Listings that qualify for a Great Price badge may automatically be highlighted in search results.

### On which international eBay sites is the Great Price badge available?

The Great Price badge is available on our US, UK, Germany, and Australia sites.

### Why does my listing, that’s priced lower than others, not have a Great Price badge?

Less expensive items that do not have a Great Price badge may not be eligible for a number of reasons, including:

*   The seller may be [Below Standard](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/seller-levels-performance-standards/seller-levels-performance-standards?id=4080#section7)
    
*   The item may not be matched to a product in our [catalog](https://www.ebay.com/help/listings/creating-managing-listings/listing-item-product-details-catalog?id=4653)
    
*   The item may not be in [new](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/listings/creating-managing-listings/item-conditions-category?id=4765)
     or [certified refurbished](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/ebay-refurbished-program)
     condition
*   An item may not satisfy other criteria related to listing history, shipping costs, listing format, relevance to buyer search terms, and buyer browsing site

### My item has both the lowest price and a Great Price badge. Why doesn’t it appear at the top of the search results?

The placement of listings in search results is subject to [Best Match](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/listings/listing-tips/optimising-listings-best-match?id=4166)
 factors.

### If a Great Price badge appears with my listing, will it remain until I sell the item?

No. A Great Price badge is not permanent and may be removed if, for example, another qualifying listing is better priced or if a similarly priced listing moves into [Best Match](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/listings/listing-tips/optimising-listings-best-match?id=4166)
. We encourage you to check your item’s competitive position and pricing using [eBay research tools](https://www.ebay.com/sh/research)
.

### Is item price the most important factor in qualifying for a Great Price badge?

Price is only one of a number of factors that qualify a listing for the Great Price badge. Other factors may include seller standards, reasonable shipping, good customer experience, and listing and selling practices per [Best Match](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/listings/listing-tips/optimising-listings-best-match?id=4166)
, which takes into account what our users find most important when they’re deciding what to buy.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=b2941476-6872-cd82-1044-5ebb9938e6d0&ctx_pageTitle=Great+Price+badge+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

---

# Know what qualifies as hazmat | Seller Center

Know what qualifies as hazmat
=============================

Avoid shipping delays and potential penalties by complying with hazardous materials shipping requirements.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Are you shipping hazardous materials without realizing it? Most packages with items containing lithium batteries, flammable liquids, aerosols and/or pesticides need to follow specific compliance rules before shipping. But in order to safely ship what you sell, you’ll need to know if your items fit into different classifications.  

[Review classifications](https://pages.ebay.com/hazmat-classifications/)

![package with eBay shipping label and battery indicator sticker](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/02/ebay-shipping-label-battery-v4-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Be aware of shipping requirements for lithium batteries
-------------------------------------------------------

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/12/switch-cellphone-battery-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

#### How to package and ship used electronic devices with lithium batteries

Almost all rechargeable devices, from cell phones to power tools, contain lithium batteries and may require that you declare the package contains hazardous materials when shipping your item.

When shipping with USPS, these items can only be sent via Ground Advantage. USPS is enforcing restrictions for used electronic devices containing lithium-ion batteries. You can’t drop these items in a mail collection box; you need to take them to a counter or schedule a pickup from USPS.

These packages also need to be marked ‘Restricted electronic device’ and ‘Surface transportation only.’

[Read more about USPS restrictions](https://pe.usps.com/text/pub52/pub52un.htm)
.

#### How to package and ship new or manufacturer refurbished products with lithium batteries

Packages being sent domestically containing new electronic devices, in original unopened packaging or manufacturer certified new or refurbished devices do not require you to select hazmat when printing your label on eBay. For more information on shipping new or manufacturer refurbished products with lithium batteries [read USPS Pub 52, Section 349](https://pe.usps.com/text/pub52/pub52c3_028.htm)
.

Check for other common hazardous items
--------------------------------------

Other commonly missed items that require special packaging are perfumes, nail polish, hairspray, cleaning supplies, and anything potentially containing flammable gas or liquid fuel (lighters, auto parts and accessories, etc.)

[See full list](https://pages.ebay.com/hazmat-classifications/)

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/12/swiss-knife-perfume-lighter-firecracker-plant-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

How to declare hazardous materials on eBay Labels
-------------------------------------------------

In order to properly declare a hazardous material shipment, click “Edit” and then select the applicable classification from the dropdown menu. Available shipping services will be limited based on the restrictions for the type of item you are shipping.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/12/hazmat-labels-flow-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Terms to know
-------------

#### Hazardous materials or dangerous goods

These are items that can cause harm or are dangerous during handling and transport (i.e. combustibles, carcinogens, poisons, or corrosive cleaners). They can be sent if labeled, packaged, and shipped correctly.

Read eBay’s complete [hazardous materials policy](https://www.ebay.com/help/policies/prohibited-restricted-items/hazardous-restricted-regulated-materials-policy?id=4335)
.

#### Restricted materials

Restricted items on eBay cannot be sold on the platform, regardless of service or carrier used. To read more about what you can and cannot sell on eBay, visit our [restricted items page](https://www.ebay.com/help/policies/prohibited-restricted-items/prohibited-restricted-items?id=4207)
.

In addition to following eBay’s restricted items policy, you also must abide by separate carrier-specific shipping restrictions.

*   [USPS Hazmat Rules](https://pe.usps.com/text/pub52/welcome.htm)
    
*   [FedEx Global Shipping Restrictions and Prohibited Items](https://www.fedex.com/en-us/shipping/international-prohibited-items.html)
    
*   [UPS List of Prohibited and Restricted Items for Shipping](https://www.ups.com/us/en/support/shipping-support/shipping-special-care-regulated-items/prohibited-items.page)
    

#### Compliance

Complying with HazMat requirements means correctly labeling and packaging your items in addition to abiding by eBay’s and your carrier’s specific hazmat requirements.

For USPS eBay Labels shipments, not following instructions could result in USPS rejecting the package, delaying the delivery, confiscating the item and/or imposing fines.

Package and label correctly
---------------------------

It’s your responsibility to ensure your shipments are packaged, labeled, and handled in compliance.

  

### Know what you can ship, and how to ship it.

Not following instructions could result in delays, confiscation of the item, imposition of eBay seller restrictions or suspension, and even being fined by USPS and government agencies. 

[Watch video](https://www.youtube.com/embed/m__KOqc8Idc)

![exclamation with box on background](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/10/box-exclamation-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

### When packaging items for shipping, very specific hazmat labels may be required.

They vary by item based on a number of criteria, but are separate from the eBay Label or other shipping labels.

**Tip**: Avoid reusing boxes with old hazmat stickers for non-hazmat items, as it could cause the package to be returned to sender.

[Get warning label requirements](https://pe.usps.com/text/pub52/pub52c3_006.htm)

![UN3481 and flammable liquid adhesives UN 1133 labels](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/10/battery-flammable-liquid-stickers-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Looking for more answers?
=========================

[See FAQs](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/faqs#shipping-hazardous-materials)

![A stack of eBay branded paper mail jackets with an eBay shipping Label applied on a green backdrop.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/06/ebay-envelopes-1440x992.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=882d5182-dd8c-470e-90cf-34fe1f9afbbc&ctx_pageTitle=Know+what+qualifies+as+hazmat+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Seller Help | Seller Center

Seller Help
===========

Manage common selling issues with this self-service resource.

On this page

*   [What is Seller Help?](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/protections/seller-help#what-is-seller-help-)
    
*   [Start using Seller Help](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/protections/seller-help#start-using-seller-help)
    
*   [Seller Help FAQs](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/protections/seller-help#seller-help-f-a-qs)
    

What is Seller Help?
--------------------

[Seller Help](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/selling-tools/seller-help?id=4996)
 is a self-service resource that lets you conveniently manage refunds, returns, “Item not received” and “Item not as described” cases, and other common selling issues all in one place. Seller Help can be accessed from desktop and mobile devices, and offers a simple and intuitive interface so you can address selling issues without delay.

With Seller Help, you can:

*   Manage refunds, returns, and “Items not received” and “Item not as described” cases all in one place.
    
*   Submit requests to eBay to review feedback and defects for removal.
    
*   See your recent policy notifications, including anything that went wrong and what you will need to do to correct an issue.
    
*   Report buyers who abuse eBay policies.
    
*   Request a selling limit increase
    

Start using Seller Help
-----------------------

**Step 1.** You can get to [Seller Help](https://www.ebay.com/sellerhelp)
 directly or from the homepage of our [Help pages](https://www.ebay.com/help/home)
  

![Help & Contact menu screenshot](https://ir.ebaystatic.com/pictures/sc/sr201/help_contact_menu_cropped.jpg)

**Step 2.** Select an option you need help with.

![Search eBay Help screenshot](https://ir.ebaystatic.com/pictures/sc/sr201/service_pic1.jpg)

  

**Step 3.** Example:

![Request assistance screenshot](https://ir.ebaystatic.com/pictures/sc/sr201/service_pic3.png)

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/selling-tools/seller-help?id=4996)

Seller Help FAQs
----------------

### How is Seller Help different from Seller Hub or My eBay?

Seller Help is a self-service resource to manage your refunds, returns, and “Item not received” and “Item not as described” claims in one convenient location. We’ll add more functionality in the future, such as managing canceled orders and chargebacks.

### Do I have to use Seller Help?

No. You can still use Seller Hub and [My eBay](https://www.ebay.com/mys/sold)
 just as before. However, the same functionality is available in Seller Help. If you find that Seller Help isn’t for you, there’s no need to opt out—simply stop using it.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=7d2b9bd1-9eba-d04a-553c-b3f27abd8d45&ctx_pageTitle=Seller+Help+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

Choosing a carrier and service
==============================

Ship with your preferred carrier and never pay retail rates again with eBay Labels

![Woman applying a shipping label to cardboard box on a table and using eBay labels for her choice of carrier.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/06/ebay-label-2880x992.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

On this page

*   [eBay Labels saves you time and money](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/choosing-a-carrier-and-service#e-bay-labels-saves-you-time-and-money)

eBay Labels saves you time and money
------------------------------------

Whether you’ve just sold your first or thousandth item, make sure you take advantage of all the benefits available to you as an eBay seller. We designed our eBay Labels service to make shipping a seamless experience. You can choose your preferred carrier, save money and grow your sales by shipping internationally.  

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/11/ST-Ep1-Brandi-Why-Use-Labels-SC-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

How eBay Labels works
---------------------

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/06/laptop-viewing-sneaker-1200x900.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

#### After the sale

When you sell an item, find it in the Sold section in My eBay or the Seller Hub and click “Print shipping label.” Enter the package’s weight and dimensions, then select a carrier and shipping method

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/06/ebay-label-1200x900.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

#### Generate label

Your buyer’s name and address are automatically loaded. Just choose “Purchase and print label” or “QR Code”

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/06/package-1200x900.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

#### Label and ship

Place the label on your package and ship it. Or, bring the QR code on your device to your carrier when you’re ready to send. Tracking is uploaded automatically for you and your buyer

No printer? No problem with QR codes
------------------------------------

Whenever you purchase a label through eBay Labels, a QR code will be automatically emailed to you. When you drop off your package with a participating carrier, you can use an in-store self-service station to scan the code and print the label, or have an associate do it for you.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/06/qr-codes-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Work with the shipping experts you trust
========================================

With eBay Labels, you’ll save big over retail rates, get free, automatic tracking and no subscription fees, no matter which shipping partner you choose. Simply select the service from USPS, FedEx or UPS that’s best for you and your buyer.

![A woman grabbing an eBay shipping label from the tray of a printer with a green backdrop.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/06/print-ebay-label-1440x992.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Let’s talk about shipping
-------------------------

No matter what you ship, or what your preferred carrier service is, you can save time and money with eBay Labels.  

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/11/ST-Ep2-Sonny-Which-Carriers-Work-Labels-SC-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

------------------------------------

Skip the line and enjoy the convenience of free home pickup.

# eBay standard envelope | Seller Center

eBay standard envelope
======================

On this page

*   [Save on small, lightweight shipments with the eBay standard envelope service](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/choosing-a-carrier-and-service/ebay-standard-envelope#save-on-small-lightweight-shipments-with-the-e-bay-standard-envelope-service)
    
*   [Eligible categories](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/choosing-a-carrier-and-service/ebay-standard-envelope#eligible-categories)
    
*   [The low-cost way to ship](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/choosing-a-carrier-and-service/ebay-standard-envelope#the-low-cost-way-to-ship)
    
*   [Packing your items](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/choosing-a-carrier-and-service/ebay-standard-envelope#packing-your-items)
    
*   [Tracking and protections](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/choosing-a-carrier-and-service/ebay-standard-envelope#tracking-and-protections)
    
*   [Ship small. Save big.](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/choosing-a-carrier-and-service/ebay-standard-envelope#ship-small-save-big-)
    
*   [eBay shipping solutions](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/choosing-a-carrier-and-service/ebay-standard-envelope#e-bay-shipping-solutions)
    

Save on small, lightweight shipments with the eBay standard envelope service
----------------------------------------------------------------------------

The low-cost shipping label comes with integrated, limited tracking and shipping protection. Learn more about the eBay standard envelope service below.

![putting mail on mailbox](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/09/mailbox-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Eligible categories
-------------------

As of Nov 2023, **four additional categories** are now eligible to use eBay standard envelope, expanding the service to eight categories. See the full list of [category paths](https://ir.ebaystatic.com/pictures/aw/pics/sc/pdf/ebay-standard-envelope-eligible-list.xlsx)
.

  

*   **Patches**
*   **Stickers & Decals**
*   **Greeting Cards**
*   **Seeds**
*   Trading Cards
*   Coins & Currency
*   Postcards
*   Stamps

The low-cost way to ship
------------------------

eBay standard envelope services are competitively priced and include seller benefits like integrated tracking and shipment protections at no additional cost.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Send 1 oz. packages for

$0.74

Send 2 oz. packages for

$1.03

Send 3 oz. packages for

$1.32

Packing your items
------------------

### Things to consider

**Flexibility.** Shipped envelopes are processed at sorting centers that use machinery with rollers, so envelopes need to be flexible enough to bend accordingly.

**Uniform thickness.** The maximum thickness allowed is ¼ inch. If your envelope or flat mailer isn’t uniformly thick and/or has bumps or lumps, it may be classified as a package, which could then be returned or subjected to additional postage fees.

**Which envelopes qualify?** A plain, number 10 envelope works just fine, but it’s not required. You can use any envelope that fits the following specifications:

*   No smaller than 3.5” x 5”
*   No larger than 6.125” x 11.5”
*   No heavier than 3 oz.
*   No plastic, strings or closures 
*   Recipient address is parallel to envelope’s longest side
*   Uniform thickness not greater than .25”

If you need to use a thicker or more rigid envelope to better protect what you’re shipping, check with your local post office to ensure your envelope fits the postage bracket and guidelines.

Need a visual aid? We’ve got you covered.

  

[View size template](https://ir.ebaystatic.com/pictures/sc/Shipping/ebay_standard_envelope_template.pdf)

Smart Ship Tip
--------------

If your item(s) fit into an envelope that’s smaller than 11” x 6” x 1” and is flexible enough to meet the eBay Standard Envelope guidelines, make sure your listing’s dimensions are updated to get eBay Standard Envelope as an eligible shipping option.

eBay’s trading card envelope kit
--------------------------------

Easily secure trading cards with our 3-pocket envelope kit and ship up to 24 cards with eBay Standard Envelope.

[Shop now](https://www.ebay.com/itm/256274542375?hash=item3bab272f27:g:eCIAAOSwJctlPtKf&var=556309088089)

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/01/envelope-kit-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Tracking and protections
------------------------

How does tracking work?

Which protection is included?

When you use the eBay standard envelope service, you’ll automatically receive integrated, limited tracking for your orders, which gets uploaded onto the printed shipping label. Next, simply drop your envelope off at any USPS location, mailbox kiosk, or inside your home mailbox with the flap up–the envelope doesn’t require an acceptance scan to successfully send. Once shipped, you and your buyer can track the package within My eBay, SellerHub, or transaction history.

Ship small. Save big.
---------------------

Get tracking and shipping protections on packages weighing up to 3 oz. and a quarter inch thick for about a dollar with eBay standard envelope.

![two monkey cards inserted to eBay envelope](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/12/monkey-cards-1200x720.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

eBay shipping solutions
-----------------------

# ShipCover Insurance | Seller Center

ShipCover Insurance
===================

Get more coverage when shipping high-valued shipments.

On this page

*   [Save big and protect your eBay shipments](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/shipcover-insurance#save-big-and-protect-your-e-bay-shipments)
    
*   [Add ShipCover to your shipment in a few clicks](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/shipcover-insurance#add-ship-cover-to-your-shipment-in-a-few-clicks)
    
*   [Great price for added coverage](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/shipcover-insurance#great-price-for-added-coverage)
    
*   [FAQs](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/shipcover-insurance#f-a-qs)
    

Save big and protect your eBay shipments
----------------------------------------

When you purchase USPS® shipping labels through eBay, you can add insurance coverage with ShipCover.\* ShipCover will cover domestic shipments up to $15,000 and international shipments up to $10,000. With this added protection, you can ship with confidence, knowing your packages are covered every step of the way.

\*ShipCover insurance is available through Parcel Insurance Plan. [Terms and conditions](https://pages.ebay.com/insurance/shipping/coverage.html)
 apply.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/05/sc_shipcover_save_big_1200x720.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Key benefits
------------

ShipCover offers extensive coverage giving you peace of mind when shipping. Here are some of the key advantages.

### Competitive rates

ShipCover insurance is priced competitively, offering a cost-effective alternative to purchasing coverage directly from USPS®.

### Convenient claims

Easily file your claim directly on eBay. Simply head to the Shipping Labels page in Seller Hub or My eBay.

### Timely updates

Track the status of your claim anytime in Seller Hub or My eBay, so you're always in the loop.

Add ShipCover to your shipment in a few clicks
----------------------------------------------

You can easily add ShipCover insurance under **Orders** in My eBay or your **Orders awaiting shipment** in Seller Hub.

[Learn how](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/shipcover/shipping-insurance?id=4643#section2)

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/05/sc_shipcover_ui_tablet_1200x720_r2.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Great price for added coverage
------------------------------

ShipCover insurance rates begin at $1.70 for every $100 of coverage for domestic shipping, and $2.82 for every $100 of coverage for international shipping.

[Check the rate card](https://pages.ebay.com/insurance/shipping/coverage.html)
 for USPS® domestic and international shipping.

FAQs
----

### How do I purchase ShipCover?

1.  Go to **Orders** in My eBay or your **Orders Awaiting Shipment** in Seller Hub.
2.  Choose the item you’d like to ship and select “Print shipping label.”
3.  In the **Additional Options** section, select “Additional liability coverage.”
4.  Select ShipCover Insurance and, if it isn’t prefilled, enter the amount of coverage you need, then select “Add.” The shipping cost section of the page shows the insurance cost.
5.  Read the terms of coverage, and check the box to agree.
6.  Select “Purchase shipping label.”

  

Finally, you’ll receive an email confirming that your shipment is insured, along with your insurance policy number.

### Can I purchase ShipCover insurance for any carrier?

Currently, ShipCover is only available for eBay shipments when you use USPS®. We may include other carriers in the future.

### If an item is lost or damaged, how do I file a claim?

1.  In Seller Hub, click on Shipping Labels under the Orders tab, and in My eBay, click on Shipping Labels in the Sell section under the Activity tab.
2.  Find the shipping label for the item and select “Create Claim” under “More Actions.
3.  Fill out the claim form.

### Once I’ve filed a claim, how can I check the status?

1.  Go to Orders in [My eBay](https://my.ebay.com/ws/eBayISAPI.dll?MyEbayBeta&CurrentPage=MyeBayNextSold)
     or [Seller Hub](https://www.ebay.com/sh/ord/?filter=status:ALL_ORDERS)
    
2.  Find the order and select View order details
3.  Select View claim status

### Is it easy to verify a claim with my buyer?

Yes. After you file a claim, we’ll need to verify whether the item was damaged in transit or never received. Your buyer can verify your claim by opening a case in the eBay Resolution Center. If your buyer hasn’t opened a case, ShipCover sends an email to the buyer with details on how to complete the verification process.

### My buyer tells me that they never received the verification email. Now what?

The buyer can verify the claim through My eBay in one of two ways. They can:

*   Click “Won/Purchased” on the left-hand side.
*   Find the item and click on the description.
*   Click “View order details.”
*   Click “Verify shipping insurance claim” and fill out the form.

  

Or:

*   Click on the “Messages” tab at the top of the page.
*   Open the message with the subject “Shipping insurance claim received.”
*   Click “Verify the claim” and fill out the form.

### Are there any items excluded from ShipCover?

Yes, certain items aren’t covered by ShipCover. [Here is a list of excluded items and the ShipCover terms of coverage](http://pages.ebay.com/insurance/shipping/coverage.html)
.

### Who can I contact for claim related questions?

If you have questions or concerns related to your claims, please contact [eBay ShipCover Claims & Support](https://www.pipinsure.com/shipcovercontacts/)
.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=09552ce3-f063-6471-7244-626ee61dab77&ctx_pageTitle=ShipCover+Insurance+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Defect removal | Seller Center

Defect removal
==============

Because we know some things are beyond your control.

On this page

*   [eBay protects you](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/protections/defect-removal#e-bay-protects-you)
    
*   [What’s a defect?](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/protections/defect-removal#what-s-a-defect-)
    
*   [Automatic defect removal](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/protections/defect-removal#automatic-defect-removal)
    

eBay protects you
-----------------

eBay works to identify, warn, and restrict buyers who file unusually high numbers of cases. You can track the number of times eBay Money Back Guarantee cases have been removed from your account as a result of these actions in your seller dashboard.

Protection when shipping within your stated time:

*   If a buyer claims that they did not receive an item, the related eBay Money Back Guarantee case will be found in your favor if you shipped within your stated handling time and provided tracking information (with signature confirmation for transactions of $750 or more) before the case was escalated to eBay
    
*   To be protected, the tracking information will need to show proof of delivery from a shipping company that clearly displays the delivery status of the item as “delivered,” the date of delivery (which reflects that you shipped within your stated handling time), and the recipient’s address
    
*   Any buyer feedback (positive, neutral, and negative) along with detailed seller ratings \[DSRs\] will be removed promptly from transactions in which an eBay Money Back Guarantee case is resolved in your favor by eBay
    

[Visit your seller dashboard](https://cgi6.ebay.com/ws/eBayISAPI.dll?SellerDashboard)

What’s a defect?
----------------

A defect is a part of a transaction that eBay considers to have created a bad shopping experience for buyers.

A transaction can get a defect in two ways.

1.  When a seller cancels a transaction for out of stock
    
2.  If a seller is unable to resolve a problem through the Resolution Center and eBay steps in, and the seller is found responsible
    

A seller’s transaction defect rate is the percentage of their total transactions that had either defect. Note that these defects often measure how satisfied your buyers were with a transaction. We don’t count more than one defect per transaction.

[Learn more](https://pages.ebay.com/help/policies/seller-non-performance.html#defectrate)

Automatic defect removal
------------------------

Certain transaction defects received for reasons beyond a seller’s control will be automatically removed from the seller’s performance standards and feedback profile. For example:

*   The buyer did not pay for their order and an unpaid item is recorded against the buyer
*   An eBay Money Back Guarantee request is ruled in the seller’s favor
*   The defect was the direct result of an eBay site issue or an eBay program error
*   eBay takes action on a buyer for activity that violates the [Abusive buyer policy](https://www.ebay.com/help/policies/rules-policies-buyers/buying-practices-policy?id=4374)
    
*   eBay instructs you to hold a shipment or takes action to cancel the transaction
*   eBay can determine through valid tracking that the defect was the direct result of systemic delays in shipping or communication. Examples include wide-scale shipping carrier delays, items stuck in customs, or power outages due to extreme weather. These events will be listed on eBay’s [announcement board](https://community.ebay.com/t5/Announcements/bg-p/Announcements)
    .

The Transaction Defect Report provides you with daily updates synced with your seller dashboard, access to defect details, and the date a defect was removed by eBay. Be sure to [download your Transaction Report](https://cgi6.ebay.com/ws/eBayISAPI.dll?SellerDashboard)
 often.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=a18b3bc1-664a-4ff9-590a-22f73ca37920&ctx_pageTitle=Defect+removal+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)
