# UPS® and eBay Labels | Seller Center

UPS® and eBay Labels
====================

On this page

*   [When to choose UPS as your carrier service for eBay Labels](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/choosing-a-carrier-and-service/ups-and-ebay-labels#when-to-choose-u-p-s-as-your-carrier-service-for-e-bay-labels)
    
*   [Key benefits](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/choosing-a-carrier-and-service/ups-and-ebay-labels#key-benefits)
    
*   [Available Services](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/choosing-a-carrier-and-service/ups-and-ebay-labels#available-services)
    
*   [Calculate your item’s shipping costs](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/choosing-a-carrier-and-service/ups-and-ebay-labels#calculate-your-item-s-shipping-costs)
    
*   [FAQs](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/choosing-a-carrier-and-service/ups-and-ebay-labels#f-a-qs)
    

When to choose UPS as your carrier service for eBay Labels
----------------------------------------------------------

UPS has industry-leading, on-time delivery performance across the entire U.S. Use UPS for fast ground transport, detailed tracking, or if you need residential delivery on Saturday or Sunday.

See the [Ground Time-in-Transit map](https://www.ups.com/maps?loc=en_US)
 to predict shipping times.

Use the [calculator](https://www.ebay.com/shp/Calculator)
 to check out UPS shipping rates.

![UPS delivery van driving down a road surrounded on both sides by a red and orange tulip field on a sunny day.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/06/ups-truck-passing-field-of-flowers-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Key benefits
------------

*   Enjoy savings on retail rates when you choose UPS as your carrier for eBay Labels.
*   No printer? No problem. The UPS Store® retail locations accept eBay Labels QR Codes.
*   UPS offers an industry-leading global network of over 78,000 UPS Access Point® locations to pick up or drop off packages, including The UPS Store®, Michaels, CVS, Advance Auto Parts, and local independent retailers. Find the closest [location](https://www.ups.com/dropoff?loc=en_US)
    .
*   UPS offers proactive tracking that includes automated shipping updates and delivery alerts.

![A UPS delivery man wheeling a stack of three packages through the warehouse on a dolly with the brown and yellow UPS van in the background.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/06/ups-delivery-man-holding-cart-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Available Services
------------------

### UPS® Ground 

UPS® Ground service delivers to commercial and residential areas in all 50 states and Puerto Rico. Transit times are between 1 to 5 business days, with Saturday delivery standard to most residential addresses (90% of UPS Ground packages are delivered in 3 days or less). Packages can weigh up to 150 lbs. and measure up to 108” long.

### **UPS® Ground Saver**

This economy ground service delivers to addresses in the 48 contiguous United States with UPS door-to-door tracking. Transit times are between 2 and 7 business days with Saturday and Sunday delivery available and no volume commitments. This service is perfect for your lightweight, non-urgent and small (130 total inches) packages. 

### UPS Next Day Air®

UPS Next Day Air® service delivers to all 50 states and Puerto Rico. Transit time is next day with Saturday delivery available. Packages can weigh up to 150 lbs. and measure up to 108” long.

### UPS Next Day Air Saver®

UPS Next Day Air Saver® service delivers from all 50 U.S. states to the 48 contiguous states. Transit time is next day with Saturday delivery available. Packages can weigh up to 150 lbs. and measure up to 108” long.

### UPS 2nd Day Air® 

This is the economical option for expedited shipments that do not need overnight service. UPS 2nd Day Air® delivers to all 50 states and Puerto Rico with some limitations in Alaska and Hawaii. Transit time is within 2 business days. Packages can weigh up to 150 lbs. and measure up to 108” long.

Calculate your item’s shipping costs
------------------------------------

Having accurate and competitive shipping costs in your listings can generate more bids and future purchases. You can use our shipping calculator to easily estimate how much it would cost to ship a certain item.

[Run the numbers](https://www.ebay.com/shp/Calculator)

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/06/shipping-calculator-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

FAQs
----

### How to get your package to UPS?

UPS offers a variety of options to help your customers packages get to where they need to go, every time. Some options include:

*   The UPS Store®: Drop a package off at one of the thousands of locations. Find the closest The UPS [Store location](https://www.theupsstore.com/tools/find-a-store)
    .
*   UPS Access Point® locations: Drop off pre labeled packages at nearby stores including The UPS Store®, Michaels, CVS, Advance Auto Parts, and local independent retailers.
*   UPS® Drop Box locations: Drop off a shipment 24 hours a day, seven days a week, and enjoy later pickup times.

### How to ship safely and avoid unwanted charges?

*   Correctly Measure Your Shipment: To avoid unexpected measurement correction charges, be sure to correctly check the shipment size and weight. The UPS package [measurement page](https://www.ups.com/us/en/support/shipping-support/shipping-dimensions-weight.page#:~:text=Determine%20the%20package%20measurement%20in,the%20cubic%20size%20in%20inches.)
     walks through how to properly measure a package, along with helpful FAQs.
*   How to Pack Your Shipment? To help ensure your shipments are adequately and securely wrapped, packed, and cushioned for transportation, UPS offers general [packaging guidelines](https://www.ups.com/assets/resources/webcontent/en_US/Packaging_Guidelines.pdf)
    . This document includes helpful tips such as a shipping checklist, information on types of packing material, and special packaging needs.
*   Need Help with Packing? Not a problem! UPS offers a helpful [Packaging Advisor](https://www.ups.com/packaging)
     that can help shippers get customized packaging guidelines based on package characteristics.
*   Avoiding Unexpected Charges: It’s important to enter accurate shipment details when creating a shipment. Otherwise, additional correction charges such as Additional Handling or Residential Surcharges could be added after delivery. Luckily, UPS offers some [tips](https://www.ups.com/us/en/support/shipping-support/shipping-dimensions-weight/avoid-additional-shipping-fees.page)
     that help avoid common errors and ship as smoothly as possible.

### What is the Declared Value and what is the benefit?

The declared value of a shipment indicates UPS’s maximum liability for a package that is lost or damaged. UPS’s liability is limited to $100 (or local currency equivalent) on packages with no declared value (or $50 for UPS Ground Saver). If the value of your goods exceeds this amount, use Declared Value for Carriage to declare a higher value for your shipment up to the maximum allowed in your country or territory. Declared value offers peace of mind for all your packages.  

### What are the ways to get Proof of Delivery?

UPS will provide proof of delivery in the choice of these options:

*   Delivery Confirmation: UPS will provide confirmation of delivery without the recipient’s signature.
*   Signature Required\*: UPS will obtain the recipient’s signature and provide a printed copy. The recipient’s signature can also be viewed online.
*   Adult Signature Required\*: UPS will obtain the adult recipient’s signature and provide a printed copy. The adult recipient’s signature may also be viewed online.

### What items are prohibited to ship with UPS?

There are certain prohibited items UPS won’t ship due to laws or regulations. [Click here for more information](https://www.ups.com/us/en/support/shipping-support/shipping-special-care-regulated-items/prohibited-items.page)
 and what items are prohibited or restricted when shipping with UPS.

### How to submit a claim with UPS?

1.  Visit the UPS [claims portal](https://www.ups.com/us/en/support/file-a-claim.page)
    .
2.  [Log in](https://www.ups.com/claims/create?loc=en_US)
     to your existing account, or [create an account](https://www.ups.com/doapp/signup?loc=en_US&returnto=https://www.ups.com/claims/create?loc=en_US)
    . It’s important the email address associated with your UPS account is the same as the email address associated with your eBay account.
3.  Enter required information, refer to the UPS Claims on UPS.com [Seller guide](https://ir.ebaystatic.com/pictures/sc/pdf/UPS_Claims_Process_for_eBay_Sellers_2022.pdf)
     for workflows for lost or damaged packages.

### How do I track UPS Ground Saver packages?

Your eBay order will show full end-to-end tracking details for the package. You can also view tracking on the [UPS website](https://www.ups.com/track?loc=en_US&requester=ST/)
 by entering the UPS tracking number.   

### Can I use UPS Ground Saver to ship packages to/from Alaska, Hawaii, U.S. Territories, Military Addresses, and PO Boxes?

No. You can only ship with UPS Ground Saver within the continental U.S. 

### What do I need to know about declared value coverage for UPS Ground Saver?

UPS Ground Saver labels come with $50 of Declared Value coverage.

### Is Signature Confirmation available for UPS Ground Saver?

UPS doesn’t support signature conformation for UPS Ground Saver packages. Packages will be left at the recipient’s location without obtaining a signature, and UPS will only make one delivery attempt.  

### Where can I drop off UPS Ground Saver shipments?

UPS Ground Saver shipments must be dropped off to UPS locations only. Packages can be dropped off to one of over 78,000 UPS Access Point® locations including The UPS Store®, Michaels, CVS, Advance Auto Parts, and local independent retailers. Find the closest [location](https://www.ups.com/dropoff?loc=en_US)
.

Looking for more answers?
=========================

[See FAQs](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/faqs)

![A stack of eBay branded paper mailjackets with an eBay shipping Label applied on a green backdrop.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/06/ebay-envelopes-1440x992.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=089bd309-8367-4607-9ebc-1a2869d4d90b&ctx_pageTitle=UPS%C2%AE+and+eBay+Labels+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Item specifics | Seller Center

Item specifics
==============

Make your listings easier to find by matching buyers’ most frequently searched terms.

On this page

*   [What are item specifics?](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/item-specifics#what-are-item-specifics-)
    
*   [Item specifics requirements and recommendations](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/item-specifics#item-specifics-requirements-and-recommendations)
    
*   [Features for finding missing item specifics](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/item-specifics#features-for-finding-missing-item-specifics)
    
*   [Bulk edit tools to update missing item specifics](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/item-specifics#bulk-edit-tools-to-update-missing-item-specifics)
    
*   [Listings with multiple variations](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/item-specifics#listings-with-multiple-variations)
    
*   [Personalize with eBay](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/item-specifics#personalize-with-e-bay)
    

What are item specifics?
------------------------

Item specifics are descriptive keywords that tell a buyer about your item. They may include brand, size, length, width, height, type, color, or style, and vary depending on what you’re selling.  

Together with [product identifiers](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/product-identifiers)
, item specifics are the most important way to help buyers find what they’re looking for. Buyers use item specifics to filter their search results, and your item will only appear in those filtered search results if you’ve added the matching item specific. The more item specifics you complete, the better eBay can match your item to what a buyer is looking for.

![Boosting your sales with this simple task | Item Specifics](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/04/1200x720_Boosting_your_sales_with_this_simple_task_V2.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Benefits of item specifics
--------------------------

Item specifics provide you with a number of benefits, including:

*   Improve the visibility of your listings in search results
    
*   Increase your chances of being found on eBay, Google Shopping, and external search results
    
*   Increase the chances of buyers finding your listings when they filter search results, especially on mobile devices
    

![Item Specifics: get seen by more buyers video thumbnail](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/04/Item_specifics_Get_seen_by_more_buyers.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Item specifics requirements and recommendations
-----------------------------------------------

eBay uses certain labels to indicate which specifics will help your items get found more easily by buyers:  

### Required

Certain item specifics are critical in identifying your items and making sure your buyers can shop with confidence. You’ll need to fill in all Required item specifics for any new or revised listing. [See the latest item specifics requirements](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/item-specifics-requirements)
 for your categories.

### Required Soon

We periodically add new Required item specifics based on buyers’ search trends. If your listings have item specifics that will be Required Soon, you’ll see a note as you list that you can hover over to learn when they will become required. You can also check the [latest item specifics requirements](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/item-specifics-requirements)
 to learn about what’s upcoming for the categories you regularly list in. 

### Recommended

We recommend certain item specifics based on buyer demand data and popular searches. Add as many of these as you can to help buyers find your listings. 

### Additional

These item specifics help buyers know more about your item. Completing these could potentially save you from having to answer questions about your item, and help you make a sale.

When creating a listing, these labels will help you identify the most important item specifics to fill out first. 

![Screenshot of create listing page](https://ir.ebaystatic.com/pictures/aw/pics/sc/listing/item-specifics/item_specifics_required_recommended.jpg)

_Tip: The lightning bolt meter (outlined in yellow) will fill up to indicate how complete your item specifics are._

Features for finding missing item specifics
-------------------------------------------

There are a number of features to assist you in adding missing item specifics to your listings.

### View missing item specifics in Seller Hub tasks

On your Overview page in Seller Hub, a new task in the Tasks module will let you know when you have listings that are missing required item specifics. Simply click on the task and you’ll be taken to those listings.

![Screenshot of Seller Hub Overview page Tasks Module, with tasks to "Add required item specifics" and "Add soon to be required item specifics."](https://ir.ebaystatic.com/pictures/aw/pics/sc/listing/item-specifics/seller_hub_tasks_item_specifics_v2.png)

### Item specifics Quick Filters

If any of your listings are missing Required, Required Soon, or Recommended item specifics, you’ll see a corresponding Quick Filter on your Seller Hub Active Listings page. 

![Screenshot of the Seller Hub Active Listings page. Under "Quick filters," "Item specifics - required soon" is selected.](https://ir.ebaystatic.com/pictures/aw/pics/sc/listing/item-specifics/seller_hub_item_specifics_required_soon.jpg)

### Add item specifics from Active Listings

From your Active Listings page, you can select multiple listings and click “Add item specifics.”  This will load all of your selected listings into a pop-up window where you can cycle through each listing and add any missing item specifics.

![Screenshot of the Active Listings page, showing the option to "Add item specifics" under the Actions button.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/03/bulk_add_item_specifics.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

![Screenshot of the add item specifics listing flow](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/03/add_item_specifics.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

### Required Soon feature

When you list or revise an item, you’ll see “Required soon” above any item specifics that have an upcoming enforcement date. Seller Hub will show you more information as well as the dates the item specific will become mandatory for your current listing. 

![Screenshot of a listing flow demonstrating the "Required soon" label above some item specifics. ](https://ir.ebaystatic.com/pictures/aw/pics/sc/listing/item-specifics/required_soon.jpg)

### Item specifics rankings

As you list, you’ll see guidance on what item specifics your buyers are searching for, based on the number of searches over the past 30 days. Completing these item specifics will help increase your listing’s visibility, especially when buyers use the left-hand navigation filters. 

![Screenshot of a listing flow, highlighting the number of searches shown for each item specific. ](https://ir.ebaystatic.com/pictures/aw/pics/sc/listing/item-specifics/item_specifics_rankings_v2.jpg)

Bulk edit tools to update missing item specifics
------------------------------------------------

If you have a number of listings with missing item specifics, bulk edit tools can help you save time.  

### Download/Upload file

Available on the Seller Hub Active Listings page, this tool allows you to download an Excel file containing all of your active listings that are missing Required, Required Soon, or Recommended item specifics.

Follow the instructions in the Excel file to edit your item specifics, then upload the file to your Active Listings page to apply changes across multiple listings. Learn more about [how to use Download/Upload file](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/listings/creating-listing?id=4105)
.

![Screenshot of Seller Hub Active listings, with "Download" link on right side highlighted.](https://ir.ebaystatic.com/pictures/aw/pics/sc/listing/item-specifics/download_upload.jpg)

### Optiseller Aspect Finder+

[Optiseller Aspect Finder+](https://www.optiseller.com/landingpage-aspect-finder-usa?utm_campaign=AspectFinderPlus_US&utm_source=eBay&utm_medium=SellerCenter)
 is a third-party tool that can help you quickly identify and update listings that are missing item specifics.\*

Listings with multiple variations
---------------------------------

Adding variations to your listings lets you use item specifics to group closely related items under a single listing.

For example, if you’re selling shoes, you can create a single listing with multiple variations for different sizes.

Items grouped under a single listing need to be closely related, and you can select from a list of variation details (such as size, color, or width) to describe how they are related.

#### Changes to variation details

As part of our item specifics updates, certain variation details will no longer be valid. This change helps clarify what variations work best as a single listing, and what items are more likely to get noticed as separate listings.

Listings impacted by this change will display the following error message when you edit them: “This attribute is not valid for this variation. Add a valid attribute.”

If you see this message, first try to update your listing. Look for an existing variation detail that more accurately describes how the items are related. For example, a listing for a kitchen faucet may have previously used “Type” to describe the variations “Stainless steel”, “Rubbed Bronze”, and “Chrome.” This could be updated to “Finish.”

If you can’t find a relevant existing variation detail, you’ll need to create separate listings. For example, a listing for tools may have used “Type” to describe variations for “Hammer,” “Wrench,” and “Screwdriver.” In this case, the items are not closely related enough to fall under a single listing. The variation “Type” will need to be removed and the items re-listed separately.

Making these changes helps your listings with multiple variations show up in the right searches, and encourages buyers to feel more confident with their purchase.

Personalize with eBay
---------------------

Personalizing items for your buyers is now easier with our new item specific feature. This feature allows you to easily communicate to the buyer what information you will need from them to personalize an item. When you add this feature to your listings, buyers can add their personalized text on the View Item page in certain categories, which can then be sent to you using the “message to seller” option. Buyers can now also filter for personalized listings when they search for items.

To set up your personalized listings, you’ll need to take the following action:

1.  Add the “Personalize” item specific to your relevant listings
    
2.  Provide personalization instructions for your customers
    
3.  Turn on the “message to seller” option
    

If you’ve previously used the personalization item specific, make sure you complete step 2 and 3 above to add this experience to your listings.

### This option is currently available in certain categories in the following areas:

*   Antiques
*   Art
*   Baby
*   Books & Magazines
*   Business & Industrial
*   Cameras & Photo
*   Cell Phones & Accessories
*   Clothing, Shoes & Accessories
*   Coins & Paper Money
*   Collectibles
*   Computers/Tablets & Networking
*   Consumer Electronics
*   Crafts
*   Dolls & Bears
*   eBay Motors
*   Entertainment Memorabilia
*   Everything Else
*   Gift Cards & Coupons
*   Health & Beauty
*   Home & Garden
*   Jewelry & Watches
*   Movies & TV
*   Music
*   Musical Instruments & Gear
*   Pet Supplies
*   Pottery & Glass
*   Specialty Services
*   Sporting Goods
*   Sports Mem, Cards & Fan Shop
*   Stamps
*   Tickets & Experiences
*   Toys & Hobbies
*   Travel
*   Video Games & Consoles

[Update your listings now](https://www.ebay.com/sh/lst/active)

eBay for business
-----------------

Choose to make your listings personalized.

![Choose to make you listings personalized video thumbnail](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/10/Choose_to_make_your_listings_personalized.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

\*Additional charges apply.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=c9d885ff-6d84-410a-a17f-817e01d77d6b&ctx_pageTitle=Item+specifics+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Protections | Seller Center

Protections
===========

Learn about our Top Rated Program and how eBay works to protect sellers from situations beyond their control.

![man wearing black hat with print saying axe and colorful hoodie](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/10/protections-hero-1440x992.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Top Rated Program
-----------------

Top Rated Sellers get exclusive benefits that can help boost your listings visibility, improve conversion, save money, and protect you from abusive buying behavior and events outside your control. Sellers who deliver exceptional customer service may qualify for eBay’s Top Rated Seller program.

[Learn how to qualify](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/protections/top-rated-program)

![Real seller photo: blonde, curly-haired woman standing in front of her pottery with crossed arms](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2021/08/top_rated_seller_program_1200x1200.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Returns
-------

Attract and retain buyers with a great returns policy. eBay provides sellers with a set of tools that make it easy to manage your returns and help you provide the best customer experience possible to your buyers.

  

[Learn how to manage your returns](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/protections/returns)

![Person putting shoes into a box](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2021/07/great_returns_policy_1200x1200.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Defect removal
--------------

Because we know some things are beyond your control, eBay works to protect you by identifying buyers who file unusually high numbers of cases, as well as offering protection when shipping within your stated time. Also, your seller’s performance feedback and profile will remain unchanged when defects occur through no fault of your own.

[See how you’re protected](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/protections/defect-removal)

![Package being placed in a mail slot](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2021/07/defect_removal_1200x1200.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Seller Help
-----------

[Seller Help](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/selling-tools/seller-help?id=4996)
 is a self-service resource that lets you conveniently manage refunds, returns, “Item not received” and “Item not as described” cases, and other common selling issues all in one place. It offers a simple and intuitive interface so you can address selling issues without delay.

[Learn about Seller Help](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/protections/seller-help)

![Woman using laptop with package beside her](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2021/07/seller_help_1200x1200.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=4adbdf5d-6bf4-899b-fe58-e250cc7956bb&ctx_pageTitle=Protections+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Prepare for peak | Seller Center

Get ready for the holiday season
================================

All you need to know to ship smart and set yourself up for success.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/09/hero_container_desktop_image_1488x1000.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

On this page

*   [Holiday shipping made simple](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/prepare-for-peak#holiday-shipping-made-simple)
    
*   [Save on shipping costs with eBay Labels](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/prepare-for-peak#save-on-shipping-costs-with-e-bay-labels)
    
*   [2025 holiday shipping deadlines](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/prepare-for-peak#2025-holiday-shipping-deadlines)
    
*   [Reach more holiday shoppers](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/prepare-for-peak#reach-more-holiday-shoppers)
    
*   [Help your listings stand out with lower shipping costs](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/prepare-for-peak#help-your-listings-stand-out-with-lower-shipping-costs)
    
*   [We’ve got your back over the holiday season](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/prepare-for-peak#we-ve-got-your-back-over-the-holiday-season)
    
*   [Brush up on holiday shipping essentials](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/prepare-for-peak#brush-up-on-holiday-shipping-essentials)
    
*   [Get the latest shipping news](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/prepare-for-peak#get-the-latest-shipping-news)
    

Holiday shipping made simple
----------------------------

Peak shopping season is right around the corner, and buyers are already gearing up. We’ve put together some holiday shipping tips to help you thrive during this busy period.

Save on shipping costs with eBay Labels
---------------------------------------

Enjoy discounted rates from major carriers and save time by printing pre-populated labels yourself, or present a QR code at a carrier location where they’ll print the label for you. Plus, with automatic tracking updates on orders shipped with eBay Labels, you can ensure every delivery goes smoothly this holiday season.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/09/eb-22469_q3_us_uk_de_prepare-for-peak-season_lp_sept10_text_and_media_card_image_1_1200x720_rw38_final.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

2025 holiday shipping deadlines
-------------------------------

### Here are the last shipping dates for eBay Labels select services to help ensure your package arrives by December 24, 2025.

### eBay Shipping Services

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| **Service** | **Ship by** |
| eBay Standard Envelope | 12/17 |

### USPS®

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| **Service** | **Ship by** |
| USPS Ground Advantage (TM) | 12/17 |
| USPS Ground Advantage (TM):  <br>AK, HI, PR, US Territories | 12/16 |
| USPS Priority Mail® | 12/18 |
| USPS Priority Mail Express® | 12/19 |

  
Learn more: [USPS](https://www.usps.com/holiday/holiday-shipping-dates.htm)

### FedEx®

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| **Service** | **Ship by** |
| FedEx Ground® Economy | 12/15 |
| FedEx Ground® & Home Delivery | 12/17 |
| FedEx 2Day | 12/23 |
| FedEx 2Day One Rate | 12/23 |
| FedEx Priority Overnight® | 12/23 |
| FedEx Standard Overnight® | 12/23 |

  
All dates are for Contiguous United States.

Learn more: [FedEx](https://www.fedex.com/content/dam/fedex/us-united-states/services/2025__Shipping_Deadlines.pdf)

### UPS®

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| **Service** | **Ship by** |
| UPS Ground® | Check [ups.com/ctc](https://wwwapps.ups.com/ctc/request?loc=en_US)<br> for details. |
| UPS Ground® Saver | Check [ups.com/ctc](https://wwwapps.ups.com/ctc/request?loc=en_US)<br> for details. |
| UPS Next Day Air® | 12/23 |
| UPS Next Day Air Saver® | 12/23 |
| UPS 2nd Day Air® | 12/22 |

  
Learn more: [UPS](https://assets.ups.com/adobe/assets/urn:aaid:aem:e8548535-8096-4fa9-9cef-2b81aef7c26c/original/as/year-end-holiday-schedule-us-en.pdf)

Prepare for seasonal carrier rate increases
-------------------------------------------

Holiday shipping surcharges can sneak up quickly, but a little preparation goes a long way. Stay ahead by learning more about seasonal [carrier rate increases](https://community.ebay.com/t5/Announcements/2025-Seasonal-Carrier-Rate-Increases/ba-p/35268425)
.

Reach more holiday shoppers
---------------------------

Get your items in front of more buyers with eBay International Shipping. Global shoppers are already on the lookout for holiday gifts, and the best part? We’ll handle tariffs, customs, and all the international shipping details so you don’t have to.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/09/eb-22469_q3_us_uk_de_prepare-for-peak-season_lp_sept10_text_and_media_card_image_2_1200x720_rw38_final.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Help your listings stand out with lower shipping costs
------------------------------------------------------

Buyers often look at item and shipping costs together when deciding to purchase. With calculated shipping, you can offer eBay Labels’ discounted rates to keep your total costs competitive and help drive your holiday sales. Listings automatically show the best shipping charge based on location, package details, and delivery service.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/09/eb-22469_q3_us_uk_de_prepare-for-peak-season_lp_sept10_text_and_media_card_image_3_1200x720_rw38_final.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

We’ve got your back over the holiday season
-------------------------------------------

### Learn how eBay supports and protects you, no matter what the season throws your way.

#### Up-to-date shipping details in the Community

Stay informed with updates on carrier delays, inclement weather, and other factors that might affect your business during the busy holiday season.

#### Dedicated support when deliveries are delayed

As long as you consistently meet handling-time commitments, you’ll receive full credit for on-time shipping despite carrier delays.

#### We’ll adjust estimated delivery dates for you

We track carrier delays by ZIP code and adjust estimated delivery dates, so you don’t have to change your handling times or worry about penalties.

Brush up on holiday shipping essentials
---------------------------------------

1.  **Keep your handling time under two days**  
    During the holiday rush, so there’s no need to extend handling times in your listings.  
    
2.  **Provide accurate shipping details**  
    Make sure you meet handling times and that you ship with the service specified in your listings (Economy, Standard, Expedited, or Overnight).  
    
3.  **Check your package dimensions**  
    Pack items securely and use standard-sized packaging when possible. To avoid label surcharges, measure carefully (always round up) and declare any irregular packaging. [Watch this video to learn how weight and size affect shipping costs.](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HUgltrmHkiM)
      
    
4.  **Double-check your carrier**  
    If you use carrier-branded packaging, ship with the corresponding carrier and make sure that your label matches the drop-off location.  
    
5.  **Offer an expedited shipping option**  
    Shoppers want fast and safe delivery. Offering buyer-paid options, like two-day or overnight shipping, could boost your sales.  
    

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/09/eb-22469_q3_us_uk_de_prepare-for-peak-season_lp_sept10_text_and_media_card_image_1200x1440_rw38_final.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Get the latest shipping news
============================

Follow our Seller News announcements, Seller check-ins, and updates on the eBay Community.

[Stay informed](https://community.ebay.com/)

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=9687070f-dae6-5254-ec36-94e32e463ae6&ctx_pageTitle=Prepare+for+peak+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Express payouts | Seller Center

Express payouts
===============

Get paid without the wait
-------------------------

Set up express payouts by adding your bank account, Visa debit card, or Mastercard debit card as a payout method and receive your payouts faster.

[Get paid now](https://www.ebay.com/ficapp/welcome?createflowparam=%7B%22flow%22%3A%22EMAIL%22%2C%22mode%22%3A%22ADD%22%2C%22configKey%22%3A%22MYPPC_ADD%22%2C%20%22isUserEligibleDCPayout%22%3A%22true%22%7D)

![two men with hanging guitars on the background](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/08/guys-guitars-1200x1200.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Make your money work for you
----------------------------

Once your bank account or debit card has been verified, you’ll have **two payout timing options for express payouts**:

*   **On a schedule**  
    Want to get paid faster? Set up your bank account or debit card as your preferred payout method for your scheduled payouts and get your scheduled payouts in your account in minutes, not days, including on weekends.¹
*   **On demand**  
    If you’re on a weekly, biweekly, or monthly payout schedule, you can also request an express payout of all or part of your available funds on demand.¹ Your bank will typically make your funds available to you within 30 minutes, including on weekends and holidays.

![eBay Payments Quick Tips, Ready to receive your funds transfer video thumbnail](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/09/ebay-payments-quick-tips-1200x1440.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Express payout fee
------------------

The express payout fee is a flat fee of $2.00 and is applied to each express payout sent to your linked debit card or bank account. eBay deducts the express payout fee, selling costs, and other fees from your funds prior to payout.

![man holding tablet](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/08/guy-tablet-1200x1200.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Quick and easy activation
-------------------------

[Link your debit card](https://www.ebay.com/ficapp/welcome?createflowparam=%7B%22flow%22%3A%22EMAIL%22%2C%22mode%22%3A%22ADD%22%2C%22configKey%22%3A%22MYPPC_ADD%22%2C%20%22isUserEligibleDCPayout%22%3A%22true%22%7D)
 or set up your bank account on file\* for payouts with a simple one-time set up.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/fees-credits-invoices/setting-changing-automatic-payment-method/updating-checking-account-details-payouts?id=4796#section1)

![man holding cup while looking at laptop](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/08/guy-computer-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

¹ Express payout fee applies to each express payout. Seller eligibility may vary. When you add a new payout method, your payout is delayed for up to 48 hours as a security precaution.

\* Not all banks may be eligible for express payouts.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=0a800d2a-c5c1-4be8-b7e9-1792ddbee2ce&ctx_pageTitle=Express+payouts+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

---

# Payouts on demand | Seller Center

Payouts on demand
=================

It’s your money, get paid when you want.
----------------------------------------

Have payouts sent to your bank account whenever is best for you.

More flexibility with payouts on demand
---------------------------------------

### Choose when to get paid

If you’re on a weekly, biweekly or monthly payout schedule, you can request a payout of your available funds **on demand** ahead of your next scheduled payout. Your funds will be available in your bank account per normal bank processing times, typically 1-3 business days.

### Get funds in a flash

Need cash ASAP? You can request an **express payout** of your available funds on demand using your linked Visa or Mastercard debit card. Funds typically arrive within **30 minutes**.¹

### Enjoy simple, easy payouts

Request a payout in just a few clicks and get your funds when it’s convenient for you.

![woman sitting while typing on laptop](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/08/woman-wall-art-1200x1440.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Here’s how it works:
--------------------

*   Click on the **Request Payout** button next to your Available funds in the Payments tab in Seller Hub.
*   Select an amount to send to your bank account.
*   Choose to receive your funds to your bank account within normal bank processing times, typically 1-3 business days, or to your debit card within 30 minutes¹ for a fee.
*   Click **Send my money now**.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/getting-paid/getting-paid-items-youve-sold?id=4814&st=3&pos=3&query=Getting%20paid%20for%20items%20you%27ve%20sold&intent=payout%20on%20demand&lucenceai=lucenceai&docId=HELP1448#section2)
 about payouts on demand.

Please note: If you’re on a daily payout schedule, you won’t be able to request withdrawal of your available funds on demand since you already have our fastest scheduled payout option.

![man beside his bike while holding a tablet](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/08/guy-bike-1200x1200.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

¹ Express payout fee applies to each payout to your debit card. Seller eligibility may vary.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=a92ab0b1-b45a-155b-73a8-1ad60791b817&ctx_pageTitle=Payouts+on+demand+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Shipping FAQs | Seller Center

Shipping FAQs
=============

*   [Preparing shipments and determining shipping costs](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/faqs#preparing-shipments-and-determining-shipping-costs)
    
*   [Shipping with eBay Labels](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/faqs#shipping-with-e-bay-labels)
    
*   [Shipping hazardous materials](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/faqs#shipping-hazardous-materials)
    
*   [Handling time](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/faqs#handling-time)
    
*   [eBay standard envelope](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/faqs#e-bay-standard-envelope)
    
*   [Freight](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/faqs#freight)
    

Have questions about shipping on eBay? We’ve got the answers you need.

Preparing shipments and determining shipping costs
--------------------------------------------------

### What is an irregular package?

Packages that can’t be sorted with package processing equipment because of size, shape, and contents are considered irregular packages. Examples include non-rectangular packages (such as tubular and triangular packages), packages not fully encased in corrugated cardboard (such as cans and wooden boxes), and items without packaging (such as tires and products shipped in wooden crates).

### How do I declare an irregular package when I ship my item?

When shipping with eBay Labels, select the **Irregular package** indicator. The postage you pay will include any additional carrier charges for packaging for the service you select. Learn more about irregular packaging charges from [FedEx®](https://www.fedex.com/content/dam/fedex/us-united-states/services/Service_Guide_2026.pdf#page=129)
, [UPS®](https://assets.ups.com/adobe/assets/urn:aaid:aem:356d938a-4f0a-4c71-b50e-bdd890f50b47/original/as/daily-rates-us-en.pdf#page=181)
, and the Nonstandard Characteristic fee from [USPS®](https://pe.usps.com/text/DMM300/201.htm#7.6.1)
.

### When are eBay Labels fees charged to my payment method?

Labels are charged at the time of label printing. [Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/posting-items/labels-packaging-tips/buying-printing-postage-labels?id=4157)
 about printing eBay labels.

### What payment methods can I use to pay for eBay shipping labels?

You can use your funds to purchase shipping labels for the items you sell. If your funds aren’t sufficient to cover the full cost of FedEx, UPS and USPS labels, eBay will charge the remaining balance to your on-file payment method, such as a credit card or linked bank account. If you’re purchasing a USPS shipping label, and your funds aren’t sufficient to cover the full cost of the label, you can also use PayPal to purchase the label instead.

### Are carrier surcharges included in the charge for eBay Labels fees?

Applicable carrier surcharges based on seller input weights and dimensions are included in the charge for eBay Labels fees and are also reflected in the [eBay Shipping Calculator](https://www.ebay.com/shp/Calculator)
.

For FedEx and UPS these charges include fuel surcharges, additional handling for dimensions, weight or packaging, residential delivery charges and delivery area surcharges. Learn more about [FedEx](https://www.fedex.com/content/dam/fedex/us-united-states/services/surcharge_and_fee_changes_2026.pdf)
 and [UPS](https://assets.ups.com/adobe/assets/urn:aaid:aem:f8d97e17-7ef9-48af-b8ce-b5c9bbf0be6a/original/as/preview-accessorial-us-en.pdf)
 surcharges.

For USPS these charges include non-standard fees and dimensional noncompliance fees. Learn more about [USPS](https://faq.usps.com/s/article/Parcel-Size-Weight-Fee-Standards)
 non-standard and dimensional noncompliance fees.

### Where can I find details about shipping cost adjustments?

**FedEx and UPS labels**

1\. Go to the Shipping Labels view in [Seller Hub](https://www.ebay.com/ship/labels/seller-hub)
 or [My eBay](https://www.ebay.com/ship/labels/my-ebay)

2\. Locate transactions with shipping cost adjustments reflected in the Shipment details/ Cost column

3\. Click on the service name link to view Shipping details. 

4\. Review input and carrier audited weights and dimensions and label cost breakdown

**USPS labels**

1\. Visit your Manage Shipping Labels [dashboard](https://www.ebay.com/ship/lmng)
.  
2\. View the section for Shipping Cost Adjustments to see if you have any postage cost adjustments.

[Learn more](https://pages.ebay.com/sellerinformation/ship-smart/ebay-shipping-partners/avoid-extra-postage-costs.html)
 about keeping your USPS postage payments accurate.

### How can I avoid carrier surcharges related to oversized shipment?

Ensure that your declared package weight, length and dimensions are below the limits for the shipping service you are using. Learn more about carrier limits by visiting [USPS](https://pe.usps.com/text/qsg300/Q201e.htm#1009536)
, [FedEx](https://www.fedex.com/content/dam/fedex/us-united-states/services/Fees_Shipping_Information.pdf)
 and [UPS](https://www.ups.com/us/en/support/shipping-support/shipping-dimensions-weight/avoid-additional-shipping-fees.page#:~:text=Over%20Maximum%20Size,-UPS%20has%20established&text=There%20are%20no%20limits%20to,to%20108%20inches%20in%20length)
.

When printing shipping labels, input accurate package weight and dimensions and round up to the nearest whole number.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/preparing-your-shipment/packaging-and-measuring)
 about avoiding shipping label adjustments.

### I was charged for a label shipping cost adjustment that I believe is incorrect. How can I dispute the adjustment?

USPS disputes should be submitted to USPS by contacting USPS Customer Care at 1-844-819-5187 or [verifypostagehelp@usps.gov](mailto:verifypostagehelp@usps.gov)
. Make sure you provide both the tracking number and the USPS Revenue Assurance ID to USPS. USPS will respond to the dispute within 5-15 business days.

FedEx and UPS disputes should be submitted to [eBay Customer Service](https://www.ebay.com/help/home)
. We will work with the carrier on reviewing the disputed charges. If your dispute is approved, you’ll see a credit to your Payments account for the adjustment amount and you’ll also get an email from eBay letting you know that the dispute was approved.

### I printed a label but I’m not going to use it. Can I void the label and get a refund?

Yes. You have up to 28 days from the time you print a FedEx, UPS or USPS label to void it and get a refund. The cost of the label will be credited to your eBay account within 21 days. [Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/posting-items/labels-packaging-tips/buying-printing-postage-labels?id=4157)
 about voiding eBay labels.

To void a label:

1\. Go to My eBay and click Shipping Labels under “Sell.”

2\. In the Actions column, click “Void label.”

3\. Follow the instructions on the “Void your shipping label” page.

### Can I use calculated shipping and offer eBay negotiated rates for USPS, FedEx and UPS?

Yes. You can take advantage of negotiated rates available with eBay Labels and apply the discounted rates to your eBay listings. [Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/shipping-items/shipping-rates/shipping-discounts?id=4168#section5)
 about applying carrier specific discounts to your listings.

### For combined shipping orders, does eBay Labels combine package dimensions for all items included in the order for an accurate shipping cost?

No. Our shipping logic does not account for combined package dimensions for multiple item orders. If you select a non-flat shipping service such as regular Priority Mail, the site will calculate a shipping rate based on the weight of all the items purchased together at one time.

### What are shipping zones and how do they affect my shipping costs?

Zones aren’t actual geographic zones, but rather, codes that convey the distance a package has to travel in miles from its origin point.

To estimate your shipping zones for USPS, UPS and FedEx, use the table below

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Zone | Distance |
| Zone 1 | 1-50 miles |
| Zone 2 | 51-150 miles |
| Zone 3 | 151-300 miles |
| Zone 4 | 301-600 miles |
| Zone 5 | 601-1000 miles |
| Zone 6 | 1001-1400 miles |
| Zone 7 | 1401-1800 miles |
| Zone 8 | 1801 miles or greater |
| Zone 9 | Designated for Freely Associated States such as Guam, Palau and other United States Territories |

Additional resources

*   [USPS Domestic Zone Chart](https://postcalc.usps.com/DomesticZoneChart)
    : Click the “Get Zone for ZIP Code Pair” tab. Then, enter the origin and destination zip code.
*   [UPS Zones and Rates](https://www.ups.com/us/en/support/shipping-support/shipping-costs-rates/daily-rates.page)
     for the 48 Contiguous States: Enter the origin zip code and download zone charts to Excel
*   [FedEx Zone Finder](https://www.fedex.com/ratetools/RateToolsMain.do%3Fmethod%3DSetupFindZones)
    : Enter the origin and destination zip code to find the zone for your shipment

The shipping service you select along with the shipping zone will determine the price of postage.

Keep your address up to date in your eBay account and be sure that your return address ZIP code matches the ZIP code you’re actually shipping from.

For instance, if your business has locations in multiple states or the package drop off location near your work has a different ZIP code than the one near your home, be sure to use the correct ZIP code on your return address when shipping. If the ZIP code on your shipping label doesn’t match the ZIP code you’re shipping from, the carrier may charge you additional postage.

### How can I avoid postage adjustments or surcharges related to package weight and dimensions?

Ensure that your declared package weight, length and dimensions are below the limits for the shipping service you are using. Learn more about carrier limits by visiting [USPS](https://pe.usps.com/text/qsg300/Q201e.htm#1009536)
, [FedEx](https://www.fedex.com/content/dam/fedex/us-united-states/services/Service_Guide_2026.pdf#page=130)
 and [UPS](https://assets.ups.com/adobe/assets/urn:aaid:aem:356d938a-4f0a-4c71-b50e-bdd890f50b47/original/as/daily-rates-us-en.pdf#page=183)
.

Shipping with eBay Labels
-------------------------

### Can I print labels in bulk on eBay?

Yes, you can print up to 100 labels at a time (all with free automatic tracking). Click “Label preferences” from your My eBay Selling page to select your printer and customize how your shipping labels print.

### My label didn’t print properly. Can I reprint it without paying again?

No worries! If your label printed incorrectly, you can reprint it for free.

### I printed a label but I’m not going to use it. Can I void the label and get a refund?

Yes. You have up to 28 days from the time you print a FedEx, UPS or USPS label to void it and get a refund. The cost of the label will be credited to your eBay account within 21 days. [Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/posting-items/labels-packaging-tips/buying-printing-postage-labels?id=4157)
 about voiding eBay labels.

To void a label:

1\. Go to My eBay and click Shipping Labels under “Sell.”

2\. In the Actions column, click “Void label.”

3\. Follow the instructions on the “Void your shipping label” page.

### Can I print shipping labels for buyers outside the U.S.?

Yes, eBay allows you to ship globally with our [eBay International Shipping program](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/ebay-international-shipping)
. You’re still only responsible for the domestic leg of the journey and can use eBay Labels to ship to the domestic hub. eBay takes your item international.

### What information do I need to ship my order with a QR code?

When choosing the QR code option, you’ll still need to enter your package’s weight and dimensions—and select a carrier and delivery option—just like you would if you were printing a label yourself.

![Screenshot of Package and Service sections](https://ir.ebaystatic.com/pictures/aw/pics/sc/Shipping/package-service-screenshot.png)

### How do I find a shipping carrier that accepts QR code scans?

When choosing the QR code option, you’ll still need to enter your package’s weight and dimensions—and select a carrier and delivery option—just like you would if you were printing a label yourself.

![Screenshot of Package and Service sections](https://ir.ebaystatic.com/pictures/aw/pics/sc/Shipping/package-service-screenshot.png)

### Do I still need to print a label if I choose the QR code option?

All eBay carrier partners (USPS, FedEx and UPS) offer a QR code option. However, remember to check if the carrier drop-off location nearest you supports QR codes using the links below.

*   Find supported locations for [USPS QR codes](https://tools.usps.com/find-location.htm?locationType=po&serviceType=lbroretail)
    .
*   Find supported locations for [FedEx QR codes](https://local.fedex.com/en/ebayqrlabels)
    .
*   Find supported locations for [UPS QR codes](https://www.theupsstore.com/tools/find-a-store)
    .

### Do I need to download the QR code?

No, the QR code will be automatically emailed to you. Simply open the email on your phone or device to access the QR code. However, if you prefer, you can also download the QR code directly from the eBay Labels confirmation page.

Shipping hazardous materials
----------------------------

### Whose responsibility is it to understand and prepare hazmat shipments?

Governmental agencies consider the seller/shipper of the product responsible in understanding if your products are hazmat, how to prepare, and ship them. One of the best ways to identify if a product is hazardous is to locate its Safety Data Sheet (SDS) or Material Safety Data Sheet (MSDS) and check Section 14 (Transportation). A quick search online typically is able to find the relevant document.

### Do I need to follow Hazmat Policy if shipping internationally?

Yes, sellers still need to follow domestic and international rules and correctly label their packages so eBay can be made aware that the shipment contains hazardous materials.

### What items are classified as hazmat or dangerous goods?

There are 9 classes of hazardous materials which present different hazards in transport. Explosives, Gases, Flammable liquids, Flammable solids, Oxidizing substances, Toxic (poison), Radioactive, Corrosive, and Miscellaneous hazards. Some of these classes are broken down into divisions that define more specific attributes. Use this [visual guide](https://www.fmcsa.dot.gov/sites/fmcsa.dot.gov/files/docs/Nine_Classes_of_Hazardous_Materials-4-2013_508CLN.pdf)
 as an aid.

### Who sets the rules for hazmat shipping?

It depends on the mode of transport. Domestically, the 49 CFR (Code of Federal Regulations) sets the rules for shipping hazmat by land, air, and inland waterways. Internationally, the IMDG Code (International Maritime Dangerous Goods) creates laws for shipment by vessel. The ICAO (International Aviation Organization) & IATA (International Air Transport Association) set the regulations for air transport. Find more information at these links:

*   [https://www.ecfr.gov/current/title-49](https://www.ecfr.gov/current/title-49)
    
*   [https://www.imo.org/en/OurWork/Safety/Pages/DangerousGoods-default.aspx](https://www.imo.org/en/OurWork/Safety/Pages/DangerousGoods-default.aspx)
    
*   [https://www.iata.org/en/publications/dgr/](https://www.iata.org/en/publications/dgr/)
    

### If I follow all the rules, can a courier service still choose to reject my parcel?

Yes, couriers set their own standards on top of the already strict regulations. Couriers want to protect their employees and physical assets from harm. They may decide to forbid certain types of goods from transport on their aircraft, vessels, or trucks. For example, a few companies will not accept loose lithium batteries for transport because of fire concerns.

### Are there penalties for shipping hazmat without following the regulations?

Yes, failing to comply with the relevant regulation may result in fine, penalty, or even jail time. That’s why it’s very important to follow the rules set by governmental agencies and couriers. See penalties in the 49 CFR § [107.329 Maximum penalties](https://www.ecfr.gov/current/title-49/subtitle-B/chapter-I/subchapter-A/part-107/subpart-D/subject-group-ECFR278a3e426100316/section-107.329)
.

### What are the most common types of hazmat?

As stated earlier on the page, the most common types we see at eBay are: lithium batteries, perfumes, nail polish, hairspray, cleaning supplies, lighters, and auto parts. That’s not the entire list, you may have a different type of hazmat depending on what you sell. The U.S. DOT offers a [“Check the Box” guide](https://www.transportation.gov/check-the-box/check-box-it-hazmat)
 to other types of common hazardous materials.

### What labels are required for packages containing lithium batteries?

Package marking and label requirements vary depending on factors such as number of lithium cells or batteries and watt-hours. [Refer to this guide from PHMSA](https://www.phmsa.dot.gov/sites/phmsa.dot.gov/files/2023-07/Lithium%20Battery%20Guide.pdf)
 to understand requirements for the item you are shipping.

USPS also requires additional markings for packages containing pre-owned, damaged or electronic devices with lithium batteries. These packages must be marked “Restricted Electronic Device” and “Surface Transportation Only.”

Handling time
-------------

### How do I edit handling time for multiple items?

Instructions on how to edit handling time for bulk listings can be found on the [eBay bulk listings tools page](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/ebay-bulk-listing-tools)
.

### What are the benefits to same-day or 1-day handling times?

Offering and delivering same-day handling or 1-day handling along with at least a 30-day money-back return policy can help you qualify for a [Top Rated Plus](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/protections/top-rated-program)
 discount and seal.

### Why do carrier acceptance scan times matter?

Your seller performance rating includes a late shipment rate calculation, and the maximum late shipment rate to qualify for Top Rated status is 3%. Your transaction will be considered on time as long as you have an acceptance scan within your stated handling time. [Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/help/policies/selling-policies/seller-performance-policy?id=4347)
 about seller levels and performance standards.

### How are holidays factored into handling times?

USPS® holidays are not counted as shipping days. Handle by dates that would normally fall on USPS holidays will reflect the next business day following the holiday as the “Ship by” date.

### How does the Time Away setting affect estimated delivery dates?

Estimated delivery dates and handle by dates will be adjusted when Time Away is scheduled for active listings. This means your buyers will receive realistic estimated delivery dates automatically without you having to manually change the time yourself.

[More on how to set up time away](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/selling-tools/time-away?id=5137)
.

eBay standard envelope
----------------------

### Why can’t I track eBay standard envelope shipments on the USPS website?

eBay standard envelope is an eBay Delivery Service and is tracked by our customers through their eBay accounts. Sellers can find the tracking information in My eBay or Seller Hub. If your buyer is asking for tracking information, please direct them to their purchase transaction history.

### How do I handle an “Item not received” claim from a buyer?

From time to time, eBay standard envelope shipments unfortunately may not track all the way through delivery to your buyer. If your buyer opens an “Item Not Received” request, please work with them to issue a refund in a timely manner. In these cases, you may also consider opening a claim to recover your lost funds.

### How do I file a claim on a shipment that was lost or damaged? How do I check the status of that claim?

Each eBay standard envelope shipment includes a $20 shipping protection plan on single item orders, and up to $50 on combined orders, to help in case of lost or damaged items.

If you believe your shipment was lost in shipping, you must wait 30 days to file a claim. You can reduce the amount of the claim if your shipment was only partially lost or damaged, however the claim amount cannot be more than the item's sold price.

To file a claim, [go here](https://www.pip-claim.com/PIPClaim/eBayIntClaim/CreateeBayClaim)
 and enter the following information in the form:

**1\. Tell us what happened. Was your item damaged or was your shipment lost?**

**2\. Enter the claim information and your PayPal email address.**

**3\. Enter the following additional information:**

*   Your first and last name
*   The buyer’s first and last name
*   Shipment tracking number
*   eBay item number
*   Screenshot of eBay Order Details
*   Screenshot of buyer’s complaint message or dispute details regarding the lost or damaged item

**4\. When finished, select the “File the claim” button at the bottom of the page.**

Claims must be filed no later than 90 days from the date the shipping label was created.

You can check the status of existing claims by contacting PIP (Parcel Insurance Plan) at:

Phone: 1 800 325 7390

Email: [claims@pipinsure.com](mailto:claims@pipinsure.com)

Chat: select the chat button on [www.pipinsure.com](https://www.pipinsure.com/)

### The buyer filed a claim with PayPal but PayPal can’t validate the tracked information. How can I resolve?

Respond to the PayPal claim and advise that the item was shipped using a new delivery option with eBay that does not show up on the standard shipping sites.

Include the ESUS tracking number and the following link, which PayPal can use to [track the shipment](https://www.trackmyshipment.co/)
.

### What happens if an auction item sells for over $20?

eBay standard envelope can only be used on items selling for $20 or less. If a buyer wins an auction item that is listed with eBay standard envelope, the seller will need to ship the item via another method.

Freight
-------

### When should I use flat-rate freight shipping?

When you want to charge a single amount for shipping to all U.S. domestic buyers or offer free shipping to buyers.

### How do I list with flat-rate freight?

Select “Flat: Same cost to all buyers,” and choose flat-rate freight as your “Service.” Then pick a cost that will be shown to all domestic buyers for shipping.

![Flat Rate Freight](https://ir.ebaystatic.com/cr/v/c1/flat_rate_freight_568x764.png)

### When should I use freight rate tables?

If you want to charge buyers different freight shipping costs based on geographic location, freight rate tables are the best option. Buyers in different regions can be shown free shipping, or varying shipping costs for freight delivery.

### How do I build freight rate tables?

To build your freight rate table, follow these simple steps:

1\. Select a package type from the “Freight shipping item” field.  
2\. Enter a name for your rate table under “Table name.”  
3\. Provide a cost you’ll charge buyers for each region or group of regions.  
4\. Save your newly created freight rate table.

It’s that simple. [Build your freight table](https://www.ebay.com/ship/rt)
.

![Shipping rate tables](https://ir.ebaystatic.com/cr/v/c1/shipping_rate_tables_972x758.png)

### Can I track freight carriers on eBay?

Most of them. [Find trackable carriers](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/shipping-items/setting-shipping-options?id=4089#section1)
.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=e481c0e5-d901-424b-a5e2-bb01f3352534&ctx_pageTitle=Shipping+FAQs+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Top Rated Seller Program | Seller Center

Top Rated Seller Program
========================

Outstanding service earns big benefits for Top Rated Sellers.

On this page

*   [What’s the Top Rated Seller Program?](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/protections/top-rated-program#what-s-the-top-rated-seller-program-)
    
*   [Benefits](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/protections/top-rated-program#benefits)
    
*   [Additional Seller Protections for Top Rated Sellers](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/protections/top-rated-program#additional-seller-protections-for-top-rated-sellers)
    
*   [Qualify as a Top Rated Seller](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/protections/top-rated-program#qualify-as-a-top-rated-seller)
    
*   [Top Rated Plus](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/protections/top-rated-program#top-rated-plus)
    

What’s the Top Rated Seller Program?
------------------------------------

Sellers who deliver exceptional customer service may qualify for eBay’s Top Rated Seller program. We support Top Rated Sellers with exclusive benefits that can help boost your listings visibility, improve conversion, save money, and protect you from abusive buying behavior and events outside your control.

Benefits
--------

Top Rated Sellers receive enhanced visibility in eBay search results and exclusive seller protections. By becoming a Top Rated Seller, you will also be eligible to receive a Top Rated Plus seal that will be prominently displayed with your qualifying listings. The Top Rated Plus seal lets shoppers know they can buy with confidence when they purchase your items.

Additional Seller Protections for Top Rated Sellers
---------------------------------------------------

[We protect all sellers](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/selling/seller-protections)
 from abusive buying behavior and from events outside their control. Your track record matters on eBay, and we’ll support you when you deliver on your service promise and provide a good buying experience.

Top Rated Sellers who reside in the US and list on eBay.com receive additional protections benefits when they offer 30-day-or-longer returns.

### Return shipping label credit for false “item not as described” claims

If a buyer falsely claims an item was “not as described,” we’ll protect you on eligible transactions. We’ll reimburse your return shipping label cost up to $6 per return. You’ll receive the return shipping label credit on your monthly invoice and we’ll automatically remove any negative and neutral feedback, defects, and open cases in service metrics.

### Up to 50% refund deduction for decreased value on used or damaged returns

When you issue a refund for an item that was returned after it was used or damaged by a buyer, and you have a track record of delivering on your service promise, we’ll give you the ability to protect yourself by deducting up to 50% of the refund to recover the decreased value of the item. If there are any issues with buyers that may negatively impact you, we’ll take care of them by removing any negative and neutral feedback, defects, and open cases in service metrics.

Qualify as a Top Rated Seller
-----------------------------

To become a Top Rated Seller, you must meet the following guidelines:

*   An eBay account that’s been active for at least 90 days.
*   100 or more transactions and $1,000 in sales during the last 12 months with US buyers.
*   A defect rate less than or equal to 0.5%, with three or fewer defects from unique buyers.
*   Cases closed without seller resolution less than or equal to 0.3%, and two or fewer cases.
*   A late shipment rate less than or equal to 3%, and five or fewer late shipments.
*   Tracking uploaded within your stated handling time, and carrier validation for 95% of transactions to US buyers.

Once you meet these requirements, we will automatically upgrade you to the Top Rated Seller status at your next evaluation.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/seller-levels-performance-standards/seller-levels-performance-standards?id=4080#section2)

Top Rated Plus
--------------

As a Top Rated Seller, you can qualify for a Top Rated Plus seal and additional benefits when your listings offer the following services:

*   Same or one-business-day handling, and
*   A 30-day-or-longer free return period.

You can choose to offer these in some or all listings. For listings that qualify, you earn the following benefits

*   The Top Rated Plus seal, displayed prominently in search results and your listing description.
*   A 10% discount on final value fees.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=0d63c730-8144-592a-59b5-652ceecfd6eb&ctx_pageTitle=Top+Rated+Seller+Program+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)
