# VeRO Updates | Seller Center

Understanding how intellectual property can impact you
======================================================

We've updated our Help and Seller Center pages to help you better navigate IP rights.

Whether you're listing new items, resolving a removal, or just staying up to date on eBay’s policies, understanding intellectual property (IP) is key for any seller. We’ve updated our Help and Seller Center pages with tools and tips to protect your business from potential violations, from using brand names correctly to the importance of only listing authentic products.

Intellectual property compliance
--------------------------------

Brand names, logos, images and even product descriptions owned by a third party are all examples of IP. eBay, as required by law, gives brands, manufacturers, and rights owners control over how these assets are used by allowing them or their representatives to report listings they believe infringe on their IP rights. 

If a listing is flagged or removed because of an IP violation, you’ll get a clearer explanation and better guidance on ways to resolve or appeal the decision.

Protecting your listings
------------------------

We're always working to make it easier to navigate the complexities of intellectual property, and maintain transparency and fair treatment for our sellers. Here are a few things to remember when creating your listings:

*   Use your own photos or photos you have the rights to when creating your listings
*   You can also pull from the eBay product catalog for images and even product descriptions
*   If you sell brand-name products, review the relevant VeRO participant profiles for guidance on proper use
*   Keep your listings clear and accurate so buyers know exactly what to expect

Next steps
----------

Check out our updated Help and Seller Center pages to learn more, and get familiar with our [Intellectual property policy](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/intellectual-property)
.

If you own your own brand check out more information about our [Verified Rights Owner (VeRO) program](http://www.ebay.com/vero)

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=aa14cd27-2d12-115e-7f57-b8038ec23a91&ctx_pageTitle=VeRO+Updates+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

---

# FedEx® and eBay Labels | Seller Center

FedEx® and eBay Labels
======================

On this page

*   [FedEx 2Day One Rate on eBay Labels](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/choosing-a-carrier-and-service/fedex-and-ebay-labels#fed-ex-2-day-one-rate-on-e-bay-labels-)
    
*   [When to choose FedEx for eBay Labels](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/choosing-a-carrier-and-service/fedex-and-ebay-labels#when-to-choose-fed-ex-for-e-bay-labels)
    
*   [Key benefits](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/choosing-a-carrier-and-service/fedex-and-ebay-labels#key-benefits)
    
*   [Available services](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/choosing-a-carrier-and-service/fedex-and-ebay-labels#available-services)
    
*   [Calculate your item’s shipping costs](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/choosing-a-carrier-and-service/fedex-and-ebay-labels#calculate-your-item-s-shipping-costs)
    
*   [FAQs](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/choosing-a-carrier-and-service/fedex-and-ebay-labels#f-a-qs)
    

FedEx 2Day One Rate on eBay Labels
----------------------------------

Get cost-effective flat rate shipping for packages up to 50 lbs.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/choosing-a-carrier-and-service/fedex-and-ebay-labels#faqs)

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/02/FedEx_Shipping_1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

When to choose FedEx for eBay Labels
------------------------------------

FedEx offers a wide selection of discounted ground and express shipping options to both businesses and residential recipients. FedEx Home Delivery® provides residential delivery coverage every day—including Sundays, so many of your customers don’t have to wait until Monday to receive their packages.\* For a faster shipping option, FedEx 2Day offers flat zoned pricing that is often competitive with slower shipping alternatives.

Use the [calculator](https://www.ebay.com/shp/Calculator)
 to check out FedEx shipping rates.  
  
\*FedEx Home Delivery offers Saturday delivery to over 98% of the U.S. population and Sunday delivery to over 50% of the U.S. population.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/07/fedex-store-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Key benefits
------------

*   There are 50,000+ FedEx drop-off locations, including FedEx Office stores, FedEx Ship Center, and drop boxes, as well as participating Walgreens, Dollar General, Walmart, Office Depot, and OfficeMax stores. [Find my nearest FedEx](https://local.fedex.com/en-us)
    .
*   Save on retail prices with eBay Labels. Use our shipping calculator to see rates specific to your area and shipment.  
*   No printer? No problem. FedEx accepts eBay Labels QR Codes.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/07/fedex-truck-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Available services
------------------

### [FedEx Home Delivery](https://www.fedex.com/en-us/shipping/home-delivery.html)

FedEx Home Delivery is a ground shipping service that delivers to residential locations.  

**Shipping / transit time**: In the contiguous U.S., delivery takes 1-5 days.  
**Weight limits and maximum package size**: Packages up to 150 lbs., 108" in length, and 165" in length plus girth (L+2W+2H) can be shipped.  

### FedEx 2Day One Rate

FedEx 2Day One Rate offers predictable flat rate shipping for packages and paks. Added benefits when using eBay Labels: sellers have the option to use free FedEx packaging or their own generic supplies, and all zones are priced the same. [Read more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/choosing-a-carrier-and-service/fedex-and-ebay-labels#faqs)
.  

**Shipping / transit time**: Available in the contiguous U.S., FedEx 2Day One Rate shipments will be delivered on the second business day.  
**Weight limits and maximum package size**: For boxes, you can ship up to 50 lbs. each and up to 2200 cubic inches (L x W x H). For paks, you can ship up to 50 lbs. each, up to 650 cubic inches (L x W x H).

**Smart Ship Tip**: Pricing is dependent on **accurate measurements**. Remember to always round up to the nearest whole number!

### [FedEx 2Day](https://www.fedex.com/en-us/shipping/2-day-shipping.html)

FedEx 2Day delivers packages within 2 business days through the United States.

**Shipping / transit time**: 2 Day delivery shipments will be delivered on the second business day, by a certain time.  
**Weight limits and maximum package size**: You can ship packages up to 150 lbs. each, up to 119" in length, 165" in length plus girth (L+2W+2H).

### [FedEx Standard Overnight](https://www.fedex.com/en-us/shipping/overnight.html#choose)
®

FedEx Standard Overnight® is a next-day shipping service that delivers packages throughout the United States.

**Shipping / transit time**: Next-business-day delivery by 4:30 p.m. to U.S. business and by 8 p.m. to residences.¹  
**Weight limits and maximum package size**: You can ship packages up to 150 lbs. each, up to 119" in length, 165" in length plus girth (L+2W+2H).

### [FedEx Priority Overnight](https://www.fedex.com/en-us/shipping/overnight.html#choose)
® 

FedEx Priority Overnight® is a next-day shipping service that delivers packages throughout the United States.

**Shipping / transit time**: Delivery the next business day by 10:30 a.m. to most businesses in the contiguous U.S. and by noon to residences and 4:30 p.m. to some rural areas.  
**Weight limits and maximum package size**: You can ship packages up to 150 lbs. each, up to 119" in length, 165" in length plus girth (L+2W+2H).  

### [FedEx Ground](https://www.fedex.com/en-us/shipping/ground.html)

FedEx Ground® is a shipping service that delivers to businesses.

**Shipping / transit time**: In the contiguous U.S., delivery takes 1-5 business days.  
**Weight limits and maximum package size**: Packages up to 150 lbs., 108" in length, and 165" in length plus girth (L+2W+2H) can be shipped.  

### [FedEx Ground® Economy](https://www.fedex.com/en-us/shipping/ground/economy.html)

FedEx Ground Economy (formerly called FedEx SmartPost) offers outbound residential deliveries.

**Shipping / transit time**: In the contiguous U.S., delivery typically takes 2-7 business days, depending on the distance from the package’s origin to its destination.  
**Weight limits and maximum package size**: Packages up to 70 lbs. and 130" in length plus girth can be shipped. The ideal package weight is 1–10 lbs.

Free sneaker shipping with FedEx®
---------------------------------

Our partnership with FedEx® to ship Authenticity Guarantee-eligible sneakers is a key component of seller protections. After you make a sale, we’ll send you a free FedEx® shipping label via eBay Labels to get your kicks to our authentication center. That shipping label will protect you against loss or damage.

[Learn more about Authenticity Guarantee](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/selling/selling-sneakers)

![An eBay seller holding two eBay boxes standing in front of shelves with sneakers.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/06/lady-carrying-ebay-packages-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Calculate your item’s shipping costs
------------------------------------

Having accurate and competitive shipping costs in your listings can generate more bids and future purchases. You can use our shipping calculator to easily estimate how much it would cost to ship a certain item.

[Run the numbers](https://www.ebay.com/shp/Calculator)

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/06/shipping-calculator-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

FAQs
----

### Can I drop off FedEx Ground Economy packages at USPS?

No, USPS will no longer support receipt of any FedEx Ground Economy shipments. If you drop off your FedEx shipment to a USPS location, they will not forward it and the package will be seized. It's important to always use the correct label, packaging, and drop off location for each carrier. Find your [closest FedEx location](https://local.fedex.com/en-us)
.

### How is the flat rate for One Rate determined?

The flat rate is based solely on the package size and you pay the same rate for the selected package size, regardless of destination.

### What size packaging can I use for One Rate?

Sellers have the option to use free FedEx packaging or their own generic supplies.  

**Seller’s Own Packaging**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Package Size | Maximum Volume |
| FedEx 2Day One Rate Pak\* | 650 Cubic inches (LxWxH) |
| FedEx 2Day One Rate Small Box | 420 Cubic inches (LxWxH) |
| FedEx 2Day One Rate Medium Box | 650 Cubic inches (LxWxH) |
| FedEx 2Day One Rate Large Box | 1,100 Cubic Inches (LxWxH) |
| FedEx 2Day One Rate Extra Large Box | 2,200 Cubic Inches (LxWxH) |

\* Any One Rate Pak measuring more than 5" along its shortest side will be rated as a One Rate Box and priced based on the packages overall cubic volume

  

**FedEx Packaging**

|     |     |     |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Package Size | Package Type | Package Dimensions |
| FedEx 2Day One Rate Pak\* | *   Small Pak<br>*   Padded Pak<br>*   Large Pak<br>*   Reusable Sturdy Pak | *   10 1/4" x 12 3/4" (less than 5" on shortest side)<br>*   11 3/4" x 14 3/4" (less than 5" on shortest side)<br>*   12" x 15 1/2" (less than 5" on shortest side)<br>*   10" x 14 1/2" (less than 5" on shortest side) |
| FedEx 2Day One Rate Small Box | *   Small Box (S1)<br>*   Small Box (S2) | *   10 7/8" x 1 1/2" x 12 3/8"<br>*   8 3/4" x 2 11/16" x 11 5/16" |
| FedEx 2Day One Rate Medium Box | *   Medium Box (M1)<br>*   Medium Box (M2) | *   11 1/2" x 2 3/8" x 13 1/4"<br>*   8 3/4" x 4 3/8" x 11 5/16" |
| FedEx 2Day One Rate Large Box | *   Large Box (L1)<br>*   Large Box (L2) | *   12 3/8" x 3" x 17 1/2"<br>*   8 3/4" x 7 3/4" x 11 1/4" |
| FedEx 2Day One Rate Extra Large Box | *   Extra Large Box (X1)<br>*   Extra Large Box (X2) | *   11 7/8" x 10 3/4" x 11"<br>*   15 3/4" x 14 1/8" x 6" |

\* Any One Rate Pak measuring more than 5" along its shortest side will be rated as a One Rate Box and priced based on the packages overall cubic volume

### Is there a weight limit for One Rate shipments?

Yes, FedEx One Rate packages must weigh less than 50 lbs for all packages, whether you use your own packaging or FedEx packaging. If your package weighs over 50 pounds, you can ship your package using FedEx rates based on dimensional weight and zone.  
  

### Can I use One Rate to ship to Alaska and Hawaii?

No. FedEx One Rate is available for shipments within the contiguous U.S.

### Can I ship internationally with One Rate?

No, FedEx One Rate pricing is for FedEx 2Day domestic service only.

### Will my One Rate shipment be subject to additional surcharges like fuel or delivery area surcharges?

No. FedEx One Rate pricing already includes any applicable fuel, residential and delivery area surcharges. There are additional value-added services, such as signature services and additional declared value over $100, which you can add for an additional charge.  
  

### Does One Rate pricing include “insurance” or coverage for my package if something happens?

FedEx doesn’t offer insurance, but FedEx One Rate shipping covers declared value up to $100 for no additional charge. A higher value can be declared for an additional charge.

### Can I ship mailing tubes using One Rate?

Items that are tubular can only be shipped using FedEx One Rate if they are enclosed in a cardboard box or corresponding FedEx packaging box.

### Where/How can I find free FedEx Express boxes to use with the FedEx 2Day One Rate service?

Complimentary FedEx Express packaging is available at FedEx retail locations including FedEx Office, FedEx Ship Centers, FedEx Authorized Ship Centers and Office Depot Office Max locations. Visit [local.FedEx.com](https://local.fedex.com/)
 to find a location near you.

Looking for more answers?
=========================

[See FAQs](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/faqs)

![A stack of eBay branded paper mailjackets with an eBay shipping Label applied on a green backdrop.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/06/ebay-envelopes-1440x992.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=2f92cd85-8042-4bc5-9772-419d03b21284&ctx_pageTitle=FedEx%C2%AE+and+eBay+Labels+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Tax Information | Seller Center

Tax information
===============

Understand tax obligations that may affect you in the US and EU.

On this page

*   [Overview](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/tax-information#overview)
    
*   [Internet Sales Tax in the US](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/tax-information#internet-sales-tax-in-the-u-s)
    
*   [Tax Exemptions](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/tax-information#tax-exemptions)
    
*   [Form 1099-K](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/tax-information#form-1099-k)
    
*   [Refunds to a Buyer](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/tax-information#refunds-to-a-buyer)
    
*   [Value Added Tax in the EU/UK](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/tax-information#value-added-tax-in-the-e-u-u-k)
    

Overview
--------

When you sell on eBay, you’re responsible for complying with all applicable tax laws. If you’re selling to buyers outside the US, you should inform them about the potential import charges they’ll need to pay when they receive their item.

If you sell to buyers in certain states in the US, AU, NZ or in the European Union (EU), your transactions will be subject to applicable sales taxes, Goods and Services Tax, and/or Value Added Tax.

### Sellers’ tax responsibilities

You are responsible for paying all fees and taxes associated with using eBay as an eBay seller. For more information on eBay’s tax policy and your obligations, see our Tax policy and User Agreement.

Your tax-related responsibilities may include:

*   Paying sales tax on eBay sales
*   Paying income tax on eBay sales
*   Informing overseas buyers about import charges
*   Ability to validate what tax was collected on sales transactions.

Internet Sales Tax in the US
----------------------------

If you sell to buyers in the US, some jurisdictions may require you to collect applicable Internet Sales Tax on your transactions. As of July 1, 2021 a total of 46 jurisdictions require the collection of sales tax. In such cases, eBay collects and remits Internet Sales Tax on your behalf.

Learn more about Internet Sales Tax, on our [Help pages](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/fees-credits-invoices/taxes-import-charges?id=4121)
, or from your tax advisor.

Starting in November 2019, the way taxable transactions are processed and how taxes are collected for remittance will change, as follows:

*   In jurisdictions where eBay is required to collect Internet Sales Tax from buyers, order totals sent for processing will reflect the gross order amount inclusive of tax.
*   Once settled, the tax amount will be automatically deducted for remittance to the applicable taxing authority.
*   A record of the sales tax portion of the order will be available on the [Seller Hub Order](https://www.ebay.com/sh/ord)
     details page and through our Download order report.

Please note the applicable tax will continue to be paid by the buyer and you do not need to take any action. These changes do not apply to sellers in [managed payments](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/payments-and-fees/payments-and-earnings)
.

Internet Sales Tax FAQs
-----------------------

### What states now charge Internet Sales Tax?

There are currently 46 jurisdictions where eBay is obligated to collect and remit to the respective authorities for marketplace transactions.

**Marketplace Facilitator Law by State (IST)**

*   Alabama
*   Arizona
*   Arkansas
*   California
*   Colorado
*   Connecticut
*   District of Columbia
*   Florida
*   Georgia
*   Hawaii
*   Idaho
*   Illinois
*   Indiana
*   Iowa
*   Kansas
*   Kentucky
*   Louisiana
*   Maine
*   Maryland
*   Massachusetts
*   Michigan
*   Minnesota
*   Mississippi
*   Nebraska
*   Nevada
*   New Jersey
*   New Mexico
*   New York
*   North Carolina
*   North Dakota
*   Ohio
*   Oklahoma
*   Pennsylvania
*   Puerto Rico
*   Rhode Island
*   South Carolina
*   South Dakota
*   Tennessee
*   Texas
*   Utah
*   Vermont
*   Virginia
*   Washington
*   West Virginia
*   Wisconsin
*   Wyoming

### Why does eBay have a tax policy?

There may be legal implications, fees and tax obligations associated with using eBay. Remember that it’s your responsibility to understand and comply with relevant laws and regulations, and that you have to pay relevant fees and taxes. Our [full policy](https://www.ebay.com/help/policies/selling-policies/tax-policy?id=4348)
 explains how and when eBay charges applicable taxes, and provides additional guidance on your tax obligations, but we recommend you talk with a tax professional if you have any questions.

### Can eBay give me advice on my tax scenario?

If you are selling on eBay as a business, we strongly recommend seeking professional advice about your tax obligations. You can also review the eBay Tax [policy](https://www.ebay.com/help/policies/selling-policies/tax-policy?id=4348)
 in the Help Hub.

### What if my buyer has questions about the tax?

You can refer them to the eBay Tax policy in the Help Hub. Our [full policy](https://www.ebay.com/help/policies/selling-policies/tax-policy?id=4348)
 explains how and when eBay charges applicable taxes.

### Is there a way for tax-exempt buyers (e.g., charitable entities, resellers, etc.) to provide an exemption certificate and make purchases without paying tax?

Yes, we have a buyer exemption system that allows you to submit tax exemption certificates to eBay and make purchases without paying tax. Upload your [tax exemption certificate](https://ocsnext.ebay.com/ocs/mudcwf?deptName=IST)
. Learn more about [eBay's Buyer Exemption program for sales tax](https://www.ebay.com/help/buying/paying-items/paying-tax-ebay-purchases?id=4771#section2)
. 

### Will eBay be providing tools to help sellers with their tax obligations?

We’re developing reporting and exploring partnerships with tax service providers to help sellers with their sales tax obligations. For more information on these new tax requirements, we recommend consulting with your tax advisor. If you don’t have one, please contact one of our partners like [Avalara](https://www.avalara.com/us/en/learn/sales-tax/south-dakota-wayfair.html?CampaignID=7010b000001cPhr&campaignname=BDZ201809%20eBay%20Wayfair%20launch&lsmr=Direct%20Partner%20Referral&lso=Direct%20Partner%20Referral)
 for specific insights into the best course of action for you.

### How does eBay determine how much sales tax should be applied to each state/sale?

Each state and jurisdiction have different sales tax rates. eBay determines the tax rate based on the ship to address and the items purchased.

### Are shipping and handling taxed as well?

Each state’s legislation dictates if shipping and handling are taxable or not. In those states where eBay is collecting tax, we will collect tax on shipping and handling where applicable.

### What states are sellers required to collect sales tax for?

Sellers are generally required to collect sales tax in any state where they have a physical presence, which has been the case even before the recent Supreme Court decision. As of October 1, 2019, 34 states will require the collection of sales tax. In addition, if a seller meets any of the new economic nexus standards in other states, they would need to collect and remit sales tax in those states as well. Sellers should consult with their tax advisor about tax obligations for each state as the rules may vary on a state-by-state basis. If you use platforms other than eBay for selling, you may need to aggregate all of your sales into a state to determine if you have crossed that state's threshold for economic nexus.

### Where can I find more information about eBay collecting internet sales tax and which states eBay collects?

Please visit our [Help page](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/fees-credits-invoices/taxes-import-charges?id=4121)
 and look for updates on [Seller News](https://community.ebay.com/t5/Announcements/bg-p/Announcements)
.

### If a seller discounts the invoice, will the sales tax amount adjust as well? If not, is there anything in the works that will solve this?

If a seller provides the buyer with a discount, the tax will adjust accordingly. The tax will be calculated on the discounted price provided by the seller.

### Is there a way to enter different percentages for different jurisdictions within a state?

We’re in the process of updating the Tax Table to provide this functionality for our sellers.

### Does eBay charge final value fees on the final amount including sales tax?

Final value fees are calculated on the total amount of the sale. Please refer to our [fees pages](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/fees-credits-invoices/selling-fees-managed-payments-sellers?id=4822)
 for more information.

### Will eBay charge Internet Sales Tax on any fees I pay to eBay?

No. eBay only collects and remits Internet Sales Tax on the sale price of your items.

### Does eBay collect Internet Sales Tax from the seller or the buyer?

Depending on tax legislation where you live and where your buyer lives, sales tax, Value Added Tax (VAT), Goods and Services Tax (GST), or similar consumption tax may apply to items you sell on eBay. Whether it’s included in the listing price or added at checkout depends on both the item’s location and the buyer’s shipping address.

Tax Exemptions
--------------

**Can I submit a resale certificate so I do not have to pay sales tax on eBay purchases?**

Yes, tax exempt buyers such as charitable entities and resellers can submit tax exemption certificates to eBay and make purchases without paying tax. Upload your [tax exemption certificate](https://ocsnext.ebay.com/ocs/mudcwf?deptName=IST)
.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/help/buying/paying-items/paying-tax-ebay-purchases?id=4771#section2)

Form 1099-K
-----------

If you’ve made more than $20,000 in gross sales and exceeded 200 transactions\* on eBay in 2025, you will receive a tax Form 1099-K for all your 2025 sales transactions. Please visit our [Form 1099-K FAQ page](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/changes-to-ebay-and-your-1099-k)
 for more information.

\*Except in the following States where the threshold is lower: Arkansas, District of Columbia, Illinois, Maryland, Massachusetts, Missouri, Montana, New Jersey, Vermont, Virginia. 

For more information on the reporting threshold for these states, consult with your tax advisor.

Form 1099-K FAQs
----------------

### What is a 1099-K?

Form 1099-K is a document that taxpayers receive to report income from payment card and third party network transactions. It includes the gross amount of all payment transactions within a calendar year. This gross amount doesn’t include any adjustments for credits, discounts, fees, refunds or other amounts. 

[Learn more about Form 1099-K](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/fees-credits-invoices/ebay-form-1099k?id=4794)

### Why do I need a 1099-K?

Your sales on online marketplaces like eBay are reportable once they exceed a certain amount. Because eBay processes payments for these sales, IRS regulations require us to issue a 1099-K for US sellers who cross the sales threshold for a given tax year.

### Will I have to pay taxes if I receive a 1099-K?

Not necessarily. Just because you receive a 1099-K doesn’t automatically mean that you’ll owe taxes on the amount reported on your 1099-K. The 1099-K shows your gross receipts, but you are taxable on your net income.

Only goods that are sold for a profit are considered taxable, so you won’t owe any taxes on something you sell for less than what you paid for it. For example, if you bought a bike for $1,000 last year, and then sold it on eBay today for $700, that $700 you made would generally not be subject to income tax.

Please consult a tax professional if you have any questions about any tax filing or regulations.

### What happens if I have multiple accounts?

If you have multiple eBay accounts associated with the same SSN or ITIN, your thresholds are calculated by combining all payment transactions for the year. If your combined sales exceed the above thresholds, you’ll receive a 1099-K for each account, even if one or more of the individual accounts do not exceed the IRS reporting thresholds.

### Where can I find more information about 1099-K?

You can find more information about Form 1099-K in the IRS’s [updated FAQ’s](https://www.irs.gov/pub/taxpros/fs-2025-08.pdf?source=email)
.

Refunds to a Buyer
------------------

*   If the buyer requires a refund—cancellation, full refund, less than full refund, or partial refund, eBay will refund the sales tax to the buyer in these cases since we collected the sales tax on the original transaction.
*   The best practice is to send refunds through the eBay platform. However, if the refund is carried out on the PayPal platform, the seller is responsible to refund the full amount paid by the buyer at checkout including any paid Internet Sales Tax.
*   The seller will have to review the original PayPal transaction for the total amount of tax due to the buyer and add this to the refund amount for a full refund or the proportional amount for a partial refund.
*   When the seller refunds the buyer, eBay will credit them back any taxes refunded.

How to access reports

Report form eBay Seller Hub

Report from PayPal

**How can I check how much Internet Sales Tax was collected by eBay?**

Our [Orders Report](https://www.ebay.com/sh/ord/?filter=status:ALL_ORDERS)
 itemizes how much tax we collected and remitted for transactions in [marketplace responsibility states](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/fees-credits-invoices/taxes-import-charges?id=4121#section4)
. You can download your orders in a CSV (comma-separated) file from the “Manage all orders” page in Seller Hub.

Value Added Tax in the EU/UK
----------------------------

If you sell to buyers in the EU or UK, you may be required to charge and remit Value Added Tax. Value Added Tax is similar to a sales tax. Generally speaking, it’s a tax on a business’s gross receipts from the sale of goods and services. For example, any eBay seller making sales to UK buyers and fulfilling those orders from UK-based inventory is likely obligated to register for, charge and remit Value Added Tax in the UK. Speak with a tax advisor to better understand how Value Added Tax applies to your eBay business in the EU and other countries outside the US.

### Do I need to register for Value Added Tax in the EU/UK?

eBay wants sellers to be successful and legally protected, wherever you do business.

Registering for Value Added Tax in the appropriate jurisdiction may help you do both those things.

Whether you need to register for Value Added Tax in an EU member state or in the UK depends on the way you conduct your business.

The key factors that determine if you have an obligation to register for Value Added Tax are

1.  Your business’s country of establishment.
2.  The location of your inventory.
3.  Your level of sales.

It’s each seller’s responsibility to ensure they are Value Added Tax-compliant.

### Next steps

Complete the following steps to ensure you are Value Added Tax-compliant and to avoid potential selling restrictions

1.  Register with the local tax authority in each country where you’ve determined you have a Value Added Tax obligation. For example in the UK, [register with HM Revenue & Customs (HMRC)](https://www.gov.uk/government/publications/vat-application-for-registration-vat1)
    , the UK’s tax authority.
2.  [Provide eBay with your Value Added Tax ID number](https://www.ebay.com/spr/vat)
    , and we’ll automatically add it to all your eligible new listings.

### Value-Added Tax resources

UK: [HMRC Value-Added Tax guidance](https://www.gov.uk/guidance/vat-overseas-businesses-using-an-online-marketplace-to-sell-goods-in-the-uk)
 for overseas, online retailers

UK: [HMRC Value-Added Tax registration](https://www.gov.uk/government/publications/vat-application-for-registration-vat1)

EU: [Taxation and Customs Union Business: VAT](https://europa.eu/youreurope/business/taxation/vat/index_en.htm)

EU: [VAT on e-Commerce - One Stop Shop](https://vat-one-stop-shop.ec.europa.eu/index_en)

VAT FAQs
--------

### I live in Europe, but I sell on ebay.com (USA) and most of my customers are out of the European Union. Must I pay VAT to ebay.com as an additional tax?

Since you are doing business in Europe, you are required to comply with EU laws and regulations, as well as those in your own country. The eBay sites in Europe (such as ebay.sp, ebay.co.uk, ebay.de, etc.) are set up with the correct processes to help sellers meet these requirements. [Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/help/buying/paying-items/paying-tax-ebay-purchases?id=4771#section4)
.

### Do I need to inform a buyer overseas about import charges?

Yes. Buyers are responsible for paying import fees, usually as part of clearing their parcel through customs or when they receive their item. If you offer international shipping, you can’t include these costs in the item’s purchase and shipping price. Make sure to let international buyers know this in your listings. If your item’s being sent using the [Global Shipping Program](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/ebay-labels-services/ebay-international-shipping-services/ebay-global-shipping-program)
, eBay will inform the buyer about import charges and these will be included in the order total at checkout.

\* Except in Vermont and Massachusetts where the threshold is lower irrespective of the number of transactions.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=78c98ac8-6345-462e-b621-b559b78a1897&ctx_pageTitle=Tax+Information+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# USPS® and eBay Labels | Seller Center

USPS® and eBay Labels
=====================

On this page

*   [When to choose USPS for eBay Labels](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/choosing-a-carrier-and-service/usps-and-ebay-labels#when-to-choose-u-s-p-s-for-e-bay-labels)
    
*   [Key benefits](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/choosing-a-carrier-and-service/usps-and-ebay-labels#key-benefits)
    
*   [Calculate your item’s shipping costs](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/choosing-a-carrier-and-service/usps-and-ebay-labels#calculate-your-item-s-shipping-costs)
    
*   [FAQs](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/choosing-a-carrier-and-service/usps-and-ebay-labels#f-a-qs)
    

When to choose USPS for eBay Labels
-----------------------------------

You can easily arrange a free scheduled USPS pickup in most zip codes across the country. It’s also a good option for competitive pricing on First-Class Package service when shipping packages weighing less than 1 lb., and for parcel packages below 5 lbs. using Priority Mail®.

Use the [calculator](https://www.ebay.com/shp/Calculator)
 to check out USPS shipping rates.

![A woman standing in a warehouse surrounded by shelves of packages looking at a tablet with incoming order. She is leaning on a desk with packages and shipping materials on top.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/06/lady-sorting-boxes-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Skip the line. Prepare your package for pickup
----------------------------------------------

1

### Package

Package, weigh, and measure your item carefully to avoid [surcharges](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/smart-ship-tips/shipping-label-adjustments)
. Update dimensions as needed before purchasing your eBay Labels postage.

2

### Schedule

[Schedule](https://tools.usps.com/schedule-pickup-steps.htm)
 your pickup one day in advance (by 2:00 a.m. CST).

3

### Print

Print and attach your prepaid label to your package. Leave the package in a convenient location for your carrier to see and pick up at the scheduled time.

Key benefits
------------

*   USPS shipments can be covered for up to $15,000 by [ShipCover Insurance](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/choosing-a-carrier-and-service/usps-and-ebay-labels)
     when you use eBay Labels. Keep track of your shipment, delivery and insurance, plus simply open a claim, all in one place. See the full [rate table](https://pe.usps.com/Archive/PriceFile)
     for detailed coverage and rate information.
*   Take advantage of the most comprehensive delivery and pickup network in the United States. [Find U.S. Post Office™ Locations](https://tools.usps.com/find-location.htm)
    .
*   No printer? No problem. USPS accepts eBay Labels QR Codes.
*   Get free flat rate supplies for Priority Mail® and Priority Mail Express®.
*   Save on retail prices with USPS Shipments. Use our shipping calculator to see rates specific to your area and shipment.

![An eBay reseller adding bubble wrap within a shipping box on a wicker table with more packages stacked in the background.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/06/bubble-wrap-package-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

A better way to insure your eBay shipments
------------------------------------------

ShipCover offers eBay sellers peace of mind at big savings. ShipCover is fully integrated with eBay Labels. Buying insurance is only a few clicks away. Claims are processed in days, not weeks.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/faqs#ship-cover-insurance-and-claims)

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/08/women-prepping-shipping-boxes-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Domestic services

International services

### Priority Mail®

This is a popular service that includes tracking and delivery in 1-3 business days. You can ship from Post Office™ locations of from your home or business.  
**Shipping / transit time**: 1-3 days  
**Weight Limits and maximum package size**: Up to 70 lbs.

###   

### Priority Mail® Cubic  

Cubic rates will automatically display in eBay Labels when the cubic price is lower than the non-cubic rate.  
**Weight Limits and maximum package size**: Up to 20 lbs. and a cubic feet volume up to 0.5 cubic foot (864 cubic inches) and maximum dimensions of 18” on any side.

###   

### Priority Mail Express®

Priority Mail Express® provides competitive prices and fast delivery every day, all year, with limited exceptions, to most U.S. addresses and PO Boxes™.  
**Shipping / transit time**: Next-day to 2-day guarantee by 6PM  
**Weight Limits and maximum package size**: Up to 70 lbs.

### Ground Advantage™  

USPS Ground Advantage™ offers affordable domestic ground shipping to all 50 states, U.S. military bases, territories, possessions, and Freely Associated States for packages up to 70 lbs.  
**Shipping / transit time**: 2-5 business days.  
**Weight Limits and maximum package size**: Best-priced service for items up to 15.999 oz, based on weight (rounded up to 4 oz, 8 oz, 12 oz, and 15.999 oz) and zone (distance). Packages greater than 15.999 oz are charged by the pound up to 70 lbs (rounded up).

###   

### Ground Advantage™ Cubic  

Cubic rates will automatically display in eBay Labels when the cubic price is lower than the non-cubic rate.  
**Weight Limits and maximum package size**: Up to 20 lbs. and a cubic feet volume up to 1.0 cubic foot (1,728 cubic inches) and maximum dimensions of 18” on any side.

###   

### Media Mail®

Media Mail® is a cost-effective way to send media and educational materials. This service has restrictions on the type of media that can be sent.  
**Shipping / transit time**: 2-8 days  
**Weight Limits and maximum package size**: Maximum weight is 70 lbs.  
[See Media Mail eligibility standards](https://pe.usps.com/text/dmm300/173.htm?_gl=1*f5ma6t*_ga*MTE1OTc3MDY2LjE2NjkxNDY5NTk.*_ga_3NXP3C8S9V*MTY3MjkyMzA5MC44LjEuMTY3MjkyNTExMC4wLjAuMA..#ep1113500)

Calculate your item’s shipping costs
------------------------------------

Having accurate and competitive shipping costs in your listings can generate more bids and future purchases. You can use our shipping calculator to easily estimate how much it would cost to ship a certain item.

[Run the numbers](https://www.ebay.com/shp/Calculator)

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/06/shipping-calculator-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

FAQs
----

### What are USPS Nonstandard fees?

[USPS Nonstandard fees](https://faq.usps.com/s/article/Parcel-Size-Weight-Fee-Standards)
 are additional charges applied to packages that exceed certain size or shape limits, if dimensions are not accurately provided during shipping label creation, or if the packaging is irregular or nonconforming. These fees are in addition to standard postage costs and are meant to cover the extra handling required for these packages. These fees apply to Priority Mail Express, Priority Mail and USPS Ground Advantage.

There are several types of Nonstandard fees:

*   The Nonstandard Length fee is added for packages measuring between 22” and 30” and packages >30”.
*   The Nonstandard Volume fee is added for any package with a cubic volume exceeding 2 cubic feet (3,456 cubic inches).
*   The [Nonstandard Characteristic](https://pe.usps.com/text/DMM300/201.htm?q=liquid&h=liquid&t=H&s=R&p=1&c=DMM#ep1097220)
     fee applies to packages with these criteria: 
    *   Cylindrical tubes or rolls
    *   Cans, or wooden or metal boxes
    *   Parcels containing more than 24 oz of liquid in glass containers, or 1 gallon or more of liquid in metal or plastic containers (see [USPS guidelines for liquids](https://pe.usps.com/text/dmm300/601.htm#ep1211902)
        )
    *   Other (for example, if the contents may cause the parcel to roll or not maintain the integrity of the packaging during processing). See USPS guidelines for [packaging](https://pe.usps.com/text/dmm300/601.htm#ep1211902)
         and [acceptable mailing containers](https://pe.usps.com/text/dmm300/601.htm#ep1193057)
        .  
        
*   The Dimensional Noncompliance fee applies when:  
    *   Inaccurate or missing dimensions are provided when creating shipping labels.
    *   Nonstandard Characteristic is not declared upon shipping the item.

### If a USPS package has more than one factor that would cause Nonstandard fees, how are the fees calculated?

*   Packages with Nonstandard Length and Nonstandard Volume will be assessed for both fees.
*   Packages with Nonstandard Length and Nonstandard Characteristic will be assessed for only the greater of the two fees.
*   Packages with Nonstandard Length, Nonstandard Volume, and Nonstandard Characteristic will be assessed for only the greater of Nonstandard Length or Nonstandard Characteristic in addition to Nonstandard Volume.  
    

### What are USPS postal zones and how do they affect my shipping costs?

USPS postal zones aren’t actual geographic zones, but rather, codes that convey the distance a package has to travel in miles from its origin point.

Zone 1: 1-50 miles

Zone 2: 51-150 miles

Zone 3: 151-300 miles

Zone 4: 301-600 miles

Zone 5: 601-1000 miles

Zone 6: 1001-1400 miles

Zone 7: 1401-1800 miles

Zone 8: 1801 miles or greater

Zone 9: Designated for Freely Associated States such as Guam, Palau and other United States Territories

The USPS mail class you select (First Class, Media Mail, Priority Mail, etc.) along with the shipping zone will determine the price of postage. You can [look up USPS postal zones here](https://postcalc.usps.com/domesticzonechart)
.

Keep your address up to date in your eBay account and be sure that your return address ZIP code matches the ZIP code you’re actually shipping from.

For instance, if your business has locations in multiple states or the Post Office near your work has a different ZIP code than the one near your home, be sure to use the correct ZIP code on your return address when shipping. If the ZIP code on your shipping label doesn’t match the ZIP code you’re shipping from, USPS may charge your customers additional postage that’s due upon delivery.

### Which postal codes are excluded from USPS discounted labels?

These [zip codes](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1DpcrdwVuoUL6Ho5P76nrdBUajggpigtBOwgCGIZbdOE/edit?usp=sharing)
 are priced with USPS published commercial rates for packages up to 20 lbs. for Priority Mail, Priority Mail Flat Rate, and Ground Advantage, so the label cost is higher than for delivery to most zip codes.

### What are the requirements for USPS cubic pricing?

Packages

*   Weighing less than 20 pounds
*   With a cubic feet volume up to 0.5 (864 cubic inches) cubic foot for Priority Mail and up to 1.0 cubic foot (1,728 cubic inches) for Ground Advantage
*   With each side measuring 18 inches or less

### How do I calculate cubic feet volume?

Multiply the package Length x Width x Height and divide by 1,728. eBay will automatically offer cubic pricing based on the package weight and dimensions you input.

### How can I receive USPS cubic rates for my eBay shipments?

Simply enter accurate weight and dimensions for your package when printing your eBay shipping labels. eBay will automatically offer the best rate, and apply cubic pricing for Priority Mail and Ground Advantage if the cubic rate is better than non-cubic rates. 

**It’s important to input accurate weights and dimensions to ensure you receive the best possible and accurate price when purchasing your labels.**

### How will I know whether I was charged cubic pricing or non-cubic pricing for my shipping label?

If you were charged for cubic pricing, you will see the cubic price tier above the USPS zone indicated on the top section of the label—remember, you will be charged the lower of cubic or non-cubic pricing for packages that qualify for cubic pricing.  

### Can I ship mailing tubes with USPS cubic pricing?

No. Items that are tubular can only be shipped using USPS cubic pricing if they are enclosed in a cardboard box.

### How can I ensure my listings with calculated shipping qualify for USPS cubic pricing?

USPS cubic pricing is available when you offer eBay discounted rates. You can check and update your shipping discount settings in your [Shipping Preferences.](https://www.ebay.com/ship/prf/carrier)
 **It’s important to input accurate weights and dimensions to ensure you receive the best possible and accurate price when listing your items.**

Looking for more answers?
=========================

[See FAQs](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/faqs)

![A stack of eBay branded paper mailjackets with an eBay shipping Label applied on a green backdrop.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/06/ebay-envelopes-1440x992.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=440318ef-3936-4e03-b527-52a40c360430&ctx_pageTitle=USPS%C2%AE+and+eBay+Labels+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Returns | Seller Center

Returns
=======

Attract and retain buyers with a great returns policy.

On this page

*   [Overview](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/protections/returns#overview)
    
*   [How returns work](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/protections/returns#how-returns-work)
    
*   [Seller tools for managing returns](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/protections/returns#seller-tools-for-managing-returns)
    
*   [Attract more customers with returns](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/protections/returns#attract-more-customers-with-returns)
    
*   [Tools and resources](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/protections/returns#tools-and-resources)
    
*   [Returns FAQs](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/protections/returns#returns-f-a-qs)
    

Overview
--------

Managing returns on eBay is easy. When your buyer opens a return, we’ll first notify you through Messages and in My eBay. We then make it easy for you to provide a return label or offer an alternative resolution, such as a partial refund. Once you have received the item back, you’ll have plenty of time to inspect it and issue a refund, all of which can be done directly from your Return Details screen.

How returns work
----------------

1

### Get notified

We’ll let you know when a return is requested.

2

### Track the return

Follow its progress on [My eBay](https://my.ebay.com/ws/eBayISAPI.dll?MyEbayBeta&CurrentPage=MyeBayNextReturn)
 or [Seller Hub](https://www.ebay.com/sh/ord/return)
.

3

### Complete return

Issue a refund, replacement, or exchange.

[Learn how to handle a return request](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/managing-returns-refunds/handle-return-request-seller?id=4115)
 with our step-by-step guide.

Seller tools for managing returns
---------------------------------

### Use these seller tools to manage your refunds and create a returns policy that attracts and retains buyers.

Providing labels & refunds

Custom return rules

Partial refunds

You can save time by allowing your buyers to obtain a return label directly from eBay. If an eBay label is made available, your buyer can print it off as soon as the return is opened and automatically or manually accepted. Once the label is used, the charge will either go to you or your buyer depending on your return policy and the reason for the return.

After your item is returned, you can easily issue a refund directly from your Return Details screen. Because managing many returns can be time consuming, we’ve set it up so that you’ll automatically issue a refund after 2 business days from when return tracking shows the item has been delivered back to you. 

This process shortens the turnaround time of returns, helps sellers manage returns more efficiently, and reduces the likelihood of defects should the buyer ask eBay to step in to help with a return.

Note: There are certain situations where the automated process may be delayed or may not happen at all. We do this to make sure we don’t automate in a situation where you are expecting a different outcome. For example, we won’t provide your buyers with a return label if you don’t accept returns unless you ask us to. For more details on when we pause automation, [see the FAQs below](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/protections/returns#faqs)
.

Attract more customers with returns
-----------------------------------

A good returns policy can attract customers and keep them coming back. Here are some tips and features you can use to your advantage.

![eBay Return Policies that work for you video thumbnail](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/02/1200x720_eBayReturnPoliciesThatWorkForYou.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

### Meet buyers’ expectations

Many buyers expect a good returns experience that is consistent and competitive with a modern marketplace. When reviewing your returns policy options, be sure to choose the one that works best for you and your sales goals. You may choose to offer:

*   No returns accepted
    
*   30-day buyer-paid returns
    
*   30-day free returns
    
*   60-day buyer-paid returns
    
*   60-day free returns
    
*   14-day returns in limited categories
    

Learn more about [setting up your return policy](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/managing-returns-refunds/handling-return-requests/setting-rules-return-requests?id=4368)
.

### Offer free returns

A free returns policy is a great way to potentially attract more buyers and keep them coming back. Knowing that an item can be returned free of charge gives buyers the confidence they need to make a purchase.

Tools and resources
-------------------

#### Carrier options

Choose from the most trusted shipping carriers and get exclusive discounts.

[Compare carrier options](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/ebay-labels-services/ebay-domestic-shipping-services)

#### Shipping calculator

Estimating your shipping costs just got easier.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/shp/Calculator)

#### Automated refunds

Choose when to issue immediate refunds.

[Create return rules](https://www.ebay.com/rtn/Return/SellerRules)

Returns FAQs
------------

### When do return requests qualify for automatic acceptance?

To qualify for automatic acceptance, return requests must meet all of these criteria:

*   Your offer returns on the listing
*   The return request is opened within your return policy and timeframe
    
*   The return is domestic and will be shipped within the US
*   The item does not exceed the size or weight limits for USPS Ground Advantage™, Priority Mail®, or FedEx Ground™.

If a Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA) number is required per the settings in your [Return Preferences](https://www.ebay.com/rtn/Return/SellerRules)
, we will ask you to provide it before the buyer can send the item back to you.

### What if my listings don’t offer returns?

We won't automatically accept the return. However, please note that if your buyer claims the item they received arrived damaged, is faulty, or doesn’t match the listing, you will still need to resolve their issue. If you are unable to, the buyer can ask eBay to step in and we may provide the buyer with a return label and charge you for the cost of the label.

Also, we may automatically issue a refund if the return tracking confirms delivery and a refund has not been issued within 2 business days.

### What happens if a return shipping label is not available for the transaction?

If a return shipping label isn't available, we will ask that you and your buyer make arrangements to obtain a return label off eBay.

### Who pays for the return shipping label?

The party responsible for the cost of the return shipping label depends on your returns policy and the buyer’s reason for returning the item. Sellers are required to pay for return shipping if the buyer claims the item they received arrived damaged, is faulty, or doesn’t match the listing. For all other return reasons, who pays for return shipping is determined by your return policy.

### When a return shipping label is provided to a buyer, what type of label is provided?

eBay provides either a USPS Ground Advantage™ or Priority Mail® label or a FedEx Ground™ label.  

### What if I want to use a label from a different carrier than USPS?

If you're using a different label, in your [Return Preferences](https://www.ebay.com/rtn/Return/SellerRules)
, you need to opt into “RMA Number” (Return Merchandise Authorization). Then you'll be able to upload your own label when a buyer requests a return.  

### When will eBay automatically issue a refund on my behalf?

We recommend that you refund the buyer as soon as you receive the return. However, if the item’s tracking information shows confirmed delivery, 2 business days have elapsed, and the refund has not yet been issued to the buyer, eBay may automatically issue a refund on your behalf. eBay will also consider buyer and seller risk and performance data in determining whether to automate a refund.

### How can I make sure my buyer receives a Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA) number before they send the item back to me?

You can decide to offer a RMA number by checking the appropriate box in your [Return Preferences](https://www.ebay.com/rtn/Return/SellerRules)
 page. We will ask you to provide the RMA number before the buyer can send the item back to you.

### How can I issue an immediate refund for a return request instead of having the item sent back to me?

You can set up automation rules in your [Return Preferences](https://www.ebay.com/rtn/Return/SellerRules)
 to immediately refund your buyer and let them keep the item.

### How can I make sure that an item is returned to the correct location?

To ensure your items are shipped back to the correct location, it’s important that you always keep your return address up to date. You can update this in the “addresses” section of your account settings.

Please note that your return address set at the time the return was opened will determine where the item is sent. Once the return is opened, you can't update the address.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=9da61ecc-7b1f-0595-2208-b6e4e33615c0&ctx_pageTitle=Returns+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Seasonal playbook | Seller Center

Seasonal playbook
=================

Great tips for any peak selling season
--------------------------------------

7 best practices for Sellers
----------------------------

#### 1\. Research trends and products

Dive deeper with Terapeak + eBay.

[Get current research](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-research-tools)

#### 2\. Determine what to sell

Plan what products to source and how to price them.

[See what’s selling](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/selling/what-to-sell)

#### 3\. Optimize your listings

From pictures to pricing, follow these best practices.

[Better listings](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/listing-best-practices)

#### 4\. Help buyers find items

Match products with Sellers’ search terms.

[Add item specifics](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/item-specifics)

#### 5\. Optimize for mobile

More and more of your customers are mobile.

[Mobile listing](https://pages.ebay.com/sell/itemdescription/mobilefriendlyguidelines.html)

#### 6\. Ship with eBay supplies

Your buyers trust the eBay brand.

[Purchase supplies](https://www.ebay.com/str/ebayshippingsupplies)

#### 7\. Do more with an eBay store

Get more out of the eBay marketplace.

[Set up a store](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/payments-and-fees/subscriptions-and-fees)

Stay current with other Seller insights and eBay News
-----------------------------------------------------

### Listen to our weekly podcast

Weekly tips on starting, running, and growing your business.

[Listen now](https://community.ebay.com/t5/eBay-for-Business-Podcast/bg-p/eBay_Podcast_GHblog-board)

### Learn from other eBay Sellers

Connect with Sellers like you.

[Join the conversation](https://community.ebay.com/t5/Selling/bd-p/selling-db)

### Stay current with eBay News

Need-to-know updates for your eBay business.

[Latest announcements](https://community.ebay.com/t5/Announcements/bg-p/Announcements)

Win the season with these social channel tactics
------------------------------------------------

*   Set up an Instagram or Facebook account and use them to attract buyers to eBay.
*   Show off your products with great photos. If possible, show them in use or propped to reflect the current season.
*   Actively post at least once a week (same day if you’re doing it once a week) to build up consistency with your followers.
*   Plan a series of posts in advance so you can easily post each time.
*   Post about your expertise in the area of items you sell or post about a relevant topic you have knowledge about.
*   Post testimonials and positive comments you receive from customers (screen shots from feedback or My Messages).
*   Collaborate with others to put outfits together from your individual listings.
*   Hashtag the brands you’re promoting.

![collage of social media posts like Instagram and Facebook](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/10/social-images.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

eBay for Business on YouTube
----------------------------

Whether you’re just starting to sell and looking for instructions and tips, or you’re a reseller building a small business, we’ll share the inspiration, how-tos, news, advice, and seller stories to help power your success.

[YouTube Channel](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC3P-rBiw1nDsctRthAzoG-A)

![Man using laptop and YouTube is on-screen](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/04/youtube_channel_1200x1200.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

How to create the perfect listing any time of year
--------------------------------------------------

There are four parts to the perfect listing

*   Title
*   Item Specifics
*   Quality Photos
*   Price

[Watch video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Rt07tAFJV_I)

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/11/ebay-bag-1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Examples of perfect listing titles
----------------------------------

### Fashion

*   Lululemon Swiftly Tech LS 2.0 Iced Iris Crew Shirt Long Sleeve
*   Nike Air Jordan 1 Retro High OG Baroque Brown Bio Hack Size 11

### Electronics

*   VIZIO V405-H19 V-Series 40" Class 4K HDR 120Hz Smart TV New
*   Google Chromecast Ultra 4K Digital Media Streamer - Black (GA3A00403A14)

### Trading Cards & Collectibles

*   2021 Topps Series 1 Short Print Photo Variation Babe Ruth (#81) Yankees SP
*   Hallmark 2020 Holiday Ornament Gingerbread Cutie – 11th in Christmas Cupcakes – Mint in box

  

**Pro Tip**: Perfect titles AND item specifics help searchability of your listings.

![Example of a good listing title.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2022/04/perfect_listing_title_example_1200x1440.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Sell more during peak periods
-----------------------------

Tips to boost your profits
--------------------------

### Boost your visibility

Improve exposure with Promoted Listings.

[Better impressions](https://www.ebay.com/sh/mktg/pl)

### Sell more with volume pricing

Your customers will spend more, buy more.

[Offer volume pricing](https://www.ebay.com/sh/mkt/promotionmanager/volumepricing)

### Centralize your business

Manage your business with one convenient tool.

[Use Seller Hub](https://www.ebay.com/sh/ovw)

### Get more value with eBay Labels

Print, manage, track, and save with eBay Labels.

[Simplify shipping](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/ebay-labels-services/ebay-domestic-shipping-services)

### Use offers to buyers

When buyers show interest in your product target them with an offer.

[Learn how](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/seller-hub-promotions/offers-to-buyers-best-offer)

### Keep selling after the sale

Offer post-sale deals and discounts.

[Make more sales](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/seller-hub-promotions)

Tips for taking time away from your business
--------------------------------------------

Everyone occasionally needs some time away—whether it’s to recharge your batteries, take care of an emergency, or catch up on orders during peak times.

You can let buyers know you’re away for a period of time without worrying. When you indicate you’ll be away, your handling and estimated delivery times will automatically be adjusted. You can also schedule this time in advance.

[Change settings](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/ebay-stores/managing-ebay-store/account-holiday?id=4090)

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=f7ab858b-feff-e691-8358-86e089b29ada&ctx_pageTitle=Seasonal+playbook+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Seller News July 2025 | Seller Center

Seller News: July 2025
======================

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/06/sn_july_sellercenter_lp_1440x992.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

### In July, we’re introducing updates that help build buyer trust and keep your listings competitive during the busy summer season.

#### Tools you can trust

*   Build buyer trust and get more transparent shipping updates with our [improved tracking process](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-july/tracking-updates)
    

#### Optimize your business

*   Make the most of your ad spend with an improved [monthly budget approach.](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-july/optimize-business#budget-pacing)
    
*   Drive buyer satisfaction with three new [pre-loved fashion condition grades](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-july/optimize-business#condition-grading)
    .

#### Grow your business

*   Unlock more sales opportunities by listing [refurbished items](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-july/category-expansion)
     in more available categories than ever before.

# Seller News April 2025 | Seller Center

Seller News: April 2025
=======================

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/03/sn_apr_lp_1440x992.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

### With a new look and more frequent updates, Seller News will now be your go-to source for the latest seller updates. From our collaboration with Facebook Marketplace to a new regulation you need to know about—this month’s updates are ready for you to unpack.

#### Grow your business

*   We’re expanding our collaboration with [Facebook Marketplace](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-april/facebook-marketplace)
     to increase visibility for more of your listings.

#### Seller protections

*   Learn how to comply with [new import regulations](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-april/regulation-mexico)
     that are applicable to all items being shipped to Mexico.

# Verified Rights Owner (VeRO) profiles | Seller Center

Verified Rights Owner (VeRO) profiles
=====================================

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/06/sc_vero_profiles_hero_1440x992.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

On this page

*   [Become a verified right owner](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/verified-rights-owner-profiles#become-a-verified-right-owner)
    
*   [VeRO participant profiles](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/verified-rights-owner-profiles#ve-r-o-participant-profiles)
    

Become a verified right owner
-----------------------------

Create a profile page which allows you to share your intellectual property (IP) information with the eBay community.

Provide Information
-------------------

VeRO profiles are free
----------------------

*   Provide guidance on the proper use of your IP rights.
*   Share  a list of your IP , including brands, trademarks, and copyrights.
*   Add the potential consequences of infringing on your company’s IP rights.
*   Outline any requirements or permissions needed to sell items with your IP.
*   Add how to contact you with questions or concerns.
*   Include any other frequently asked questions.

*   Help sellers understand your intellectual property.
*   Contact [vero@ebay.com](mailto:vero@ebay.com)
     for more information and to start the process.
*   The rights owners are solely responsible for the content.
*   Contact rights owners directly if you have questions.

VeRO participant profiles
-------------------------

The pages listed below provide information about each brands’ products and intellectual property policy. 

*   The content is provided and managed by the rights owners themselves.
*   This isn’t a complete list of all brands with IP rights on eBay.
*   Not all rights owners in the VeRO program have a participant profile listed here.

*   [3](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/verified-rights-owner-profiles#appendix-3)

# Seller News December | Seller Center

Seller News: December 2025
==========================

![A man and woman stand in a room with wooden shelving, looking at a tablet the man is holding. The eBay logo is in the top left of the image.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/11/eb-18222484217_seller-news_q4_big3_seller-foundations_seller-news-flagship_dec3_main_ticket_sellercenter_lp_750x832_final.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)![A man and woman stand in a room with wooden shelving, looking at a tablet the man is holding. The eBay logo is in the top left of the image.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/11/eb-18222484217_seller-news_q4_big3_seller-foundations_seller-news-flagship_dec3_main_ticket_sellercenter_lp_1488x100_final.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

### Check out our new tools and updated policies to help optimize your business.

#### Optimize your business

*   Add [Your Cost to simplify bookkeeping](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-december/cost-of-goods-sold)
     and help you make smarter decisions for your business.

#### 2025 Seller News recap

*   Reach [repeat buyers](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2025-january/buyer-details)
     with coupons to encourage future purchases.
*   Earn a [commission](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-october/ambassador-program)
     for sharing your listings with your community across socials.
*   Share eBay account tasks with [multiple team members](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-october/optimize-business#multi-user-account-access)
     safely and efficiently.
*   Save time and answer buyer questions faster with our [AI Assistant.](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-august/ai-responses)
    
*   Complete tasks easily with the Overview and Offers to Buyers pages on [Seller Hub.](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-june/optimize-business#offers)
    
*   Streamline your selling preference with our revamped [business policies page](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2025-january/business-policy)
    .

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=b9fa1f74-8875-4979-aacf-e19d6d85bcd0&ctx_pageTitle=Seller+News+December+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# 2024 October Seller Update | Seller Center

Seller Update: October 2024
===========================

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/10/sc_su_overview_hero_1440x992.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

### The busiest selling season of the year is just around the corner, so it’s the perfect time to take advantage of our latest AI-powered tool, new funding program, and policy updates that ensure your business is better protected.

#### Tools you can trust

*   Create studio-quality photos for free with our latest [AI background enhancement tool](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2024-october/tools#ai)
    .
*   Store subscribers, easily monitor the success of your discounts with [redesigned Summary and Discount pages](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2024-october/tools#marketing)
    .
*   Know the market value of your items and price them like a pro with the [Product research tool](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2024-october/tools#research)
    .

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2024-october/tools)

#### Grow your business

*   Get access to the funding you need, whenever you need it, with [Flexible Cash Advance](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2024-october/business#flexible-cash-advance)
    . 
*   Soon, you can take advantage of eBay International Shipping’s [increased item value limit](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2024-october/business#international-shipping)
     on transactions to Canada.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2024-october/business)

#### New updates for enhanced protections

*   Our [Feedback Policy](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2024-october/protections#feedback-policy)
     has been updated to better protect your business and ensure we’re being fair to both our buyers and sellers.
*   Ship with confidence with ShipCover's [expanded USPS insurance coverage](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2024-october/protections#shipcover)
    , now safeguarding items up to $5,000.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2024-october/protections)

Seller Updates at a glance
--------------------------

Know when updates go live. 

[See more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/timeline)

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=8ea0a21b-4167-4244-92ce-3b09901cdaa4&ctx_pageTitle=2024+October+Seller+Update+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# 2025 January Seller Update  | Seller Center

Seller Update: January 2025
===========================

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/01/sc_jan30_lp_1440x992.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

### We’re kicking off the year with updates that’ll help simplify your selling experience and ensure long-term growth for your business.

#### Tools you can trust

*   Enhance the quality of your pre-loved clothing listings with new [item condition options](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2025-january/new-item-conditions)
    .
*   Manage your selling preferences with ease with the redesigned [business policies page](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2025-january/business-policy)
    .

#### Fees and financials

*   We’re adjusting [final value fees](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2025-january/final-value-fee)
     in most categories so we can continue our ongoing efforts to provide tools and services to support your long-term growth.  
    

#### Grow your business

*   Use the new [buyer details feature](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2025-january/buyer-details)
     to identify your returning customers and easily send them coupons to encourage future purchases.  
    

Find all our latest updates in one spot.

[See more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/timeline)

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=fac17117-6ada-4169-92b3-4ad448a4b8ae&ctx_pageTitle=2025+January+Seller+Update++%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)
