# Promotion strategies | Seller Center

Promotion strategies
====================

Be seen and turn browsers into repeat buyers.

On this page

*   [Top 5 promotion strategies](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/promotion-strategies#top-5-promotion-strategies)
    
*   [Incentivize buyers](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/promotion-strategies#incentivize-buyers)
    
*   [Get to know your buyers](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/promotion-strategies#get-to-know-your-buyers)
    
*   [Improve your visibility](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/promotion-strategies#improve-your-visibility)
    
*   [Boost your sales](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/promotion-strategies#boost-your-sales)
    
*   [Track your success](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/promotion-strategies#track-your-success)
    
*   [Keep sold-out listings active](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/promotion-strategies#keep-sold-out-listings-active)
    

Show the world you’re up and running on eBay
--------------------------------------------

Fun, free, illustrated images to celebrate your #sellerlife on social media and video calls.

[Download now](https://ir.ebaystatic.com/pictures/aw/pics/sc/zip/eBay_Showtheworld_Images.zip)

![A graphic of a storefront, with a sign hanging in the window that says "I'm up and running on eBay."](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2021/08/JUNE2020_ebay_sellervirtualbackground_1200x900.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Top 5 promotion strategies
--------------------------

Take your marketing to the next level with these tips:

1.  **Open an eBay Store.** eBay Stores subscribers get a powerful suite of tools to help build, manage, promote, and track their business on eBay. As an eBay Stores subscriber, you’ll be able to showcase your listings in a fully customizable [eBay Store](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/payments-and-fees/subscriptions-and-fees)
     and get special access to advanced design, marketing, and reporting features.
    
2.  **Get more eyes on your listings.** Increase your visibility by [optimizing your listings](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/listing-best-practices)
     for search engines. Use [eBay Advertising](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-advertising)
     to create effective ad placements in prominent locations across eBay.
    
3.  **Use Seller Hub Discounts.** Create customized discounts and coupons to incentivize buyers to spend more in your store. 
    
4.  **Take advantage of Social Media.** Millions of people use social media every day. They share their passions with the world, and they connect with what they love.
    
5.  **Go global.** Reach buyers around the world risk-free. The [Global Shipping Program](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/ebay-labels-services/ebay-international-shipping-services/ebay-global-shipping-program)
     is a great way to expand your market and your sales. Selling across the world is as easy as selling across town.
    

Incentivize buyers
------------------

With Seller Hub Discounts, you can create customized offers to showcase your inventory and incentivize buyers to buy and spend more. It's free to all eBay Stores subscribers and is available for fixed-price listings that offer electronic payment.

[See Seller Hub Discounts](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/sellercenter/growth/seller-hub-discounts)

Provide services your buyers want
---------------------------------

![An open box with packaging materials around it](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/08/box-with-usps-priority-mail-shipping-label-1200x900.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

#### Set a competitive returns policy

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/protections/returns)

![A red mug inside of an open box with styrofoam fillers around it](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/08/red-mug-with-styro-fillers-1200x900.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

#### Offer free, fast shipping

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/shipping-on-ebay)

![eBay search results on mobile device, showing the option to filter by "Guaranteed to arrive in 3 days or less"](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2023/08/search-smartphones-1200x900.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

#### Manage estimated delivery times

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/smart-ship-tips/estimated-delivery-dates)

Get to know your buyers
-----------------------

Hear what these buyers have to say about shopping on eBay.

*   ![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2021/12/janet_1200x1200.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)
    
    As an avid vintage clothing shopper, Janet shares how listings can give her an emotional connection to the items she’s looking for.
    
*   ![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2021/12/Ben_1200x1200.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)
    
    Ben, a seventh-grade science teacher, describes how he makes purchase decisions on supplies for his classroom.
    
*   ![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2021/12/Susan_1200x1200.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)
    
    A lover of fine jewelry, Susan explains why it’s important for sellers to put themselves in their buyers’ shoes.
    
*   ![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2021/12/Tina_1200x1200.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)
    
    Tina describes the importance of communication and transparency in her purchase decisions when she shops for collectibles.
    

Improve your visibility
-----------------------

### Become a Top Rated Seller

Show buyers you’re a pro and they’ll put their trust in you.

Learn how to become a [Top Rated Seller](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/protections/top-rated-program)
 and how it can elevate your sales.

### Promote your listings

[Learn how to promote your listings](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-advertising)
 to help them stand out from the crowd and drive more sales.

### Take advantage of Search Engine Optimization

Including the right words, phrases, and information in your listings can get you seen by a lot more buyers.

Boost your sales
----------------

### Get an eBay Stores subscription (or upgrade yours)

[Discover how an eBay Store](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/selling/set-up-your-store)
 is your all-in-one online-business solution to help you get more out of the eBay marketplace and millions of buyers. Get exclusive marketing and merchandising tools, plus customization features to build a brand that keeps customers coming back.

### Discounts Manager

[Discounts Manager](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/seller-hub-promotions)
 is the quick and easy tool that lets you market your merchandise like a pro! Create customized offers that encourage buyers to shop from you and spend more on each order, like sales events that are seasonal, for specific holidays, for specific categories, or just to clear out inventory. It also lets you create and view scheduled, active, and inactive sales within your Store. You can even schedule sales for a later date, or reschedule them after they end. Best of all: it’s free for Stores subscribers!

### Sell globally

Learn how the [Global Shipping Program](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/ebay-labels-services/ebay-international-shipping-services/ebay-global-shipping-program)
 makes it as easy as selling across town. Tap in to international demand and sell to buyers in countries around the world.

### Send offers to interested buyers

Send offers to buyers of some of your listings with the "Offer to buyers" feature in Seller Hub. By targeting buyers who are interested in your items, you may increase your conversion rate.

### eBay Motors co-funded coupons

Participate in Motors coupons to help drive more visibility and sales to your inventory. Coupons are co-funded by eBay to invest in your business. Benefits can include meaningful sales increase, enhanced visibility, new buyers, improved conversion, competitive advantage, and more.

Email [motorscoupons@ebay.com](mailto:motorscoupons@ebay.com)
 to learn more about what coupons are coming up and how you could participate. For participating sellers, contracts will be available at [sellerportal.ebay.com](http://sellerportal.ebay.com/)
.

Track your success
------------------

### Embrace Seller Hub

[Learn how Seller Hub](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/seller-hub)
 can help you manage your business and help you maintain excellent customer service. At a glance, you can:

*   See your current status and how you’re trending.
*   Get timely alerts when you need to take action.
*   Get recommendations and personalized coaching to help you improve.
*   View "Start" and "End" dates for Good ’Til Cancelled listings.

### Review your eBay sales reports

Your reports contain valuable information for tracking your performance and understanding your business. To see your sales and traffic reports:

*   Visit the Performance tab in Seller Hub or [go to My eBay](https://www.ebay.com/myb/Summary?MyEbay&gbh=1)
     to view your sales reports.
*   Visit the Performance tab in Seller Hub to view your traffic reports.

### Get average selling prices with eBay research tools

Turn knowledge into profit. With eBay research tools, you can:

*   Determine the market value of products you plan to sell.
*   Find best-performing keywords and categories for your listings.
*   Track products to gauge seasonal demand.
*   Monitor your competition.
*   Determine the most effective formats and upgrades to help sell specific products.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-research-tools)

### Find previous selling prices with advanced search

See how your items have performed on eBay prior to your listings.

*   [Use Advanced Search](https://www.ebay.com/sch/ebayadvsearch/)
     to help you get a complete picture of your market before you set pricing.

Keep sold-out listings active
-----------------------------

Apply the out-of-stock option in My eBay, and buyers will only see in-stock listings, helping you avoid having to cancel a transaction. This applies only to Good ’Til Cancelled listings.

[Learn more](https://pages.ebay.com/help/sell/multiple.html#outofstock)

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=572d2032-6f39-8077-d4fc-2edea44690e0&ctx_pageTitle=Promotion+strategies+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

*   [Winter 2024 updates](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/timeline#winter-2024-updates)
    

What’s new for January 2026
---------------------------

*   Eligible fashion businesses can apply for a grant and mentorship through the [Circular Fashion Fund](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2026-january/circular-fashion-fund)
    .
*   Choose a custom [Promoted Stores](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2026-january/promoted-stores)
     landing page and manually select which items appear in your ads.

December 2025 updates
---------------------

*   Add [Your Cost to simplify bookkeeping](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-december/cost-of-goods-sold)
     and help you make smarter decisions for your business.

![A man and woman stand in a room with wooden shelving, looking at a tablet the man is holding. The eBay logo is in the top left of the image.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2026/01/eb-18222484217_seller-news_q4_big3_seller-foundations_seller-news-flagship_dec3_main_ticket_sellercenter_lp_1200x720_final--1-.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

November 2025 updates
---------------------

*   Buyers can now choose shipping directly to the [PSA vault](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-november/psa-vault-direct-shipping)
     for simpler graded trading card sales.

![Two women in an office use a laptop and pack a box with clothing racks behind them. A black eBay logo is in the top left.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/11/eb-18013167474_na_092925_seller-news_q4_big3_seller-foundations_seller-news-flagship_nov5_main_ticket_sellercenter_lp_1200x720_final.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

October 2025 updates
--------------------

*   Use [Team Access](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-october/optimize-business#multi-user-account-access)
     to share eBay account tasks with multiple team members safely and efficiently
*   Managing Fitment data on your parts and accessories listings just got easier with [Fitment Plus Auto](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-october/fitment-plus-auto)
    
*   Join [eBay's Ambassador Program](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-october/ambassador-program)
     to grow your brand and earn a commission for sharing your listings across social channels

![A woman packs a blue sweater into a box while a man holding a clipboard stands next to her.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/11/eb-22561_na_123099_q4_global_seller-foundations_seller-news-flagship_oct1_main_ticket_rw40_sellercenter_lp_1200x720_final.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

September 2025 updates
----------------------

*   Easily adjust prices and create offers on your listing with the [eBay mobile app](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-september/native-recommendations)
    
*   Learn about [intellectual property protections](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-september/vero-updates)
     with our new Seller Center pages and help guides
*   Use eBay shipping labels and get protection from [Item Not Received](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-september/inr-policy-updates)
     claims when the item is later delivered
*   Get [shipping reminders](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-september/optimize-business#shipping-reminders)
     and progress notifications to keep orders on track

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/11/eb-22449_na_080825_q3_big3_seller-foundations_seller-news-flagship_sep10_main_ticket_rw37_sellercenter_lp_1200x720_final.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

August 2025 updates
-------------------

*   Save time and effortlessly communicate with buyers using our new [AI Assistant](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-august/ai-responses)
    
*   We’ve improved how we [assess risk on seller accounts](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-august/seller-protection#risk-policy)
    , so you can sell with fewer disruptions while still keeping buyers protected
*   Get recognized for great customer service with the [new automated feedback feature](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-august/seller-protection#automated-positive-feedback)
      
    

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/09/eb-22291_na_123099_q3_big3_seller-foundations_seller-news-flagship_aug20_main_ticket_rw31_sellercenter_lp_1200x720_final.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

July 2025 updates
-----------------

*   Build buyer trust and get more transparent shipping updates with our [improved tracking process](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-july/tracking-updates)
    
*   Make the most of your ad spend with an improved [monthly budget approach](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-july/optimize-business#budget-pacing)
    
*   Drive buyer satisfaction with three new [pre-loved fashion condition grades](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-july/optimize-business#condition-grading)
    
*   Unlock more sales opportunities by listing [refurbished items](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-july/category-expansion)
     in more available categories than ever before

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/08/sn_july_sellercenter_lp_1200x720.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

June 2025 updates
-----------------

*   Find your most important tasks front and center with our redesigned [Seller Hub Overview](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-june/optimize-business#seller-hub-overview)
    
*   Turn interested customers into buyers faster with our new, centralized [Offers dashboard](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-june/optimize-business#offers)
     on Seller Hub
*   Learn how our updated [return policy for eligible P&A listings](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-june/parts-accessories-return-policy)
     helps you stay competitive in this category  
    
*   Ensure better protection for your high-value shipments with our expanded [ShipCover insurance coverage](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-june/shipcover-insurance)
    

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/06/sn_jun_sellercenter_lp_1200x720_final.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

May 2025 updates
----------------

*   Discover the [Certified Open Box program](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-may/certified-open-box)
    , offering free 1-year warranty for eligible open box items
*   Leverage eBay’s [Generative AI tool](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-may/ai-video)
     to create captivating videos in minutes

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/05/sn_may_lp_1200x720.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

April 2025 updates
------------------

*   We’re expanding our collaboration with [Facebook Marketplace](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-april/facebook-marketplace)
     to increase visibility for more of your listings
*   Learn how to comply with [new import regulations](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/news/2025-april/regulation-mexico)
     that are applicable to all items being shipped to Mexico

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/04/sn_hp_1200x720.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

January 2025 updates
--------------------

*   Enhance the quality of your pre-loved clothing listings with new [item condition options](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2025-january/new-item-conditions)
    
*   Manage your selling preferences with ease with the redesigned [business policies page](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2025-january/business-policy)
    
*   We’re adjusting [final value fees](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2025-january/final-value-fee)
     in most categories so we can continue our ongoing efforts to provide tools and services to support your long-term growth
*   Use the new [buyer details feature](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2025-january/buyer-details)
     to identify your returning customers and easily send them coupons to encourage future purchases

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/03/sc_hp_1200x720--1-.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Winter 2024 updates
-------------------

*   Save time by adding buyers’ frequently asked questions to your listings with the [Q&A feature](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/timeline/qa-feature)
    
*   Dive into the [new and improved Seller Hub](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/timeline/seller-hub-enhancements)
     featuring better performance insights, a simplified selling experience, and a more intuitive way of managing your listings and promotions
*   Reach more buyers easily with the updated [offers to buyers experience](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/timeline/automated-offers)
    
*   Check out updates to payment processing for Best Offers, offers to buyers, and counteroffers made to help reduce [unpaid items on eBay](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/timeline/unpaid-items)
    

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/01/sc_hp_1200x720.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

*   [Restricted items and categories](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/shipping-items/setting-shipping-options/ebay-international-shipping-program?id=5348#section6)
    
*   [Returns and refunds](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/shipping-items/setting-shipping-options/ebay-international-shipping-program?id=5348#section7)
    
*   [Fees and charges](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/shipping-items/setting-shipping-options/ebay-international-shipping-program?id=5348#section8)
    
*   [Opting out of eBay International Shipping](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/shipping-items/setting-shipping-options/ebay-international-shipping-program?id=5348#section9)
    

eBay International Shipping helps you to reach buyers across the globe without the need to manage international delivery, customs, or returns.

eBay International Shipping is currently available for eligible sellers in the US and Canada only. We'll be expanding the program to more sellers soon.

How it works
------------

If you're [eligible](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/shipping-items/setting-shipping-options/ebay-international-shipping-program?id=5348#Eligibility)
, you'll be opted into the program. eBay International Shipping will become your default international shipping option when you don't offer any other international shipping services and we'll automatically add eBay International Shipping to your current listings.

If you have provided self-shipping international options on your current listings and your item is eligible for eBay International Shipping, buyers will be able to choose which service they prefer. If you only want to ship with eBay International Shipping, you may need to manually update your listings to remove the international self-shipping options.

We'll let you know when an item sells to an international buyer and provide you with the domestic shipping hub address. All you need to do is send your sold items to the domestic shipping hub and the international shipping and customs process will be managed for you. For more information on how this program works, see our [Seller Center - opens in new window or tab](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/ebay-international-shipping)
 page.

Benefits of eBay International Shipping
---------------------------------------

As well as making your items available to buyers in almost 200 countries, there are several other benefits to using eBay International Shipping:

*   When you ship internationally using eBay International Shipping, you're responsible for sending the item your buyer purchased safely to the US shipping hub. If a buyer reports that an item was lost or damaged during international shipping or it is damaged at the hub, we'll work with the buyer to resolve the issue. You're protected from:
    *   The obligation to refund the buyer
    *   eBay Money Back Guarantee cases
    *   Payment disputes
    *   Open 'Not as described' returns in your service metrics
    *   Negative or neutral feedback related to item handling during international shipping
*   Save on selling fees for your international transactions, including no international fee
*   All international returns, refunds, and customs clearance will be handled on your behalf
*   If you schedule Time Away, the estimated delivery date will be updated to reflect this
*   You'll be protected against item not received claims and chargebacks once your item is accepted at the domestic hub

Eligibility
-----------

To be eligible for the eBay International Shipping program, you'll need to meet the following requirements:

*   Above Standard or Top Rated [seller performance](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/seller-levels-performance-standards/seller-levels-performance-standards?id=4080#section1)
    
*   Eligible for [seller protections](https://www.ebay.com/help/policies/selling-policies/seller-protections?id=4345#section4)
    
*   Low or Average [Service Metrics](https://www.ebay.com/help/policies/selling-policies/seller-performance-policy/service-metrics-policy?id=4769#section4)
    
*   Compliant with [eBay rules and policies](https://www.ebay.com/help/policies/default/ebay-rules-policies?id=4205)
    

The following requirements apply to items shipped through eBay International Shipping:

*   Items are physically located in the US and listed on eBay.com
*   Items are eligible for export
*   The cost of the order doesn't exceed $2500 USD, including shipping
*   Packages should not exceed:
    *   48 inches in length, 84 inches in length and girth
    *   44 lbs. in billable weight (not actual weight) for all countries except Canada (maximum billable weight for Canada is 66 lbs.)

Transaction limits may apply to some accounts. Read our full list of [seller terms and conditions](https://pages.ebay.com/internationalshippingprogram/seller/terms/)
 to find out more about eBay International Shipping eligibility and program requirements.

Shipping and tracking your items
--------------------------------

When shipping your item to the domestic shipping hub, always add tracking details and include the reference number on the label to ensure it arrives safely. This is done automatically for you if you [create the shipping label on eBay](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/shipping-items/labels-packaging-tips/buying-printing-shipping-labels?id=4157)
. The domestic shipping hubs are in multiple locations so you may see different addresses on your labels.

Once your item is received at the domestic shipping hub, international tracking will be added so that you and your buyer can track the item's progress.

If you'd like to purchase shipping insurance for your item, you'll only need to insure the package for the journey to the domestic hub. If the item is lost during international delivery, we'll refund your buyer and you'll still keep the sale.

### Combined shipping

If a buyer purchases multiple items from you, the order will automatically be combined if it's eligible for combined shipping. There are several reasons why shipping can't be combined when sending items through eBay International Shipping. For example, combined shipping won’t be applied if:

*   The order costs more than $1000 USD
*   The listing is in auction-style format
*   The item is purchased through Best Offer or an offer sent by the seller
*   The items exceed the program’s package limits

If the buyer is paying import fees at checkout for some items and paying import fees on delivery for other items in the same order, the shipping won’t be combined.

**Tip**  
Each eBay International Shipping order should fit in one package which meets the weight and dimensions allowed.

Shipping exclusions
-------------------

You can manage your shipping exclusions through your [Shipping Preferences - opens in new window or tab](https://www.ebay.com/ship/prf)
, Business Policies, or by revising your listings.

You can apply your exclusions to items shipping with eBay International Shipping by updating your settings at any time. Here's how:

1.  Go to [Account Settings - opens in new window or tab](https://accountsettings.ebay.com/uas)
     and select **Shipping Preferences**.
2.  Select **Edit** next to Exclude shipping locations.
3.  Adjust the toggle at the top of the page.
4.  Select **Save**.

If the toggle is 'On', eligible items will ship to your excluded locations through eBay International Shipping.

If you opt out, your current shipping exclusions will stay the same for items shipped with eBay International Shipping, as well as items you ship internationally outside of this program.

Restricted items and categories
-------------------------------

Items included in eBay's [hazardous, restricted or regulated materials policy](https://www.ebay.com/help/policies/prohibited-restricted-items/prohibited-restricted-items?id=4207)
, or that don't follow our [International trading policy](https://www.ebay.com/help/policies/prohibited-restricted-items/international-trading-policy?id=4338)
, can't be shipped using eBay International Shipping.

Items that are shipped to buyers in the UK need to comply with all applicable UK laws and regulations. We have put measures in place to prevent items that may not comply with UK regulations, such as CE Certification and/or Plugs and Sockets Regulations, from being sold to buyers in the UK.

Due to export limitations and restrictions, items listed in the following categories also can't be shipped with eBay International Shipping. This is not an exhaustive list and it may be updated based on transportation regulations and export laws.

*   Any category or items containing Radium or other radioactive materials
*   Dangerous goods requiring hazardous handling labels & documentation
*   Export-controlled items requiring license > Ex. Military vehicle parts
*   Business & Industrial > Heavy equipment & attachments
*   Collectibles > Knives, swords & blades
*   eBay Motors > Airbags, used parts (containing hazardous residue), AC refrigerant, vehicle paint (flammable)
*   Electronics > Standalone lithium batteries (not inside or with a device)
*   Electronics > High-power lithium battery devices (over 100 watt-hour)
*   Electronics > Drones
*   Health & Beauty > Fragrances (flammable perfumes & cologne)
*   Flammable or otherwise hazardous aerosols
*   Jewelry > High value
*   Personal security > Pepper spray, stun guns, handcuffs
*   Sporting goods > Other (CO2 cartridges, firearms, firearm parts, laser scopes)
*   Replica firearms > Prop guns
*   Stamps, coins & paper money

Returns and refunds
-------------------

All eBay International Shipping returns will be processed on your behalf. International legal requirements mean that buyers can return items sent by eBay International Shipping up to 30 days from the date the item is delivered to them, so we automatically apply a 30 day return policy for items shipped with eBay International Shipping.

When a buyer opens a return, we'll refund your buyer and you'll keep the sale. When the return is received at the eBay International Shipping inspection hub, it will be inspected to make sure it's in the same condition. We'll then issue the refund to the buyer's original payment method, usually within 5 to 7 business days of the item being received at the hub. Returned items and items that couldn't be delivered to the buyer may not be returned to you.

If you receive negative or neutral feedback related to item handling during international shipping, we'll remove it.

Fees and charges
----------------

There's no extra charge to ship your items with eBay International Shipping and you won't be charged an international fee. To find out what fees and selling costs may apply to you, see our article on [selling fees](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/fees-credits-invoices/selling-fees?id=4822)
.

The buyer will be charged any US domestic shipping and handling costs that you specified, as well as international shipping, and other fees as determined by eBay. Import fees may be collected from the buyer at checkout or on delivery, either through customs or directly by the carrier. These charges include any customs duties, taxes, brokerage, and other fees.

Opting out of eBay International Shipping
-----------------------------------------

You can opt out of eBay International Shipping at any time by updating your [Shipping Preferences - opens in new window or tab](https://www.ebay.com/ship/prf)
. If you choose to opt-out, you'll be asked to provide a reason why.

To opt out of eBay International Shipping:

1.  Go to My eBay and select **Account**.
2.  Select **Shipping Preferences**.
3.  Select **Opt Out** on the right-hand side of eBay International Shipping.
4.  Select **Done**.

If you change your mind, you can opt back in 24 hours after opting out. To opt in again, go to [Shipping Preferences - opens in new window or tab](https://www.ebay.com/ship/prf)
 and select **Enroll** next to eBay International Shipping.

Top Takeaway

### With eBay International Shipping, when you sell to an international buyer, all you need to do is ship your sold item to the domestic shipping hub, and the rest will be taken care of for you.

# Item specifics requirements | Seller Center

Item specifics requirements
===========================

Download the latest item specifics requirements for your categories.

On this page

*   [Item specifics requirements](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/item-specifics-requirements#item-specifics-requirements)
    
*   [Previously released item specifics requirements](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/item-specifics-requirements#previously-released-item-specifics-requirements)
    

Item specifics requirements
---------------------------

Item specifics play an important role in increasing the visibility of your listings on both eBay and on external search engines. The more data you give us about what you’re selling, the better we can match your item to what a buyer is looking for, either through query search, left-hand navigation filters, or category merchandising pages.

New item specifics in the below categories will be required on **May 16, 2023** for all new and revised listings.

*   Home & Garden (Yard, Garden & Outdoor Living, Household Supplies & Cleaning, Home Improvement): [Download details](https://ebayinc-my.sharepoint.com/:x:/g/personal/ceyoung_ebay_com/EaJG-45XWZNJs9iV0vpE-VYBNbNuR396HYq8fJ-Vkn_7Kw?e=wId8YV)
    
*   Sporting Goods (Camping & Hiking): [Download details](https://ebayinc-my.sharepoint.com/:x:/g/personal/ceyoung_ebay_com/EbNylfta6axNmgXUYurnUKgBTWuFJEL6FR1ECsEbs3BCZg?e=5yCoEK)
    
*   Pet Supplies (Fish & Aquariums): [Download details](https://ebayinc-my.sharepoint.com/:x:/g/personal/ceyoung_ebay_com/EacrmyVcYGpFrNDiwgpWJJUBDkTTaHg7z2U99pjMy1R0Ig?e=hNuaUD)
    
*   Business & Industrial (Cleaning & Janitorial Supplies): [Download details](https://ebayinc-my.sharepoint.com/:x:/g/personal/ceyoung_ebay_com/EYviE_SKLYBOtMZ33W5K8WMBwkCy5-GqM7PPMq_bV8RBtw?e=0Ci0n6)
    

You can add these item specifics to your listings now, and we encourage you to update your listings as soon as possible.

# Buyer details feature | Seller Center

Learn more about your buyers
============================

Easily identify and engage with repeat customers using our new buyer details feature.

What you need to know
---------------------

Ever wondered who your most loyal customers are? With our new **buyer details** feature, seeing this information is easier than ever. With a single click, you can view existing buyer details already available to you through their previous purchases, like their location, purchase history, and total amount spent on past orders—all in one place. You can also quickly access tools to engage with your buyers, helping you create a personalized and positive buying experience that encourages repeat purchases.

Benefits of buyer details
-------------------------

### **Get to know your buyers**

Quickly gain insights into your buyers by viewing their profile picture, username, and location—all conveniently located in one spot. 

### **Identify returning buyers** 

Easily recognize your most loyal customers with visible **Follower** and **Repeat buyer** tags. You’ll also get a better understanding of your buyer’s purchasing history by viewing all the orders they’ve placed with you over the past two years. 

### **Enhance your customer service**

Seamlessly access the messaging experience from the buyer details interface to respond to your buyer’s questions, and leave feedback to ensure a positive shopping experience. You can also reward loyal customers by sending them exclusive coupons or personalized thank-you notes.

How it works
------------

Simply click on a buyer’s name from the Orders tab in Seller Hub to view their details. Their information will show up in a pop-up box, similar to the one you see here. You can also click on ‘All orders’ to view a detailed list of orders they’ve placed with you.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/01/buyer_modal_sc_1200x720.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

# Seller Hub enhancements | Seller Center

Enhance your selling experience with improved tools and insights
================================================================

Discover the new and improved Seller Hub, designed to empower you to make data-driven decisions that can help grow your business.

On this page

*   [What you need to know](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/timeline/seller-hub-enhancements#what-you-need-to-know)
    
*   [Gain deeper insights into your business performance](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/timeline/seller-hub-enhancements#gain-deeper-insights-into-your-business-performance-)
    
*   [A simpler and more intuitive Active Listings page](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/timeline/seller-hub-enhancements#a-simpler-and-more-intuitive-active-listings-page)
    
*   [Next steps](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/timeline/seller-hub-enhancements#next-steps)
    
*   [FAQs](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/timeline/seller-hub-enhancements#f-a-qs)
    

What you need to know
---------------------

We're excited to unveil a series of new enhancements we’ve made to Seller Hub – all based on your feedback. These updates are designed to simplify your selling experience, provide a more intuitive way of managing your listings and discounts, and help you grow your business. The upgrades include changes to performance insights, a streamlined interface with consolidated search and filters, and a modernized Marketing tab.

Gain deeper insights into your business performance
---------------------------------------------------

With an improved Traffic Performance page under the Performance tab, you’ll experience a user-friendly design and a better view of how your business is doing. These changes make it easier for you to digest data, understand your business performance, and access more actionable information to optimize your strategies for business growth. 

Some of these updates include:

*   **Improved visualization** to make it easier for you to review and navigate the page
*   **New detailed performance metrics** such as Promoted Offsite impressions data, so you can understand your sales and make data-driven decisions 
*   **Personalized growth opportunities** which will guide you through the actions you can take to grow your business
*   **The launch of performance insights on mobile** so you can check your your listing views, click-through rate, traffic sources, and more on the go

Use these upgrades to gain a deeper understanding of what you can do to improve and expand your business sales in the new year.

[Explore now](https://www.ebay.com/sh/performance/traffic)

A simpler and more intuitive Active Listings page
-------------------------------------------------

We’ve revamped the Active Listings page in Seller Hub with an improved interface to make it easier to navigate. You can now find and edit your listings faster, see all your promo tools in one place, and more.

### **A streamlined interface to save you time** 

The new interface is more user-friendly and intuitive, so you can get to where you need to go faster, and spend more time focusing on growing your business. Plus, with simplified search and filter options, managing and editing your listings is now easier than ever. 

### **See all promo tools in one place** 

We’ve unified all promo tools on your Active Listings page. This will help you make better use of the tools, and manage and offer deals and discounts more efficiently, ultimately benefiting buyers with more attractive purchasing options.

Next steps
----------

We hope you love the new experience. Head over to [Seller Hub](https://www.ebay.com/sh/ovw)
 to check out what’s new, and use the data to start preparing for success in 2025.

FAQs
----

### What are the key improvements to the new Seller Hub?

The new Seller Hub has enhanced performance insights, a streamlined interface with consolidated search and filter functionalities, and a modernized Seller Marketing Engine Workflow. These are designed to improve your selling efficiency and help you manage your discounts.

### How can the new performance insights help me grow my business?

The new performance insights provide detailed data and actionable recommendations based on your sales metrics, which can help you identify growth opportunities and optimize your sales strategies effectively.

### What has changed in the search and filter functionalities?

We’ve consolidated the search and filter options to create a more intuitive and less cluttered interface, making it easier for you to manage and update your active listings efficiently.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=80a883fa-a5bc-43f0-b854-c3ed65e6c3a4&ctx_pageTitle=Seller+Hub+enhancements+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Item Q&A | Seller Center

New: Easily add Q&As to your listings
=====================================

Save time and stay one step ahead of your buyers’ frequently asked questions by adding them as Q&As to your active listings.

On this page

*   [What you need to know](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/timeline/qa-feature#what-you-need-to-know)
    
*   [Easily add and manage Q&As](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/timeline/qa-feature#easily-add-and-manage-q-as)
    

What you need to know
---------------------

Communicating with your buyers is a great way to build trust, but managing a high volume of questions about your items can be overwhelming. To make things easy for you and your buyers, we’ll be introducing a new Q&A feature later this year on the eBay app.

The feature will allow you to add frequently asked questions and answers directly to your listings, and provide any additional information about your items up front. In addition to saving time and increasing your chances of making a sale, you’ll also improve your buyers’ shopping experience by helping them make an informed purchase.

Easily add and manage Q&As
--------------------------

Add Q&As to an existing listing by heading to its **View Item page** and clicking **Add Q&A**. To manage Q&As for all listings, just log in to your **Account settings** through the web or desktop and select **Manage communications with buyers.**  

You can also add Q&As directly from a conversation you’re having with a buyer within the messaging experience on the eBay app. Just access the menu in the top right corner of the chat and select **Add to Q&A**. Their question and your response will then be added as a Q&A to your listing and will be visible to all your future buyers. 

You can add up to 25 Q&As to a listing and choose whether to apply them to a specific listing or to all of them, and only you can manage your Q&As.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=685f6010-a8c5-465c-b963-971c036525cd&ctx_pageTitle=Item+Q%26A+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Ambassador Program Page | Seller Center

A new way to earn commission—introducing the eBay Ambassador Program
====================================================================

Grow your brand by sharing the listings you love. 

What you need to know
---------------------

Introducing the eBay Ambassador Program—an easy new way to earn commissions while building your brand. 

Share your favourite eBay listings through affiliate links on social media or other platforms, and get rewarded when your community shops.

Why join?
---------

**Earn more, your way:**

*   Get rewarded every time someone makes a purchase through your eBay links to conveniently boost your income. 

**Reach new audiences:**

*   Showcase your unique style, share your favourite finds, and grow your brand—wherever your community is. 

**Designed for you:**

*   Curate, customize, and track what matters most to you with improved item discovery using features like Storefront Collections and Watchlist integration.

How to join
-----------

Registering is quick and simple:

1.  **Sign up:** visit the eBay Ambassador Program site, and sign up using your eBay account.
2.  **Set up:** create your personalised Storefront, build custom Collections, and connect your Watchlist to spotlight trending or favourite items.
3.  **Start sharing:** use the built-in tools to generate affiliate links, and share directly to your social channels.
4.  **Stay connected:** keep engaging with your community, and look out for updates to maximize those commissions.

Get paid to share what you love.

[Join the program](https://ambassador.ebay.com/)

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=ac333472-a027-09e8-1753-f3bb55fd3f3b&ctx_pageTitle=Ambassador+Program+Page+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# SIO enhancements/automated offers | Seller Center

Reach more buyers easily with updated offers
============================================

Now, there are more ways to send offers automatically and reach interested buyers faster.

On this page

*   [What you need to know](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/timeline/automated-offers#what-you-need-to-know)
    
*   [More ways to save time and reach buyers with automated offers](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/timeline/automated-offers#more-ways-to-save-time-and-reach-buyers-with-automated-offers)
    
*   [Get your offers in front of even more buyers](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/timeline/automated-offers#get-your-offers-in-front-of-even-more-buyers)
    
*   [Next steps](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/timeline/automated-offers#next-steps)
    
*   [FAQs](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/timeline/automated-offers#f-a-qs)
    

What you need to know
---------------------

Sending offers to buyers is one of the most effective ways to help drive sales. Now, we're making it faster and easier than ever for you to connect with more buyers, with more ways to automate offers and expand buyer targeting.

More ways to save time and reach buyers with automated offers
-------------------------------------------------------------

Earlier this year, [we introduced](https://community.ebay.com/t5/Announcements/Save-time-by-automating-your-offers-to-buyers/ba-p/34329455)
 a feature that lets eBay Store subscribers fully automate offers across their inventory. Available through the Seller Hub Marketing Tab, this feature allows Store subscribers to choose which listings to send offers on based on criteria such as category or price range.

All sellers–even those who don’t have a Store subscription—can also set up automated offers right from the Active Listings page, by manually selecting which listings to include. Now, we’re expanding this functionality to allow you to include any listing, regardless of buyer interest, in your offers. Previously, you could only set up these automatic offers on listings that already had interested buyers. 

Just select the listings you want to include, define your offer terms, and we’ll automatically send offers to any existing or new interested buyers for those listings. 

This gives you the flexibility to choose exactly which listings you’re sending automatic offers for, and saves you time by allowing you to fully automate offers whether or not there are currently interested buyers.

Get your offers in front of even more buyers
--------------------------------------------

Your offers can now connect with more potential buyers who are seriously eyeing your listings. We’re expanding the criteria to determine which buyers are eligible for offers, to include more indicators of potential buyer interest at multiple stages along their shopping journey. 

This means your offers can reach more interested buyers quicker, increasing the chances they'll see and respond to your offers early.

Next steps
----------

Head over to your [Active Listings page](https://www.ebay.com/sh/lst/active)
 to set up automatic offers across your inventory, regardless of whether or not your listings currently have interested buyers.

If you’re an eBay Store subscriber, you can also go to your Seller Hub Marketing tab to set up fully automated offers based on criteria such as category or price. eBay Store subscribers also have access to detailed analytics in the Seller Hub Marketing tab so you can track the performance of your automated offers and adjust your strategy.

Keep an eye out for more enhancements to offers to buyers as we continue to work to save you time and expand your reach.

FAQs
----

### How do I set up automated offers from the Active Listings page?

From your Active Listings page, select all listings you want to send an offer on. Then choose “Send offers” under the “Actions” button. From there, you can set your offer terms, and choose to “Send automated offers.” Once you select “Send,” your offer will immediately go to any currently interested buyers, and will be automatically sent to any new interested buyers.

### What is the difference between automated offers in the Seller Hub Marketing tab and on the Active Listings page?

Automated offers in the Seller Hub Marketing tab are only available to eBay Store subscribers. Here, you can choose criteria such as category or price range to determine which listings you’ll automatically send offers for. Plus, any listing you create later will be included in your offers if they match the criteria.  

The Active Listings page is available to all sellers. From this page, you can manually select each listing you want to send offers for, and choose to send offers automatically to any new interested buyers on those listings.

### Where can I access analytics for my offers to buyers?

eBay Store subscribers have access to analytics through the Seller Hub Marketing tab. Select “Buyer groups” from the left hand menu and look for the “Offer analytics” option to see a breakdown of your offers’ performance.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=48a549cd-039c-4040-b838-3c9007589e1e&ctx_pageTitle=SIO+enhancements%2Fautomated+offers+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

---

# INR Policy Updates | Seller Center

New seller protections for shipped items
========================================

You have support with eBay Labels when a buyer claims an item never arrived.

We’re always looking for ways to enhance our support and protection for you and improve your selling experiences. As announced recently at eBay Open, we’ve created a new policy to protect sellers like you during shipping delays that are out of your control.

When you use eBay Labels, we will protect your standards and reimburse you if the item gets delivered after your buyer has received a refund.

What is an Item Not Received claim?
-----------------------------------

If a shipment is delayed, buyers can submit a claim if they don’t receive their item on time. If this claim is approved, buyers will receive a refund, even if you shipped on time. This can impact your seller metrics.

Our new policy
--------------

Previously, if we approved a buyer’s INR claim, you would have to refund the money and would be out of a product. Now, if you use eBay labels and ship your items on time, we’ll reimburse you once we detect delivery.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=a42434c2-6c66-d9d1-0282-3d61240dbe35&ctx_pageTitle=INR+Policy+Updates+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

---

# Fitment Plus Auto | Seller Center

Easy listing for auto parts and accessories
===========================================

Get fitment data for your listings automatically with Fitment Plus Auto.

Managing and adding fitment data to your Parts & Accessories (P&A) listings is now easier than ever. Starting Oct 20, if you’re a seller under one of the [fitment-enabled categories](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/parts-sales-hub#downloads)
, you’ve been automatically enrolled in Fitment Plus Auto (FPA). 

  

This new feature automatically updates your P&A listings with the latest fitment data. This lets buyers find the right parts for their vehicle, helping you boost your sales and maintain your listings more efficiently.

How it works
------------

FPA aims to ensure that all parts and accessories listings have high-quality fitment data.

*   Your listings in the covered categories will be regularly updated using an eBay-maintained database.
*   If your listings don’t have fitment data, we’ll automatically add the relevant information to them.
*   If your listings already include fitment data, missing or updated information may be added to improve accuracy.

How does FPA benefit my business?
---------------------------------

*   **Build trust**: Add an extra layer of trust and protection for buyers by qualifying your products for eBay Guaranteed Fit, which can help reduce returns. 
*   **Improve efficiency**: Save time and effort researching your fitment. As long as your listings have the brand and part number, Fitment Plus can match the right vehicles automatically.
*   **Increase exposure**: Enhance your listings so they appear in more searches and help boost your sales.

Manage your FPA settings
------------------------

If you sell parts and accessories, you’re automatically included in FPA. You don’t need to take any action to benefit from enhanced listings.  

  

Go to your [Motors Selling Preferences](https://signin.ebay.com/ws/eBayISAPI.dll?SignIn&ru=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.ebay.com%2Fmsp%2Fselling-pref&sgfl=sm&smuid=15e48f65-8a5c-11f0-9295-998bc4dfc68b)
 to opt out anytime, change your FPA settings, or find out more about the feature.

  
Opting out will remove any data added through FPA, but you can opt back in later to make your listings eligible again. If you prefer to manually update your listings based on FPA data, we offer another [toolkit](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/ebay-fitment-plus)
.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=181b02de-73bb-4e11-a249-a285350244aa&ctx_pageTitle=Fitment+Plus+Auto+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Unpaid items  | Seller Center

Reducing unpaid items on eBay
=============================

Our latest updates to Best Offers, offers to buyers, and counteroffers will help reduce the number of items that go unpaid.

On this page

*   [What you need to know](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/timeline/unpaid-items#what-you-need-to-know)
    
*   [Improving the Best Offer process when failed payments occur](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/timeline/unpaid-items#improving-the-best-offer-process-when-failed-payments-occur)
    
*   [Payment method now required when buyers accept offers](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/timeline/unpaid-items#payment-method-now-required-when-buyers-accept-offers)
    
*   [Next steps](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/timeline/unpaid-items#next-steps)
    

What you need to know
---------------------

One of the biggest frustrations that sellers have told us about is around unpaid items. With this in mind, we’re constantly refining and improving the experience so you can get paid on time. Learn about the latest refinements we’re making to help reduce unpaid items, from improvements to Best Offer scenarios where payments fail to the counteroffer process.

Improving the Best Offer process when failed payments occur
-----------------------------------------------------------

In most Best Offer scenarios, buyers are required to have a payment method on file before submitting their offer, so it can be charged if the seller accepts the offer. On rare occasions, the payment method may fail, leaving the item unpaid. To address this issue, we’ve made the following changes:

*   If the payment method is declined, buyers will receive a notice prompting them to return to eBay to complete the payment
*   The item will remain available for purchase until the payment is successfully complete and you’ll be able to accept other offers

Payment method now required when buyers accept offers
-----------------------------------------------------

An unpaid item scenario may also occur after a buyer accepts a seller’s offer or counteroffer. We’ve changed the process so that:

*   The buyer will only be able to accept the offer and secure their item once they’ve completed the payment

*   The item will remain available in the seller’s inventory for other potential buyers until it’s paid for

  

Next steps
----------

Stay tuned for more updates as we continue to reduce unpaid items across more categories on our platform, including auctions.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=ce36dc7d-9866-4567-bec9-1a69694730b2&ctx_pageTitle=Unpaid+items++%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

---

# VAT Mexico | Seller Center

Streamlining shipping to Mexico
===============================

New import regulations should help improve the delivery experience for buyers and sellers.

What you need to know
---------------------

With the aim of improving customs clearance and ensuring smoother, more reliable transactions, the Mexican government has recently introduced changes to Mexico’s import regulations.

Since January 1 2025, all eBay sellers shipping to Mexico are required to provide detailed customer information to their shipping carrier. This information will improve shipment tracking, minimize the risk of fraudulent transactions, and help you maintain and potentially expand your presence in Mexico without experiencing delivery disruptions.

Required customer information
-----------------------------

If you're selling to Mexico, make sure to provide your carrier with these buyer (recipient) details when shipping your items:

*   **Recipient’s full name**

*   **Recipient’s email address**

*   **Recipient’s phone number**

*   **Detailed item descriptions** (vague descriptions won’t be accepted)

*   **Recipient’s Mexican Tax ID (RFC)**, or, if unavailable, the **National ID (CURP)**

**Please note:** it’s now mandatory for buyers in Mexico to input either their **Mexican Tax ID (RFC)** or **National ID (CURP)** on the checkout page for items to be shipped to Mexico.

Next steps
----------

To ensure the smooth delivery of your shipments to Mexico, please provide your carrier with the required information listed above. Once your shipment arrives in Mexico, you may need to take additional steps, such as contacting the carrier for clearance. By staying proactive, you can help ensure a seamless shipping experience for both you and your Mexican customers.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=1e70bdc9-a091-6d5e-1fb1-c20196b70195&ctx_pageTitle=VAT+Mexico+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

---

# Gen AI Video | Seller Center

Introducing eBay’s innovative AI video tool
===========================================

Create engaging video content to attract potential buyers and help boost your listing’s visibility with our new AI-powered tool.

Elevate engagement with video content
-------------------------------------

Not a video expert? You can still create dynamic video content to boost your engagement and listing visibility. Starting this April, transform your listing photos into professional-quality videos in minutes using eBay.ai. Simply upload your photos, and with the click of a button, our new tool will create professional-quality content to help you showcase your listings on social media. After you view your video, upload it to TikTok or YouTube directly from your eBay account. It’s that simple.

Benefits for your business
--------------------------

### This exciting Generative-AI Video Tool unlocks capabilities sellers like you have never had access to before.

1

**Create videos effortlessly**

Generate and upload content easily and quickly. 

2

**Increase your visibility** 

Get more eyes on your listings beyond eBay by expanding your reach to YouTube and TikTok.

3

**Save time with AI innovations**

It only takes up to 3 minutes to generate your video. 

4

**Expand your reach on social media**

Regularly share content to strengthen your brand’s online presence.

Next steps
----------

This tool is already available to you in your Seller Hub. Once you get started, consider sharing your listings on social platforms to expand your reach, build brand recognition, and establish yourself as a trustworthy seller.

FAQs
----

### What is eBay’s Generative AI Video Tool?

It’s an intuitive tool that allows sellers to transform their product listing images into professional-quality videos effortlessly. These videos can be customized and shared directly on popular social platforms like TikTok and YouTube.

### Why should I use videos for my eBay listings?

Video content can help you capture buyer attention, increase engagement, and drive higher conversion rates, making it easier to sell your products faster and more effectively.

### How does the tool work?

The tool uses the power of generative AI to create videos from your existing listing images. Simply upload your images, customize your caption, choose your hashtags, and share the video directly on social media or add it to your listing.

### Which social media platforms can I share my videos on?

You can seamlessly share your videos to TikTok or YouTube directly from Seller Hub, helping you reach new audiences and expand your customer base. We plan to expand this feature to Facebook and Instagram later this year. 

### How do I access the Generative AI Video Tool?

The tool is available when creating a social post directly from **Seller Hub**. 

*   Under **Marketing**, select **Social**
*   Select **Create Post**
*   When prompted to select your media choice, select **Video Post**
*   Select your preferred social platform
*   Under **Video type**, select **Create a video with photos**
*   Choose a video template for your Generative AI video
*   Select your images
*   Select **Generate video**

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=f1c73be1-54c9-4131-b95a-1a3d92bef282&ctx_pageTitle=Gen+AI+Video+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Seller protections | Seller Center

New updates for enhanced protections
====================================

On this page

*   [Overview](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2024-october/protections#overview)
    
*   [Updates to our Feedback Policy](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2024-october/protections#updates-to-our-feedback-policy)
    
*   [Insure items up to $5,000 with ShipCover](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2024-october/protections#insure-items-up-to-5-000-with-ship-cover)
    

Overview
--------

*   With the latest policy updates, we’ll now remove negative or neutral feedback in more situations.
*   Get peace of mind on even more expensive items with ShipCover's expanded USPS insurance coverage.

  

Updates to our Feedback Policy
==============================

### **What you need to know**

We recently [shared](https://community.ebay.com/t5/Announcements/Seller-Check-in-Feedback-Update/ba-p/34523278)
 that we’ve been working to update our Feedback Policy to extend to more situations where removing feedback is warranted. We’re happy to let you know that we’ve revised our policy, and we’ll now remove feedback that sellers may receive in situations that don’t follow these updated policy guidelines. For better clarity, we’ve also updated our Feedback Policy page to clearly list these instances.

###   

### **What’s changing** 

We’ll now remove negative or neutral feedback in the following cases:

*   When a buyer asks to cancel an order after placing it and the seller denies their request. Per eBay policy, sellers have the discretion to accept or deny a cancellation request. 

**_For example:_** _A buyer purchases a set of golf balls but then requests to cancel their order because they found a cheaper set elsewhere. The seller declines the request and the buyer responds by posting negative feedback. Since the seller is not obliged to accept cancellation requests, the feedback is removable._ 

*   When a buyer changes their mind about their purchase and references being charged for the cost of an eBay return label.

**_For example:_** _A buyer purchases a bracelet and after receiving it, they decide it doesn't suit their style and want to return the bracelet. When they realize there will be a charge for the eBay return label, they leave negative feedback about it. Since there were no other issues with the transaction and the buyer's comment is only about having to pay for an eBay return shipping label, the feedback is removable._

To learn more about what’s changing along with a clear list of scenarios where we’ll remove feedback, check out our new [Feedback Policy page](https://www.ebay.com/help/policies/feedback-policies/feedback-policies?id=4208)
. To submit a request to have feedback removed based on these guidelines, head to the [Seller Help](https://www.ebay.com/sellerhelp)
 page.

Insure items up to $5,000 with ShipCover
========================================

### What you need to know

ShipCover is a cost-effective shipping insurance option that’s fully integrated with eBay Labels. It offers you substantial savings and ensures that your USPS shipments, whether domestic or international, are protected during transit. Now, protection options for your high-value items have increased from $1,000 to $5,000.

###   

### More about ShipCover Insurance

Exclusively designed for eBay users, ShipCover. caters to both domestic and international USPS shipments, offering robust protection for items valued up to $5,000, subject to specific exclusions.

The ShipCover claim process is user-friendly and efficient, minimizing disruptions to your business activities. The service prioritizes quick and smooth claim resolutions, so you can dedicate more time to growing your business and not have to worry about your shipments staying safe.

If you’d like to learn more about ShipCover insurance, please visit our FAQs page.

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/faqs#ship-cover-insurance-and-claims)

FAQs
----

### How much does it cost to use ShipCover insurance?

ShipCover insurance starts at $1.70 per $100 of coverage for domestic shipping, and $2.83 per $100 of coverage for international shipping. You can buy up to $5,000 in coverage. [Learn more about cost](https://pages.ebay.com/insurance/shipping/coverage.html)
 in our terms of service.

### How do I opt in to ShipCover insurance?

Go to [**Orders**](https://my.ebay.com/ws/eBayISAPI.dll?MyEbayBeta&CurrentPage=MyeBayNextSold)
 in My eBay or your [**Orders awaiting shipment**](https://www.ebay.com/sh/ord/?filter=status:AWAITING_SHIPMENT)
 in Seller Hub.

1.  Choose the item you'd like to ship and select **Print shipping label**.
2.  In the **Additional options** section, select **Additional liability coverage**.
3.  Select **ShipCover Insurance** and, if it isn't prefilled, enter the amount of coverage you need, then select **Add**. The shipping cost section of the page shows the insurance cost.
4.  Read the terms of coverage, and check the box to agree.
5.  Select **Purchase shipping label**.

You'll receive an email confirming that your shipment is insured, along with your insurance policy number.

### Can I purchase ShipCover insurance for any carrier?

Currently, ShipCover is only available for eBay shipments when you use USPS.

### If an item is lost or damaged, how do I file a claim?

1.  In **Seller Hub**, click on [Shipping Labels](https://www.ebay.com/lbr/labels-history/seller-hub)
     under the **Orders** tab, and in **My eBay**, click on [Shipping Labels](https://www.ebay.com/lbr/labels-history/my-ebay)
     in the **Sell** section under the **Activity** tab.
2.  Find the shipping label for the item and select “Create Claim” under **More Actions**.
3.  Fill out the claim form.

### Is it hard to verify a claim with my buyer?

No. After you file a claim, we’ll need to verify whether the item was damaged in transit or never received. Your buyer can verify your claim by either opening a case in the **eBay Resolution Center** or with PayPal Buyer Protection. If your buyer has not opened a case, ShipCover sends an email to the buyer with details on how to complete the verification process.

### Are any items excluded from ShipCover?

ShipCover covers more items than most carriers; however, there are some exceptions. [See a list of excluded items](http://pages.ebay.com/insurance/shipping/coverage.html)
 and the ShipCover terms of coverage.

### Are there countries where ShipCover will not insure shipments?

The following countries are excluded from ShipCover insurance: Belarus, Cote D'Ivoire (Ivory Coast), Cuba, Iran, North Korea, Myanmar, Russian Federation, Sudan, Syrian Arab Republic and Zimbabwe. This list is subject to change.

# Business policy page redesign | Seller Center

Easily manage multiple listings with business policies
======================================================

Every function is at your fingertips on the new business policy page.

What you need to know
---------------------

Using business policies can save you valuable time when you’re creating listings. Rather than adding your payment, returns, and shipping information item by item, you can apply your chosen settings across entire groups of listings by creating policies. This is particularly useful for sellers who manage a large number of listings and want to make comprehensive adjustments from a central space.

Now, with a streamlined layout and improved functionality, it’s easier than ever to manage your listings from the new business policy page. Delivery has also been simplified, and you’ll be able to choose your shipping method from pre-populated lists, including the carrier’s logo, so it’s intuitive and quick to set up your policies and get back to selling.

Business policies are free to use, you just need to opt in. You can find them on the left hand navigation of Seller Hub, or by clicking the link below.

[Explore business policies](https://www.ebay.com/bp/manage)

Next steps
----------

If you’re already opted into business policies, head over to our new page and see what’s changed. If you’d like to read more about them, take a look at our [Help page](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/business-policies/business-policies?id=4212)
.

# Grow your business | Seller Center

Grow your business
==================

On this page

*   [Overview](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2024-october/business#overview)
    
*   [Introducing Flexible Cash Advance](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2024-october/business#introducing-flexible-cash-advance)
    
*   [Boost your sales in Canada with eBay International Shipping](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2024-october/business#boost-your-sales-in-canada-with-e-bay-international-shipping)
    

Overview
--------

*   Get fast access to on-demand funding and only pay for what you use.
*   More of your listings will soon be available to buyers in Canada with eBay International Shipping’s increased item value limit.

  

Introducing Flexible Cash Advance
=================================

### What is Flexible Cash Advance?

**eBay Seller Capital** recently launched **Flexible Cash Advance**, a new financing option designed to help you easily get the funds you need for your business. Once approved, you’ll gain access to your financing portal that can potentially hold $5,000 to $2 million in available capital. You can take out multiple advances up to the maximum available capital as often as you need, without new applications or approvals for each advance.

This isn’t a loan and there is no interest. You’ll be charged a fixed fee every time you take out an advance from your available capital. Also, unlike a term loan that has fixed monthly payments, Flexible Cash Advance is paid on a pre-agreed percentage of your gross sales on eBay.

As you sell, you’ll be able to access more funds up to your approved limit. This makes it easier to buy inventory, manage cash flow, and invest in advertising to grow your business.

###   

### Benefits

*   Easily access the funds you need with a click—available whenever you want
*   No need to re-apply every time you need more funding
*   Only pay for what you use
*   No interest, no impact on credit score, no stress

###   

### How to apply

Some sellers might receive a pre-approved offer in advance; if you don’t receive one, you can always [apply with our financing partner](https://pages.ebay.com/flexiblecashadvance/)
. After filling out the application, you could be approved within 24 hours and given access to your financing portal, where you’ll see your available capital. From there, you'll be able to access funds as needed, and you’ll only pay fees on the amount you use. Any unused funds can be accessed via your financing portal for future use. Any unused funds will remain in your financing portal at no extra cost for future use.  

FAQs
----

### Is eBay the provider of Flexible Cash Advance?

No, this financial product is offered by Liberis, an eBay Seller Capital partner.

### How is Flexible Cash Advance different from a Business Cash Advance?

**Business Cash Advance** is an advance on your sales which gives you access to a lump sum of capital upfront once approved. This is not a loan—the cost comes in the form of a fixed fee, not interest. Also, unlike a term loan that has fixed monthly payments, Business Cash Advance is paid on a pre-agreed percentage of your gross sales. You only pay for the advance when you sell and if you need more funds in the future, you’ll have to apply for a renewal.

**Flexible Cash Advance** provides you with ongoing access to a pre-approved amount of available capital that you can access whenever you need through your financing portal. You can take out multiple advances up to the maximum available capital without new applications or approvals for each advance. This is not a loan—the cost comes in the form of a fixed fee, not interest. Also, like a Business Cash Advance, Flexible Cash Advance is paid on a pre-agreed percentage of your gross sales. You only pay for the advance when you sell.

### What is Liberis?

In general, you’re eligible for an Flexible Cash Advance if you have:

*   Been actively trading for at least 12 months, with an average transaction amount of at least $500 per month during that time
*   Processed an average of 8 sales transactions or more over the past 12 months, and made at least 1 transaction in the last 3 months
*   Completed at least one sales transaction in the last 3 months and have not been declined from any Liberis product during that time

Flexible Cash Advance may not be available for reasons other than the above. In which case, please contact our financial partner, Liberis, directly at [info-us@liberis.com](mailto:info-us@liberis.com)
 or (470) 582-1130.

### What are the fees?

Flexible Cash Advance is designed to be fair and simple. Signing up and gaining access to your financing portal is free, and there’s no commitment to use funding from it. 

You’ll only pay a fee when you take funds from your financing portal. The fee is a set price and you do not accrue any interest. You only pay for what you use.

### How are my payments calculated?

Flexible Cash Advance is powered by 20% of your daily eBay gross sales. This means you only pay when your customers pay, and not if you don’t make any sales.

### Will this impact my credit score?

No. As part of its assessment of your application for funding, Liberis carries out a soft credit pull which will not impact your consumer credit score.

### When will I receive my financing?

Liberis may provide decisions in under 24 hours. Depending on your bank, your deposit could be available as soon as the next business day after financing approval.

Boost your sales in Canada with eBay International Shipping
===========================================================

### **What you need to know** 

If you sell items in Canada through the eBay International Shipping program, we’ve got great news. The item value limit (excluding taxes, duties, and shipping fees) on transactions to Canada will soon **increase from $2,500 to $11,400**. This is applicable to orders shipped individually or through combined shipping, so more of your eligible listings will soon be available to buyers in Canada.

###   

### **How it works**

The increased item value limit will automatically apply to your eligible listings, and there’s no action you need to take. When you make a sale, just ship your item to our shipping hub here in the US, and we’ll handle the rest.

To learn more about the program, its benefits, and how enrollment and eligibility work, visit our [eBay International Shipping page](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/ebay-international-shipping)
.
