# Category Expansion | Seller Center

‘Seller Refurbished’ condition to be discontinued in selected categories
========================================================================

Update your listings to the 'used' item condition or apply to join the eBay Refurbished Program to continue listing as refurbished.

What you need to know
---------------------

To improve buyer trust and clarity, we're expanding the eBay Refurbished program and phasing out the ‘Seller Refurbished’ item condition in selected categories.

Effective August 5, listings using ‘Seller Refurbished’ in selected categories will no longer be supported. See the [**full list of affected categories**](https://ir.ebaystatic.com/cr/v/c01/Seller_Center_Page_Updates_US.xlsx)
.

If you use a third-party tool to manage your listings on eBay, we recommend working with your Service Providers to update your existing listings, or create new ones before the date above.

What you need to do
-------------------

#### **Seller Refurbished**

To keep your listings active, please change any ‘Seller Refurbished’ items in the [**affected categories**](https://ir.ebaystatic.com/cr/v/c01/Seller_Center_Page_Updates_US.xlsx)
 to the ‘Used’ condition by **August 5**.

After **August 5**, any remaining listings with the ‘Seller Refurbished’ item condition will automatically be updated to ‘Used’ and any listings with errors will be ended.

If you use a third-party tool to manage your listings on eBay, we recommend working with your Service Providers to update your existing listings, or create new ones before the date above. 

#### **Join the eBay Refurbished program**

To take advantage of the three item conditions (Excellent - Refurbished, Very Good - Refurbished, and Good - Refurbished) for your listings, you can apply to join the eBay Refurbished program by clicking the link below. See the [full list of refurbished categories](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/ebay-refurbished-program)
.

The program enhances the shopping experience by ensuring consistent quality and seller standards for refurbished products. Approved sellers gain exclusive access to program grades, benefiting from improved visibility and a mark of approval on relevant listings.

[Apply now](https://signin.ebay.com/ws/eBayISAPI.dll?SignIn&UsingSSL=1&siteid=0&co_partnerId=2&pageType=2341853&ru=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.ebay.com%2Fsrv%2Fsurvey%2Fa%2Fselling.sellerrefurbish.us)

FAQs
----

### Why is eBay making these changes to refurbished listings?

We’re updating our refurbished listing standards to create a more consistent and trustworthy experience for buyers. The eBay Refurbished program ensures products are fully functional, professionally inspected, and accurately described, which helps buyers shop with confidence and helps sellers increase visibility and trust in their listings.

### What happens if I don't update ‘Seller Refurbished’ my listings by August 5?

From August 5, listings with the 'Seller Refurbished' condition will automatically update to 'Used'. Any that contain listing errors will be ended.

### How do I apply for the eBay Refurbished program?

To apply, please visit the [eBay Refurbished program application page](https://signin.ebay.com/ws/eBayISAPI.dll?SignIn&UsingSSL=1&siteid=0&co_partnerId=2&pageType=2341853&ru=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.ebay.com%2Fsrv%2Fsurvey%2Fa%2Fselling.sellerrefurbish.us)
 and follow the instructions.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=889ad661-8fea-4f96-1ef3-0ddc625c7616&ctx_pageTitle=Category+Expansion+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

---

# Parts & accessories return policy | Seller Center

Boost buyer trust with new P&A returns policy
=============================================

eBay covers 50% of the cost of our return shipping labels on eligible P&A listings

What you need to know
---------------------

We’re on a mission to make eBay the top destination for buying and selling Parts & Accessories (P&A). Based on buyer feedback, easy and free returns play a crucial role when choosing where to shop. To better meet these expectations and give you a competitive edge, we’re updating our return policy for eligible P&A listings by offering free returns. We’re here to support you, so we’ll automatically subsidize these return label costs by 50% going forward.

Driving growth and buyer satisfaction
-------------------------------------

Starting July 15, P&A sellers will be required to offer a minimum of free 30-day returns, creating a smoother and more consistent shopping journey. This streamlined policy helps eliminate confusion so buyers can have a hassle-free returns experience, strengthening their trust both in your business and in eBay.

Concerned about offering free returns? We’ve got you covered
------------------------------------------------------------

While offering free returns can help boost your sales and have a positive impact on your business, we understand that you may have concerns. That’s why we’re taking these steps to support you:

*   **Subsidized eBay return labels:** Enjoy a 50% reduction in label costs, applied automatically to ease return shipping expenses when you use eBay Labels.
*   **Continued seller protections:** We’re continuously monitoring buyer fraud to ensure we have stronger safeguards in place to protect your business.
*   **Targeted marketing campaigns**: We’re promoting free returns to help attract more buyers to your P&A listings.

P&A listings required to offer free returns
-------------------------------------------

If your Parts & Accessories listings meet the following criteria, you’ll be required to offer free returns: 

*   The item is listed on eBay.com and located in the US
*   The item is being shipped to a buyer in the US
*   The price of the item is more than $10
*   The item is new or new other 
*   It’s a fixed-price Buy It Now listing

Next steps
----------

Starting from July 15, you should offer free returns for new and live eligible P&A listings. By doing so, you’ll benefit from the 50% subsidized eBay return labels. We'll begin automatically updating all eligible P&A listings that were live before July 15 to reflect this new return policy. In the meantime, we ask that you review your listings to ensure the update has been made.

FAQs
----

### Which P&A categories are excluded from the updated return policy?

Listings in categories listed below are excluded from our updated return policy and aren’t required to offer free returns:

**Car & Trucks:**

*   Wheels (179679)
*   Tires (179680)
*   Tire & Wheel packages (179681)
*   Other Wheel & Tire Parts (179684)
*   Auto Transmissions (171115)
*   Manual Transmissions (171117)
*   Complete Engines (33615)
*   Door Panels (33696)
*   Hood Panels (33646)
*   Airbags (177710)

**ATV, Side-by-Side & UTV:**

*   Wheels (263049)
*   Tires (263048) 
*   Wheels & Tire Packages (263051)

**All P&A categories:**

*   Listings with local pick up only 
*   Listings where shipping uses freight services

### When will the subsidized eBay return labels be available, and how can I use them?

The reduced-rate eBay return labels will be available for eligible returns once the updated return policy takes effect starting July 15. They’ll be automatically applied and you’ll only be charged 50% of the label cost for transactions and returns after July 15.

### Do I have to use eBay to generate shipping labels?

No, you can upload your own label, but the 50% reduction isn’t applicable to non-eBay-generated labels.

### Is the subsidized eBay Label applicable to all types of returns?

The 50% reduction in eBay labels applies only when a buyer changes their mind after purchasing an item and wants to return it. 

If a buyer wishes to return an item because it doesn’t fit their vehicle, we’ll cover the cost of the return shipping under eBay Guaranteed Fit. If the buyer reports that the item arrived damaged or doesn’t match the listing description, the seller is responsible for the full cost of the return label.  

### I already offer free returns. Can I still use the subsidized eBay Labels?

Yes, you can take advantage of the subsidized eBay return labels starting July 15 for instances when a buyer changes their mind after purchasing an item that’s eligible under our updated policy.

### Can I opt out of providing free returns?

If you're listing in the applicable P&A categories, participation is required. Free returns address a key buyer need in the P&A industry, and we’re confident this policy update will help you grow your business on eBay.

### What happens if I don’t offer free returns for my eligible P&A listings?

Later this summer, you’ll no longer be able to list in the eligible P&A categories if you don’t provide free returns. To stay compliant and continue selling P&A, we encourage you to offer free returns and take advantage of subsidized eBay Labels.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=068020a4-6dd8-4bb9-a5a3-9f1361bc9740&ctx_pageTitle=Parts+%26+accessories+return+policy+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

---

# Certified Open Box | Seller Center

Elevate your Open Box listings
==============================

Enhance buyer trust and stand out in the marketplace with our exclusive Certified Open Box program.

What you need to know
---------------------

We’re pleased to introduce the **Certified Open Box** program, designed to enhance your Open Box listings within Electronics & Home. 

Listings in eligible categories will now automatically display the Certified Open Box badge when they meet key service standards and offer free shipping and free returns. This badge communicates premium quality and can help boost buyer confidence, helping your items stand out and elevating your brand presence on eBay.

Each Certified Open Box item comes with a one-year warranty serviced by Allstate Protection Plans, adding even more value and peace of mind for your customers.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/05/open_box_badge_1200x720.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Examples of eligible categories:\*
----------------------------------

*   Cell phones
*   Smartwatches
*   Laptops
*   Vacuum cleaners
*   Appliances
*   Headphones
*   Tablets
*   Tools
*   Video game consoles

See the [full list](https://pages.ebay.com/certified-open-box/)
 of Certified Open Box categories.

Qualifying for Certified Open Box
---------------------------------

To qualify for the programme, your seller level needs to be ASTD/ETRS and you must have a business account.

**Make sure your listings:**  

*   Fall into the eligible categories described above
*   Have the condition set to “Open Box”
*   Offer free delivery
*   Provide at least 30-day free returns

**Your listings must also meet the following service metrics:**

*   “Item Not as Described” rate below 4%
*   “Item Not Received” rate below 1%
*   A minimum of 25 Open Box transactions every 3 months

Next steps
----------

Once you meet the outlined criteria, the Certified Open Box badge will automatically appear on your listings in eligible categories within Electronics & Home – no extra steps required. Your items will also be covered by a one-year warranty, serviced by Allstate Protection Plans. 

If you’re close to meeting the criteria, consider focusing on improving your “Item Not as Described” and “Item Not Received” rates or increasing your transactions. We’re here to support you in achieving these goals.

###### _\* Eligible categories are subject to change._

FAQs
----

### What happens if my service metrics and/or seller level drop below the required levels?

If your metrics and/or seller level temporarily fall short during an evaluation period, we’ll remove the Certified Open Box badge and the warranty. Once your metrics are back to the required level, these benefits will be reinstated.

### What does the one-year warranty from Allstate Protection Plans cover?

The one-year warranty covers defects in materials and workmanship, offering peace of mind to your buyers with protection beyond the initial purchase.

### How can I monitor my metrics?

You can track your service metrics through the [Seller Hub](http://ebay.com/sh)
, where you’ll find detailed reports and insights to help maintain the necessary standards.

### Does it cost anything to participate in the Certified Open Box program?

No, participation is free. As long as your listings meet the criteria, the badge will be applied automatically.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=1f643c3a-a13f-89e8-a69c-0292d015fac2&ctx_pageTitle=Certified+Open+Box+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

---

# Facebook Marketplace | Seller Center

More visibility through Facebook Marketplace
============================================

We’re broadening your listings’ reach by expanding our collaboration with Facebook Marketplace.

What you need to know
---------------------

Earlier this year, we announced an exciting new way to help boost your listings’ visibility—our [collaboration with Facebook Marketplace](https://community.ebay.com/t5/Announcements/Introducing-eBay-s-partnership-with-Facebook-Marketplace/ba-p/34868556)
. This update helps you extend your reach into a new pool of potential buyers, by showing select listings directly on Facebook Marketplace.

We’re continuing to expand the number of listings shown, maximizing your visibility at no additional cost to you.

How it works
------------

Eligible eBay listings will appear seamlessly integrated into Facebook Marketplace’s feed, marked with a “partnership” icon. Your listings will display the pricing, listing details, and shipping options you've set on eBay. Currently, only listings with shipping options are shown on Facebook Marketplace, so there's no need to adjust your shipping policies or offer local pickup. 

When buyers find your listing, they'll complete their purchase through eBay’s checkout process. You'll manage the transaction just like any other eBay sale, with all the usual protections and security you enjoy as an eBay seller. 

Plus, there’s no additional cost to you. It’s just one more way we help you increase visibility of your listings.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/03/fb_ebay_integration_option3_updated.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Next steps
----------

You don’t need to take any action to benefit from increased visibility on Facebook Marketplace. As long as your account is in good standing, your listings may appear on Facebook Marketplace based on interest, trends, and listing quality.

FAQs
----

### Which categories are going to be shown on Facebook Marketplace?

Listings from a variety of categories will appear on Facebook Marketplace based on factors including current shopping trends and listing quality.

### How am I protected from bad buyer behavior or situations outside of my control for listings sold through Facebook Marketplace?

Because these transactions will be handled completely through eBay, you’ll receive all the same protections that you’re used to as an eBay seller, including protections against negative feedback.

### Do buyers from Facebook Marketplace need an eBay account?

No. Buyers will be taken to eBay’s checkout flow, where they can either log in to an existing account or use guest checkout to complete their purchase.

### Is this the same as eBay Promoted Listings?

No. You don’t need to participate in eBay Promoted Listings in order to appear on Facebook Marketplace. eBay listings are integrated into Facebook Marketplace at no additional cost to you.

### Can I opt out of having my listings shown on Facebook Marketplace?

Displaying your listings on Facebook Marketplace helps you reach more buyers beyond eBay, comes at no additional cost to you, and is designed to increase visibility and sales. However, if you prefer not to have your listings visible on Facebook Marketplace, please see the [opt-out instructions](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/listings/ebay-listings-facebook-marketplace?id=5559)
.

### Do I have to offer local pickup for listings to appear on Facebook Marketplace?

No. Currently, only shipped listings from eBay are shown on Facebook Marketplace. In the future, eBay local listings may be included, and no additional action will be required from sellers.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=822f24e6-6622-3b35-0edc-920506795cfe&ctx_pageTitle=Facebook+Marketplace+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

---

# Final value fee changes | Seller Center

Final value fee changes in most categories
==========================================

To support our ongoing investments in enhanced tools and expanded protections to help your business thrive, we're adjusting our selling fees.

What you need to know
---------------------

We’ll be adjusting final value fees in most categories starting February 14, 2025.

Enhancing your eBay experience
------------------------------

We're committed to providing a secure, market-leading selling experience that empowers your business and connects you with the world. Our significant investments in trust and safety measures shield you from unpaid items, fraud, abuse, and unforeseen disruptions, ensuring your business runs smoothly and empowering you to sell with confidence. With our extensive international buyer pool and dedication to cross-border trade, your products can reach an unmatched global audience. Plus, our dynamic marketing efforts are always in motion, attracting more buyers and fueling your business's growth.

Over the past year, we've been busy making eBay even better to support your business growth. Enhanced tools like the [redesigned Seller Hub Marketing tab](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2024-summer/business#marketing-tab)
 and [automated offers](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/timeline/automated-offers)
 help you connect with more buyers, while our [AI background enhancement tool](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2024-october/tools#ai)
 streamlines your workflow by enabling you to create studio-quality photos. Plus, our [expanded Product Research tool](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2024-october/tools#research)
 helps you set pricing easier, and your selling experience is more secure than ever with [expanded ShipCover insurance](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2024-october/protections#shipcover)
 and our ongoing efforts to [reduce unpaid items](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2024-winter/protections#upi)
.

As we move into 2025, we're excited to continue building on these improvements to empower your business, expand your reach, and help you streamline how you work. 

2025 final value fee adjustments
--------------------------------

To support these and future enhancements, **we’ll be adjusting final value fees in most categories starting February 14, 2025**, with increases ranging up to a maximum of 0.35%. We remain committed to offering competitive fees that reflect the value you receive from selling on eBay. 

For detailed information on the specific fee changes, please see the tables below.

### Final value fees for sellers without a Store or with a Starter Store subscription

|     |     |     |
| --- | --- | --- |

| **Category** | **Final value fee % + per order fee** | **Final value fee % + per order fee** |
| **Most categories**, including :<br><br>Music > **Vinyl Records**<br><br>eBay Motors > **Parts & Accessories**,<br><br>eBay Motors > **Automotive Tools & Supplies**<br><br>eBay Motors > **Safety & Security Accessories** | 13.25%<br><br>  <br><br>_2.35% on portion of the sale over $7,500_ | 13.6%<br><br>  <br><br>_2.35% on portion of the sale over $7,500_ |
| **NFTs** | 5%  | 5%  |
| **Books & Magazines**<br><br>**Movies & TV** (except Movie NFTs)<br><br>**Music** (except Vinyl Records and Music NFTs) | 14.95%<br><br>  <br><br>_2.35% on portion of the sale over $7,500_ | 15.3%<br><br>  <br><br>_2.35% on portion of the sale over $7,500_ |
| Select Business & Industrial:<br><br> - Heavy Equipment, Parts & Attachments > **Heavy Equipment**<br><br> - Printing & Graphic Arts > **Commercial Printing Presses**<br><br> - Restaurant & Food Service > **Food Trucks, Trailers & Carts** | 3%<br><br>  <br><br>_0.5% on the portion of the sale over $15,000_ | 3%<br><br>  <br><br>_0.5% on the portion of the sale over $15,000_ |

# Promoted Stores | Seller Center

Help increase store traffic with Promoted Stores Custom
=======================================================

Hand-pick your featured listings, choose your landing page, and create ads that drive more buyers to your Store.

### **What you need to know**

**Promoted Stores Custom** is designed to give eligible sellers more creative control and help highlight the inventory that matters most to your business. You can now choose both the listings you want to feature in your ads and the exact Store page buyers land on.

### **How it works**

**Promoted Stores Custom** gives you the flexibility to tailor your ads from start to finish:

*   Select up to 1,000 listings, including ten featured items to showcase in your ads  
    
*   Choose a custom landing page option for your Store, such as a sales event page, a curated collection, an influencer-led page, or an eBay Live event page.

### **Why it matters**

This update allows you to take control over your ads, how they look, and where they lead:

*   Highlight the listings you want buyers to see
*   Drive traffic to the page that best represents your brand or promotion
*   Build your brand visibility, promote a special event, or increase Store visits

### **Next steps**

To start using **Promoted Stores Custom**:

1.  Go to **Seller Hub** > **Advertising** > **Promoted Stores**  
    
2.  Select **Promoted Stores Custom** during campaign setup  
    
3.  Add your featured listings and landing page

Visit the Seller Center to [learn more about Promoted Stores Custom](http://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/growth/ebay-advertising/promoted-stores)
.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=40e01a85-9654-bf4d-5d6d-954c4f1ca556&ctx_pageTitle=Promoted+Stores+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# AI Assistant | Seller Center

Save time responding to your buyers with AI Assistant
=====================================================

Let AI Assistant help you reply faster and keep buyers informed, so you can focus on growing your business.

What you need to know
---------------------

Our AI Assistant is a powerful new feature designed to enhance interactions with buyers. It gives you quick, relevant replies to buyers’ common questions, so you can save time, stay focused on your business, and build buyer confidence.

### You’re always in control

Review and refine each suggested message before sending, or simply write your own. Every response is drawn from your live listings, so buyers get clear, accurate details—with you calling the shots.

  

### How to get started

To turn on AI Assistant:

 **1.** Open “Messages” on mobile or desktop. A pop-up should prompt you to enable “eBay.ai.”

 **2.** If you don’t see the pop-up:

*   On mobile: go to “Settings” in Messages and toggle “eBay.ai” on
*   On desktop: use the “eBay.ai” toggle in the bottom left of Messages
*   To turn it off anytime, toggle “eBay.ai” off on your device

 **3.** Open a buyer message. A suggested reply will appear.

 **4.** Choose your next step: “Edit and send” to use the suggestion, or “Dismiss” to write your own

Tell us what you think
----------------------

If you dismiss a suggestion, you’ll be prompted to share feedback. Your input helps us fine-tune AI Assistant to better support your business.

Start saving time and keeping buyers in the loop with just a few clicks—enable AI Assistant now.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=a00a9651-15a0-671c-b83b-a68a5338ba67&ctx_pageTitle=AI+Assistant+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Tracking updates | Seller Center

Transforming the tracking experience
====================================

We’ve streamlined tracking to provide sellers and buyers with a more intuitive and consistent way to follow deliveries.

What you need to know
---------------------

Tracking your sales is crucial for seller protection, enhancing buyer confidence, and improving overall business performance. It helps you and your buyers monitor shipments, minimizes "Where’s my order?" inquiries and "item not received" claims, and can contribute to a positive seller rating.

We’ve listened to your feedback and redesigned the tracking experience across Seller Hub and the buyer shipment flow to make it more visual, unified, and easy to navigate. You'll see these changes from the end of July.

What's changing
---------------

### **For sellers:**

*   **Enhanced visualization**: Seller Hub now offers a more consistent and intuitive tracking status visualization, such as on the ‘View Order’ page, making it easier to manage order shipments.

### **For buyers:**

*   **Unified delivery overview:** Buyers will now see all deliveries for an order in one comprehensive view, including separate tracking for outbound and return items.
*   **Updated order delivery status:** If a delivery is delayed, buyers will see a clearer status update, reducing uncertainty and setting better expectations.

Our goal is to offer a more unified tracking experience, ensuring that both sellers and buyers have consistent and reliable information throughout the shipping and delivery process.

FAQs
----

### How will the new tracking system help minimize “item not received” claims?

Clearer, unified tracking helps buyers see exactly where their order is at every step, reducing misunderstandings and the need to file claims.

### What specific changes will I see in Seller Hub?

You’ll notice a simplified and more consistent tracking visualization, especially on the ‘View Order’ page.

### How does the unified shipment overview benefit buyers?

Buyers will have a clearer understanding of their order's journey, seeing multiple shipments, orders, and returns in one view and distinguishing between outbound and return tracking.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=8d69bf1f-6a9f-4540-5f91-4bb3efda869f&ctx_pageTitle=Tracking+updates+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

---

# Cost of Goods Sold Article | Seller Center

An easier way to track your net order earnings
==============================================

Simplify your bookkeeping and make smarter business decisions with the new “Your Cost” field in Seller Hub.

You asked for a simpler way to track your net earnings, and we listened. Since November, you may have noticed a new optional field called **Your Cost** in the listing tools for both new and active listings. When your item sells, you’ll see **Your Cost** displayed alongside your net order earnings on the Earnings page in Seller Hub.

Why this matters
----------------

We know that keeping track of item-level costs is crucial for your business. The new **Your Cost** field gives you a clearer, more accurate picture of your net order earnings, making bookkeeping smoother. When you receive an offer from a buyer, you’ll be able to see the offer price, your cost (if you’ve added it to the listing), and the age of the listing, making it easier to decide whether to accept the offer.

Adding your cost during listing creation or to an active listing is completely optional and only visible to you.

  

How Your Cost helps you
-----------------------

*   **Simplified bookkeeping**: reconcile your books more easily by seeing your item acquisition costs alongside your listings and sales data.
*   **Smarter pricing and sourcing**: price items more accurately, negotiate more confidently with buyers, run smarter promotions, and identify your most profitable inventory. 
*   **Faster decision-making**: view your cost data where you already manage sales—no need to switch tools.

Where to find it
----------------

The **Your Cost** field is now available in Seller Hub:

*   For larger sellers: add cost info to new listings or edit active listings using the **Your Cost** option directly in the single and bulk listing tools
*   For smaller sellers: add cost info to new listings or edit active listings by turning on the **Your Cost** option in 'Pricing options' under the Price section of the single listing tool and by selecting 'Customize columns' in the bulk listing tool
*   Earnings Report: go to the Earnings page under Payments and view your net order earnings and **Your Cost** for each order, when costs were added to the items before the listing sells
*   Order Details: quickly review your cost and net earnings for any order
*   Offer flows: see your costs when receiving offers

Next steps
----------

To learn more, head to Seller Hub and look for the new **Your Cost** field.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=661d9897-384d-dcc3-b148-1dbf221b82d7&ctx_pageTitle=Cost+of+Goods+Sold+Article+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

---

# PSA Vault Article | Seller Center

A simpler process for graded trading card sales
===============================================

Your PSA Grading Service can now ship to the PSA Vault.

What you need to know
---------------------

Graded trading card sales on eBay just got even more streamlined. 

Buyers who purchase a raw trading card worth $250 or more and add eBay’s PSA Grading service can have it shipped directly from PSA grading to the PSA Vault in Delaware. 

This new option adds a layer of convenience and security that gives collectors more confidence in their purchases—helping sellers like you close more deals and boost buyer satisfaction.

Build buyer trust
-----------------

PSA Vault is a secure storage facility that protects valuable trading cards. Previously, this service wasn’t available to buyers who added PSA Grading to their purchase at checkout. With this update, you are able to offer buyers more choice and confidence when shopping. This can lead to stronger buyer trust, more repeat purchases, and increased sales for graded trading card sellers.

Next steps
----------

No action is required and you won't see any changes in your selling process. You’ll still ship to the Authenticity Guarantee facility as normal. From there, PSA handles grading and fulfillment based on the buyer’s chosen option.

Direct shipping to the PSA Vault is optional—buyers can still have their graded card shipped directly to them, just as before.

This service creates new opportunities, visibility, and traction for sellers in the graded trading cards space while maintaining buyer relationships.

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=6cee7098-e617-f2d6-7fb8-9bb758bf9c02&ctx_pageTitle=PSA+Vault+Article+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

---

# New item conditions  | Seller Center

Introducing new conditions for pre-loved clothing
=================================================

Enhance the quality of your pre-loved clothing listings with our new item condition options.

What you need to know
---------------------

We’re expanding our item condition options for pre-loved clothing to enhance transparency in this category, and make the selling and buying experience even better. Starting mid-February, you’ll need to use our new item condition options that provide you with a wider range of choices, making it easy for you to describe your item as accurately as possible.

3 new pre-owned conditions to choose from
-----------------------------------------

Previously, when listing pre-loved clothing, you could only select ‘Pre-owned’ as the item condition. Soon, you’ll have three options to pick from: **Pre-owned - Excellent**, **Pre-owned - Good**, and **Pre-owned - Fair**. The existing ‘New with defects’ condition will also be renamed to ‘New with imperfections’ for items that are unworn but with visible flaws.

Check out the table below for detailed descriptions of these conditions.

  

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| **Pre-owned - Excellent** | Like new, previously worn, but with little to no signs of wear. <br><br>This item has been previously worn, however, it‘s in excellent condition. Any signs of wear should be shown and described in your listing. |
| **Pre-owned - Good** | Gently used with light signs of wear and/or visible flaws.<br><br>This item has been gently used but is in good condition. It may have a few signs of wear, but all imperfections should be shown and described in your listing. |
| **Pre-owned - Fair** | Significantly visible flaws, heavy signs of wear, and/or missing or damaged components.<br><br>This item has significantly visible imperfections and signs of wear. All imperfections should be shown and described in your listing. |

  

For more information, please visit our [Conditions for pre-loved clothing page](https://ebay.com/preownedfashionconditionguidance)
.

Benefits of detailed conditions for sellers
-------------------------------------------

**Build trust**: Give your buyers a clear picture of an item’s condition so they can shop for pre-loved clothing with confidence.

**Increase exposure**: Make sure your listings stand out and appear in search results when buyers filter by condition.

**Reduce returns**: By being transparent about an item’s condition, you’ll help set expectations and reduce the likelihood of returns due to condition-related issues. 

Next steps
----------

Starting mid-February, you can use our updated item condition options when creating or updating pre-loved clothing listings. Here are some important details you should know:

*   Once this change takes effect, all your existing ‘Pre-owned’ clothing listings will be automatically updated to ‘Pre-owned - Good’ 
*   You’ll need to review any listings that are changed to ‘Pre-owned - Good’ to ensure the condition accurately reflects each item
*   If necessary, revise your listings to select the appropriate condition
*   If you use a third party provider to manage your listings, our new condition grading options will be available through their tools. Please get in touch with them for more information and support

In the meantime, you can review your listings to determine which of the new conditions would best fit each item.

[Review your listings](https://signin.ebay.com/ws/eBayISAPI.dll?SignIn&ru=https%3A%2F%2Fmy.ebay.com%2Fws%2FeBayISAPI.dll%3FMyEbay%26gbh%3D1%26CurrentPage%3DMyeBayAllSelling&sgfl=sm&smuid=79b0df3f03c744c588340d82641f50a0)

**We recommend revising your listings as soon as possible to avoid unnecessary returns and ensure your listings appear in search results.**

FAQs
----

### For which categories will the new condition options be available?

Our new condition options will be available for pre-loved clothing in the following categories:

*   Women's Clothing
*   Men's Clothing 
*   Kids' Clothing 
*   Unisex Kids' Clothing 
*   Baby & Toddler 
*   Women's Vintage Clothing 
*   Men's Vintage Clothing 
*   Children's Vintage Clothing
*   Specialty Clothing
*   Fancy Dress & Period Costume 
*   Wedding & Formal Occasion 
*   World & Traditional Clothing

### How do I revise my listings?

You can revise your listings from [Selling Activity](http://my.ebay.com/ws/eBayISAPI.dll?MyEbay&gbh=1&CurrentPage=MyeBayAllSelling)
 in My eBay or your [Active listings](https://www.ebay.com/sh/lst/active)
 in Seller Hub. You can also revise your listings in bulk using one of our [bulk listing tools](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/listings/listing-tips/bulk-listing-tool?id=4160)
. 

In the meantime, we recommend familiarizing yourself with the new item conditions and reviewing your listings to identify which need to be updated.

### What happens if I don't update my existing listings once the new conditions are available?

If you don't update your listings, inaccurate item conditions may reduce their visibility, as they could be filtered out when buyers search by condition. This might also lead to increased returns and negative feedback from buyers if the item doesn't match the listed condition, potentially affecting your seller standards. We recommend adding the correct condition for your listings as soon as possible.

### What if an item that belongs under 'Pre-owned - Fair' gets updated to 'Pre-owned - Good'?

If you have items best represented as 'Pre-owned - Fair', we recommend updating them as soon as the new item conditions are available to avoid ‘item not as described’ returns. Please note that it’s your responsibility to ensure the correct item condition has been selected for your listings.

### What if a buyer wants to return an item purchased before the new conditions became available mid-February?

If a buyer wishes to return a pre-loved clothing item bought before the new conditions become available, the item's condition will be assessed based on the condition options that were in place at the time of purchase.

### Will eBay protect me if a buyer wants to return an item because the item condition wasn't as expected?

If eBay’s change to your condition grading causes your ‘Item Not as Described’ rates to increase and results in your [service metric](https://www.ebay.com/help/policies/selling-policies/seller-standards-policy/service-metrics-policy?id=4769)
 rating changing to 'Very High', we'll automate temporary protections. Please continue to handle any returns to avoid a ‘case closed without seller resolution’.

We’ll also provide free return labels for eligible ‘Item not as described’ return requests until April 15, 2025. To qualify, the return must be for an item listed under one of the newly defined ‘pre-owned’ conditions.

Sellers are talking about the 2025 January Seller Update in the eBay Community.

[Join the conversation](https://community.ebay.com/t5/Seller-Update-January-2025/bd-p/SU_1_25)

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=8534c921-e87c-0a07-fdf4-5381f02e53c2&ctx_pageTitle=New+item+conditions++%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# ShipCover Insurance | Seller Center

Get more protection for your items with ShipCover
=================================================

Our expanded ShipCover insurance now covers your high-value shipments against loss or damage.

What you need to know
---------------------

ShipCover gives you an easy, cost-effective way to insure your USPS® shipments, both domestic and international. Designed exclusively for eBay sellers, this robust shipping insurance option is fully integrated with your Seller Hub experience and ensures that your USPS® shipments are protected during transit.

Now, when you buy a ShipCover plan, you get even more coverage for your shipments, giving you peace of mind so you can focus on running your business. Just make sure you use USPS®, and buy your shipping labels through eBay Labels to be fully covered.

ShipCover benefits for your business
------------------------------------

#### **Peace of mind**

You work hard to provide your buyers with excellent service, but sometimes shipping accidents happen. ShipCover offers full coverage for lost and damaged shipments, protecting against “Where’s my item?” inquiries and keeping your business in good standing, so you can focus on the important things.

#### **Comprehensive coverage**

ShipCover insurance now covers up to $15,000 on domestic shipments and up to $10,000 on international shipments, so you get even more coverage for your money.

#### **Fast and easy process**

ShipCover claims are paid within [7-10 business days](https://www.pipinsure.com/about/#:~:text=File%20your%20claim%20directly%20with,days%20of%20receiving%20your%20documents)
, meaning you can rest assured that you and your buyer will be compensated in a timely manner for any lost or damaged items. Plus, it’s easy to file a claim and check the status of your claims in My eBay and in Seller Hub.

For more info on how to make ShipCover work for your business, check out our Seller Center page.

[Learn more](http://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/shipcover-insurance)

Next steps
----------

No need to take immediate action, but you can start insuring your items with ShipCover today in Seller Hub or My eBay. If you want to learn more about ShipCover benefits and restrictions, see our Seller Center page.

[Learn more](http://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/shipping/shipcover-insurance)

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=65235ec5-5a5d-2797-1480-0d168a802022&ctx_pageTitle=ShipCover+Insurance+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)

# Tools you can trust | Seller Center

Tools you can trust
===================

On this page

*   [Overview](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2024-october/tools#overview)
    
*   [Enhance your listing photos with AI](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2024-october/tools#enhance-your-listing-photos-with-a-i)
    
*   [New Summary and Discounts pages for Store subscribers](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2024-october/tools#new-summary-and-discounts-pages-for-store-subscribers)
    
*   [Price your items like a pro with Product research](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2024-october/tools#price-your-items-like-a-pro-with-product-research)
    

Overview
--------

*   Use eBay’s AI background enhancement tool to create studio-quality photos for your listings
*   Easily manage your marketing with a simpler, streamlined experience
*   Our new sell-through rate metric allows you to see the demand for an item, making this tool more powerful than ever in determining the market value of your items to help you price and sell them.

  

Enhance your listing photos with AI
===================================

### **What you need to know**

With eBay’s AI background enhancement tool, you can easily take your listing photos to the next level by placing them on high-quality professional backgrounds. This free tool is available on the eBay app, and allows you to generate studio-quality photos to help attract more buyers. There are multiple AI-generated backgrounds to choose from, including solid colors, outdoor scenes, and more, that’ll help your listings stand out.

###   

### How it works

1.  First, go to the **Selling** tab in the eBay mobile app and select **List an item** (or edit an existing one). Then, upload your product photo.
2.  Use the background removal tool to delete the original backdrop, isolating your item.
3.  Browse and select from a variety of AI-generated backgrounds that best suit your product.
4.  Apply your chosen background to create a professional-looking image that highlights your item.
5.  Review your photo and then proceed with the rest of your listing as usual, now with a more appealing visual presentation.

![Series of 5 photos showing how to isolate your item, generate backgrounds, and then preview the final result before publishing.](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/10/ai_bkg_enhancements_2400x992.jpg?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

### Next steps

You can start using this tool right now. Just launch the eBay app and start listing.

New Summary and Discounts pages for Store subscribers
=====================================================

### **What you need to know**

With an eBay Store subscription, you can unlock a powerful suite of marketing and discount tools designed to accelerate your sales. Now, you can experience an updated look and feel of your Store pages that make it easier for you to stay on top of your campaigns and monitor the success of your discounts.

###   

### **Faster to find what you need**

Featuring streamlined navigation and a crystal clear overview of your active discounts, your redesigned seller Marketing Tab puts you in the driver’s seat. The simplified left-hand navigation bar provides easy access to your Summary and Discounts pages, plus useful links to your buyer groups and social pages. We’ve also renamed “Promotions” as “Discounts” for more clarity. 

###   

### **See how your discounts are impacting your sales**

Your redesigned Summary page gives you an overall snapshot of your promotional activity, and highlights areas where you might be able to improve your sales. Also, the new Discounts page uses fresh new graphics and performance metrics to give you a clearer view of how your offers are performing, and ensures that you have all the information you need to optimize your business.

By offering different types of discounts, you can catch your buyers’ attention and encourage more sales.

You can choose from:

*   **Sale events** - Lower prices for a limited time to help your inventory sell faster
*   **Coupons** - Create coupon codes like “WOW10!” to give buyers a discount they can apply at checkout
*   **Offers to buyers** - Send exclusive discount offers to buyers interested in your items. This can now be fully automated
*   **Volume pricing** - Offer discounts for buying more than one of the same item 
*   **Order discounts** - Encourage larger orders with discounts like “Buy 2 get 1 free”  
    

![user experience of the Seller Hub performance metrics](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2024/10/promotions-page.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

### **Spread the word**

Let your customers know about your new and featured products, share news about sales, coupons, and discounts. 

*   **Store newsletter** - Build your brand and connect with buyers over email with ready-made newsletter templates
*   **Social sharing** - Easily create posts to share with your buyers across your social platforms to drive more visits to your listings

###   

### **Next steps**

There’s nothing new for you to do, just enjoy the new experience as it gradually rolls out to all sellers over the next few weeks. If you’re an eBay Store subscriber, head over to your [Seller Hub Marketing tab](https://www.ebay.com/sh/mkt)
, try out the new features, and start creating and managing your discounts. 

Don’t have a Store subscription? Now’s the perfect time to give it a try and [open your eBay Store](https://www.ebay.com/sub/subscriptions)
. You'll have access to all of these marketing tools, plus more great features to help you grow your business.

Price your items like a pro with Product research
=================================================

### **What you need to know**

A few months ago, [we announced](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/resources/seller-updates/2024-summer/tools#research)
 that the Product research tool (formerly Terapeak) became available on mobile. To give you deeper insights, we’ve now added the brand new sell-through rate metric you’ve been asking for, so you can see the demand for an item. Read on to find out how the tool works, and what sellers are saying.   

  

### **How the tool works**

Product research is a free, powerful tool that gives you access to three years of eBay sales and pricing data to help you make more informed decisions about your listings. It shows trends, buyer demand, and even sold listings from other sellers. This equips you with the insights you need to easily determine the popularity of your items, understand their market value, and decide how to price them. 

With the new sell-through rate metric, you’ll be able to see the percentage of similar items sold during a specific period of time. This means you can estimate the speed at which these items are selling, allowing you to quickly price your own items and get them on the market. 

Some of the other data you can see in the tool includes:  

*   Actual sold price (incl. the accepted price for Best Offer listings)
*   Average sold price 
*   Sold price range
*   Percentage sold with free shipping/average shipping and number of sellers who have sold the product
*   A price trend graph

The tool also has tons of other features, like a time-saving “Sell one like this” option. It  does all of the hard work for you by creating a new listing and pre-populating it with information from a previously sold one. All you have to do is modify the listing to describe your own item. You can also use advanced filters to refine your search settings and view a custom number of days, so you only ever see what matters to you.

  
Product research is available to all sellers on desktop when opted in to [Seller Hub](https://www.ebay.com/sh/ovw)
. To be able to opt in, you’ll need to have made at least one sale, then just click “Start using Seller Hub.” You can also use the tool on mobile if you have one active listing or have previously listed and sold within the last 90 days. 

Start using Product research now to get the info you need to unlock your selling potential.

### **What sellers are saying**

Read what sellers (across the US, UK, and Germany) think of the Product research tool:

Get started
-----------

On mobile
---------

On desktop
----------

Make sure you have the latest version of the eBay app installed on iOS or Android. Click 'Start Now' below where you’ll be directed to the **Selling tab** in the app. Once here, scroll to the 'Jump to' section to see the 'Research' icon. Click **Research** and start your first search.

[Start now](https://www.ebay.com/sl/sell)

Head over to **Seller Hub**, and then go to the **Research tab** at the top of the page. Click the first option, **Product research**, and you’re ready to go.

[Get started](https://www.ebay.com/sh/research?marketplace=ALL&tabName=SOLD)

You can also [download the eBay app](https://pages.ebay.com/mobile-app/)
 from your desktop.

FAQs
----

### Who is Product research for?

It’s a valuable tool for sellers of all levels of expertise and inventory.

### Some Product research app features are missing compared to the desktop version. When are they coming?

We're currently developing new features, and will let you know as soon as these enhancements are ready to use.

### Where can I find the Product research tool on desktop?

Product research is available to all sellers who are opted in to [Seller Hub](https://www.ebay.com/sh/ovw)
. To be able to opt in, you’ll need to have made at least one sale, and then click “Start using Seller Hub.” Once you’ve done this, click the **Research** tab and then you’ll see **Product research** as the first option.

Sellers are talking about the 2024 October Seller Update in the eBay Community.

# Listing tools | Seller Center

Find the right listing tools for your business
==============================================

Explore the options for getting your inventory on eBay, and how you can manage your listings faster.

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/04/sc_inventory_hero_1440x992.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

An option for every business
----------------------------

Listing is a crucial part of running an ecommerce business, though sometimes can be time-consuming. We’ve got you covered with a range of listing tools to suit the needs of your business. These can help you list faster and easier, with flexibility to match the size of your inventory. You can also switch between options, depending on what works for your business at any given time. 

Whether you need simple listing tools for a few items or API integrations to manage thousands across different platforms, you’ll have everything you need for every stage of growth. 

Get started with Seller Hub
---------------------------

If you’re not already using Seller Hub, dive in now to benefit from the great listing options below. Seller Hub brings together all of the tools you need to help run your business efficiently. From the [Listings tab](https://www.ebay.com/sh/lst/active)
, you can create, manage and view your listings, as well as create and edit draft listings, which are saved for 75 days after their last update. You can also use Seller Hub to check your business performance, view reports, try advertising tools, and more. 

[Explore Seller Hub](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/seller-hub)

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/04/sc_inventory_getstarted_1200x720.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Find the right tool for you
---------------------------

There are lots of tools to choose from based on how many items you're listing and what works best for your business. They’re designed to help you list faster and easier, so you can get your inventory on eBay in a way that works for you. The best part is, you can use multiple options.

### Advanced listing tool

\- Best for sellers with ~ 25 - 100 items for sale.   
  
\- It’s simple to use with enhanced features.  
  
\- Just describe your item and we’ll start your listing based on similar items. Then fill out the details, upload your photos, check for accuracy, and you’re ready to go.   

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/listings/using-advanced-listing-tool?id=5196)

### Bulk listing

\- Best for sellers with 100 - 250 items for sale, especially if you have a lot of similar items.  
  
\- Allows you to manage thousands of similar listings with easy bulk actions.    
  
\- Recommended if you want to list a large number of similar items, or make updates to your listings in bulk.  

[Discover now](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/ebay-bulk-listing-tools)

### Seller Hub Reports

\- Best for sellers with 250 - 1000 items for sale.   
  
\- Just import a CSV or XLSX file to effortlessly upload all of your inventory.  
  
\- This requires a bit of technical knowledge, and includes formatting and keeping a separate spreadsheet up-to-date.  

[See how it works](https://www.ebay.com/help/selling/selling-tools/seller-hub-reports?id=4096)

### Photo upload

\- Best for items that tend to be standardized, such as trading cards.   
  
\- Our AI-powered tool transforms product images into detailed listing drafts in seconds.   
  
\- Simply bulk upload photos of what you want to list, and watch the magic happen.  

[Explore the tool](https://community.ebay.com/t5/Announcements/List-faster-and-easier-with-our-magical-AI-powered-bulk-listing/ba-p/34685758)

Explore advanced options
------------------------

As your business grows, you’ll want to start considering more advanced listing options. These can support you no matter how large your inventory gets, and provide you with more flexibility as well as automated inventory management.

**Third party providers for listing**  
Service providers can help you with all aspects of listing and order management. They offer customizable solutions that can be tailored to your business, and support you in anything from listing and inventory management to other aspects of your business.   
  
[Explore now](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/third-party-providers)

**APIs**  
APIs allow you to automate the process of creating, updating, and managing listings. This can significantly reduce the time and effort required compared to manual listing tools, especially if you have large inventories. Though some technical knowledge is required to set these up, they can save you lots of time and help keep your inventory up-to-date, and synced across multiple platforms.   
  
[Find out more](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/sell/inventory/static/overview.html)

![](https://ucpstatic.ebay.com/static-assets/images/2025/04/sc_inventory_exploreoptions_1200x1200.png?crafterSite=sellercenter-us)

Continue your journey
---------------------

### Once you’ve mastered the best tools for getting your inventory on eBay, take your business further with these next steps.

#### Get more advanced

If you’re a listing pro, check out these tips and features to see how you can utilize seller growth tools, improve listings ranking in search results, and more.

[Discover now](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/listings/listing-best-practices)

#### Gain maximum efficiency

Try the out-of-stock option for multi-quantity listings, which makes it easy to hide listings if you’re out of inventory, and set it live when you’ve restocked.

[Find out more](https://www.ebay.com/help/multiquantity-listings-listings-variations/creating-managing-listings/listings/selling?id=4150)

#### Save time

Use the Team access to designate employees to manage certain actions in your account. This way you can delegate listing and inventory management tasks. 

[Learn more](https://www.ebay.com/sellercenter/ebay-for-business/team-access)

[Feedback](https://www.ebay.com/srv/survey/a/selling.sellercenter?ctx_pageInstanceId=5e95bf58-ace4-4685-9481-5dbb1244f585&ctx_pageTitle=Listing+tools+%7C+Seller+Center&pageId=3137842)
